name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: A campaign built on community.
body:
Total abortion ban back at the state house.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7a2ded7f9973/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6421262?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
### A campaign built on community
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a582090d54&e=edbde6c9b1)
| | **When people ask me why I stepped into this race, the truth is simple: because this moment matters.**
I’m not here because I’ve always dreamed of running for office. I’m here because when the opportunity arose, I was ready to serve—thanks to years of relationship building, ground level work, and organizing alongside incredible leaders in our community - and in large part thanks to you . Our campaign is small but mighty, and it reflects what I believe at my core: [**local elections are won by communities, not individuals.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=af077d835c&e=edbde6c9b1)
**I’ve knocked nearly two thousand doors, and here’s what people care about:**
* **Roads and growth.** Families see rapid growth and a lapse in infrastructure all around them but don’t know what the plan is.
* **Education.** In Cowpens, a young mom told me the new elementary school is already overcrowded. Parents want to know: _What’s next?_
* **Healthcare.** Retirees are worried about Medicaid cuts. Working families are choosing between groceries and prescriptions.

**And maybe most importantly, people are tired of elected officials who don’t listen. Too many are locked into safe seats, insulated from the people they represent.**
We’ve got two months to prove what’s possible. And when we win, the ripple effect will carry us into the midterms, and into a future where every family in Spartanburg has the chance to thrive.
So I’ll leave you with this: I’m thinking about what matters to you and our political landscape 8 weeks from now, 18 months from now, and 5 years from now, because I have a vision for our community.
[**But right now, I need you to be thinking about me.** ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=db7cf7d302&e=edbde6c9b1)
I’m less than $10,000 away from my final goal. Consider a donation by September 30 and [sign up to knock doors ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=57fc065291&e=edbde6c9b1)and [make phone calls ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=84796a774a&e=edbde6c9b1)with me.
Together, we can build a Spartanburg where everyone can thrive.
---
| [Contribute to Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fb7e45ae38&e=edbde6c9b1)

|

# Check out my latest podcast
---
| | Grace and Kathryn sit down to reflect on hearing Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson and her perspective on dissents, originalism, and the future of the Court. They highlight South Carolina’s upcoming December 23 special elections, why turnout matters, and the role of women in reshaping local politics. The episode also honors everyday civic hope—from the legacy of Spartanburg’s former mayor Junie White to a moving encounter with a 95-year-old attendee and a roadside “motivational sign lady”.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e2b122ad0f&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Listen Up](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d2ef5e803c&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
# Knock doors with me on Saturdays & Sundays
---
| | Join me every Saturday at 10am & Sunday at 3pm for a neighborhood canvass to support my race for Spartanburg County Council! [You can register to volunteer ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a3f4c558b5&e=edbde6c9b1). Interested in phone banking for my campaign this Fall? Join us the third Thursday evening of each month for a virtual phone bank training! This is a great opportunity to volunteer on your own time and help my race for County Council. Register at the link below and you'll [receive a link to make calls. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7c411eef42&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=095e4ae634&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Knock doors with Kathryn](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c803e86403&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |
# A Tribute to Mayor Junie White Sept 14
---
| | Former Spartanburg Mayor Junie White passed away at the age of 87 this past week. His daughter, Melissa White, confirmed that he died of natural causes on the morning of September 1. She said her father was motivated to get involved in local politics because "he always wanted to help those who couldn’t necessarily help themselves -- if he could speak for those people, he would." Mayor White left an indellable mark on our local progressive politics, please join us Sunday September 14 at 3pm - Spartanburg Community College Downtown Campus Theater 220 East Kennedy Street for a Tribute to Junie.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# SC Sister Senators at Wofford Sept 29
---
| | Join us for the second installment of “Candid Conversations” an effort to bring together leadership from across the isle to foster civil discourse in today’s political climate. Hosted by the President’s Office at Wofford College, the SC Sister Senators who bridged together to fight for women’s rights in South Carolina, will join us for a special panel session moderated by the Honorable Former Representative Rita Allison with a foreward by Susu Johnson. Doors open at 5:30pm and a screening of their new documentary film trailer will follow the panel.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=86aa7a38b3&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2cf022b021&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| |
****Canvass with Kathryn Harvey every Sunday at 3pm**[**RSVP Here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=72d81efdbc&e=edbde6c9b1)******
* September 9 Education Forum at Wofford College 6pm Rosalind Salinger Theater
* September 10 SCDP Democracy Builder Training Session RSVP Here
* September 14 Tribute to Mayor Junie White 3pm at SCC Downtown Campus
* September 27 Stop the Violence Coalition Meeting
* September 29 Sister Senators at Wofford College 6pm
* October 6 - SPCDP Monthly Meeting
* October 14 - Early Voting for Senate 12 Primary
* October 21 - 31 Early Voting for the 2025 General Election 8:30- 5:00
* November 4: 2025 General Election (7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m.)
* November 4: Senate 12 Primary Runoff
* December 1: State-wide Candidate Forum 6-7:30pm SCC Downtown Campus
* December 23: Senate 12 Special Election

---
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **MARK YOUR CALENDARS FOR 9:30AM WEDNESDAY, OCTOBER 1Gressette Building, Room 105 for the public hearing!**SENATE BILL 323 WOULD:** Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | **CONGRESS IS BACK—KEEP THE PRESSURE ON** With Congress back in session, constituent pressure matters more than ever. Call, email, and show up at town halls to demand action and accountability on our core priorities. We need to hold members to clear, public positions.
**EPSTEIN FILES UPDATE—TRANSPARENCY NOW** Survivors spoke out last week demanding disclosure, yet Congress continues to resist fully releasing the Epstein Files. We stand withsurvivors in calling for complete transparency—with privacy protections for victims and safeguards for ongoing investigations. Tellyour members of Congress: release the records, let the truth be known, and ensure accountability.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | This past week I had the pleasure of registering Converse University Students to vote and sharing information about local races and ways to get involved. I attended a conversation with Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson in Charleston where we heard her discuss her approach to writing dissents. [You can learn more about it on my latest podcast](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=eff46bfd5a&e=edbde6c9b1).
I also had the pleasure of attending the Cowpens Family BBQ with Harold Anderson and Angelia Edwards and visiting Montgomery Chapel Baptist Church in Pacolet before we knocked doors in the neighborhood. Democracy is a participatory experience, join me at [kathrynforcouncil.com](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b5f848dd42&e=edbde6c9b1).

name: Voter Action Project Georgia
subject: This loophole to get around elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Bolts: After a Judge’s Death, Renewed Scrutiny for a Georgia Loophole That Can Nullify Elections [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090925_2&amount=25]
A quick story, Team: After losing an election race last year, a Georgia State Court Judge turned to a loophole in state law that could have erased the result and blocked the winner from taking office.
We're not making this up. In Georgia, if judges announce they’ll quit at some point before the end of their term, they hand the governor the ability to choose their replacement for the next two years. Even if an election was about to be held for their seat, that race gets canceled and kicked years down the road. Even if an election for their seat has already happened , a judge could still resign after they’ve lost, giving the governor the power to make an appointment that would nullify the result.
Looking to trigger this rule after losing his nonpartisan runoff, conservative Georgia State Court Judge Stephen Yekel told Governor Brian Kemp in a Dec. 6 letter that he intended to resign effective Dec. 30, just one day before his term was set to end. Kemp rejected his resignation letter, thankfully, but that doesn't mean a more cynical governor would do the same in the future.
Opponents of voting rights will take ANY opportunity to silence the will of the people and hold onto their power. We need to fight to close this loophole in Georgia and similar loopholes around the country.
Voter suppression comes in all forms, Team, both in Georgia and nationally. Step up and defend our right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090925_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=090925_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090925_2&amount=35]
While Kemp didn’t give in this time , he has used the loophole to postpone or cancel other judicial elections, though state observers say he has never done so to block a winner after an election has already taken place, only before elections.
But that doesn't mean it won't happen in the future, either with him or another governor. In fact, Kemp had a direct hand in the controversial 2020 maneuver that effectively created the loophole in its current form and gave him the authority to cancel judicial elections.
“ You’re creating an opportunity to bypass an election, ” Sara Tindall Ghazal, a member of the Georgia Board of Elections, said. “ If the judge or the governor doesn’t like the outcome of the election, there’s this opportunity to encourage the incumbent to resign and then fill the seat. ”
Georgia needs stricter legal guidelines now. Our fundamental right to vote needs defending across the country. Our democracy is too important to let these petty dictators, MAGA sycophants, and conspiracy theorists stay in control.
We have to start working now to defend our democracy in next year's elections. Chip in $25 or more right now to join the fight for our rights before it's too late >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=090925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=090925_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Devin
subject: STAND UP for Immigrants & Science! ✊

| | **Join us for an amazing democracy double header this weekend as we rally for**[**immigrants**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=08b86634a8&e=10cc7d1928)**and**[**science! **](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=2848290ee1&e=10cc7d1928)These will be very special events and we’d love to have you with us.
---
| [SIGN ME UP!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=c2488608f3&e=10cc7d1928)

[**Free the Kidnapped**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=ab65551b34&e=10cc7d1928)**\- 9/13** With ICE ramping up, we need to support the immigrant community more than ever. We’re headed for a very special rally in Tacoma with our partner, La Resistencia. [Register now!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=7b567fee6b&e=10cc7d1928)

[**Save Our Science**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=3e47cd0b0d&e=10cc7d1928)**\- 9/14** Join us at the Settle Waterfront Overlook Walk to stand up and fight back for science, for research, and for truth. [Register now!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=1b094aa40f&e=10cc7d1928)
**W ant to Help Spread the Word? **
Download and share these beautiful posters far and wide!
[Click here to download](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=259fa2f3a1&e=10cc7d1928) the **Solidary Day Poster**.
[Click here to download](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=d4acfeb335&e=10cc7d1928) the **Save Our Science Poster.**
**Our team and our partners are putting their whole hearts into these events** to make them powerful, inspiring experiences. Join us!
See you this weekend!
\- Devin

PS. [DONATE today and help fund our fight for democracy! ](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=e53ac42077&e=10cc7d1928)

name: Working Families Party
subject: Trump says prices are "way down." He's lying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Trump lies like he breathes. But Americans know what we are seeing. | | | Peter, Trump posted on social media last week that prices were "WAY DOWN" for Americans:1 Here's what's actually "WAY DOWN": **his poll numbers on inflation** and every other issue:2 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJZEGs9Y0oIYDj-CrxeUHid79c7az0u93YOArfza4w9z2Ssyq2jeoE_13YemHPahB-7gEeRTD4v9aadSozP-LM9yJNpPW7pQY4goRijHYgY4AXNbkKxI24A-ilVpuHaeo186nlG2ntMb1_3NpRUL6ULTefzlWXVKz5f-va4FlmQBBSLJFfEX99hYmohPnLj5g3x5r1W67MXlFsPctbJLRdvWg0EmDEyd4Tkgo0ATc1XCbUbWfKYXYtLaU70OW_Sm7iyH8n5Z2n1l5naIuhht8L2nfQo-0KhOePmAuNzHuFzOv0awri61stxTWVctKDLDytbkfyJ2a0PZLnBowZZkbb7/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h0/h001._BAA_Wi0T9uZBqyfzTuc509ccwoahTZywsxcJxNhF2c) Trump lies like he breathes. But working families know what they see at the supermarket and when they pay their bills every month. **For the vast majority of Americans, prices are continuing to go up.** All while Trump, Vance, and the billionaires who back them are picking our pockets and lying to our faces. [**What prices are going up for you? Let us know here and we may share some of your responses on social media:**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJZEGs9Y0oIYDj-CrxeUHid79c7az0u93YOArfza4w9z2Ssyq2jeoE_13YemHPahB-7gEeRTD4v9aadSozP-LM9WUMb5SBwebXUOvOc353IabVo1cGWQA4zx8fvhb1AVERiIo9RmwHgAkcMeP-KMT9LtgULVsYOd-R2zdzPJC-lY9Hk7fL5x3zj_4ZfB1So-Y1ODHKSRSQ-s6hvX6iuLqhg01Uhl6uOQw1IGT22juQ6suTF6afPDyvcuht0ASmfWfXESy1XQlZBDHm2WdAR7-gtHTs6On1TFTg7_-Ao0-JMDCBHy1YZ6VyhdlXoMcMsWi8PKAy2lJt0qfoBHcUoEHIR/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h1/h001.2HygKpq9km39OXPS3C_D0CZboZcaiSyAU2wRIS4eeE8) **[Share your story »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJZEGs9Y0oIYDj-CrxeUHid79c7az0u93YOArfza4w9z2Ssyq2jeoE_13YemHPahB-7gEeRTD4v9aadSozP-LM9EZ8KHxbpQctKjTEhEtui-iXxIjqmyUJKbSJk8gYTdsBKcEny8fjr6Sq2F_NhDUvK66oz8BsI3kKlzMHfG0N1L9rv4w-PkW60nM8sGbbTEdANH1sveOLdpmB9_GLKZIjz8bCIbsM6oVfud6HGt7TQIMvNzcmidYt8ha1nZOBP_dsVNvvj7467iR6keEspuHa1BwFw1Cxa3G6A7xu3qnmYkS626dIta6Cs1XpSgL4CgzYJF8LdPfeudX8W0R8-atkP/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h2/h001.uxLizR2DA6FWczVN0d1YoQzbrPz2HGje4KSAJkGRznI)** Ten months ago, Trump and Vance were elected in large part because of voters' concerns over rising prices. Since then, they've just made the problem worse. **This administration knows how unpopular it is getting.** That's why they are lying about the economy, firing government workers who track economic statistics, stealing Congressional seats by redrawing maps, making it harder for workers to organize, and sending troops and masked agents into our communities to try and intimidate and silence us. One small way we can fight back is by continuing to share our stories about the _actual_ reality that working families face. **[Let us know what prices have been rising for you here and help disprove Trump's lies.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJZEGs9Y0oIYDj-CrxeUHid79c7az0u93YOArfza4w9z2Ssyq2jeoE_13YemHPahB-7gEeRTD4v9aadSozP-LM9yzwfKgRoZAgfBxcJ_is0RrdMSHYm53aQKeAscQ8RqOv-727f2khHx45C-60Yy54euZeVqKPGIHN8R09pYta7Qufwy-5-fXKkzZ0OtWyOs4IRHVbftWnt3Jp4qLTZwz_vQIBWpJg9lL6TrpwQ1LLm-BIveDWE2ubvh98zcf8t4KM2md3MQAo0DTiMd8Vov7lf1dS_Ml3h9ihrlDylPaePDitOpqLRlnm5j-ULregBlMgzEOMRU5oQNtHx0qaakRf5/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h3/h001.FbcDHvkCk6XQdvEeeKp3xslfRhPv209tMj3Xy_T9O9I)** Or leave a comment directly on our posts on [**Instagram**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg46ICY3AhkAeJ7wa3OcpKprjd4fpkhmjB_hafBOmZa11THZ4Cjv4GtCnpmzlz2JFjU2DlNdjoLXGchRJ4bJOLHBMg7NyIdMRj7dPwhmPfHJYUCyway8aJbHhf_cnBH-7TMaeGAPqZrOdqVUH05iOOQ1JbXmSeanp3neXHgVymO9xmwSrFRhxBrEu7D9kVI6EV9O1DjDVXmsrwUvEE_TIgf27LMTAUySBxqv8sGaRzQ9lCveG3v2cIqqiJo6ozX2kqciOabVvPZoNyzocBBKi5vUe/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h4/h001.PduNClqwDyMrXva054bWD9GXpwcyGhz7XfPiYfQISLE) or [**BlueSky**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uuqqbWgahNQJNOLkWs71YUzk-Bue59fIj0YaW2B1w4RgwZ9wP44FRinKmY4ZL4qKj4y_qqJWAXoMBAM98UpyoJBSM4l61ePu83Vifw1b1xPkxqoPocBNjwRWhHaWr3W97jtHH1aUPHUXoaLNwiuLBy8ERLNUxIdVppXSma8bwtNgB_ema7SisisCM0lutN9bYLaC1f95ixwR6zYz1B2f2jgURo-m9Cyf247AmT4k2P8mj4DXqCKyZbZwUgejBBpYiAmDH8f8ztkJX11rSPme_sA20uWQDcsrG49EYmqP8F-XyEjewWq5WriHuC4uvazQzjw/4js/Z1rp88qXQSuRrWLB7K9Viw/h5/h001.-2bsCe2HOEPNsNHDoXjeucRpyD3sW7TtrwHYIUVWCWs). clean_body: Trump lies like he breathes. But Americans know what we are seeing. | | | Peter, Trump posted on social media last week that prices were "WAY DOWN" for Americans:1 Here's what's actually "WAY DOWN": his poll numbers on inflation and every other issue:2 Trump lies like he breathes. But working families know what they see at the supermarket and when they pay their bills every month. For the vast majority of Americans, prices are continuing to go up. All while Trump, Vance, and the billionaires who back them are picking our pockets and lying to our faces. Ten months ago, Trump and Vance were elected in large part because of voters' concerns over rising prices. Since then, they've just made the problem worse. This administration knows how unpopular it is getting. That's why they are lying about the economy, firing government workers who track economic statistics, stealing Congressional seats by redrawing maps, making it harder for workers to organize, and sending troops and masked agents into our communities to try and intimidate and silence us. One small way we can fight back is by continuing to share our stories about the actual reality that working families face. Or leave a comment directly on our posts on or . In solidarity, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , Yahoo Finance, September 1, 2025 2\. , Strength in Numbers , September 8, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Deb Haaland
subject: New Mexico workers need a champion in their corner
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Teamster union members of Creamland Dairy are on strike, fighting for fair pay and fair working conditions.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4329%2E400544%2EnTLZEm)
I was on the picket line today fighting for New Mexico workers. ✊
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250909_2_picketline?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4329&refcode2=4329_400544_nTLZEm&akid=4329%2E400544%2EnTLZEm)
Teamster union members of Creamland Dairy are on strike, fighting for fair pay and fair working conditions.
As a proud former Teamster myself, I know what it’s like to stand up to powerful corporations. No worker should have to do it alone. **That’s why, as governor, I’ll make sure New Mexico workers always have a champion in their corner.**
But Trump and his corporate allies will spend whatever it takes to defeat our pro-labor movement. If we want a state where workers come before profits, we need grassroots power on our side.
**[Can you chip in $5 today to help us build the grassroots movement to win this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250909_2_picketline?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4329&refcode2=4329_400544_nTLZEm&akid=4329%2E400544%2EnTLZEm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250909_2_picketline?amount=5&refcode=em20250909-4329&refcode2=4329_400544_nTLZEm&akid=4329%2E400544%2EnTLZEm)**
Be fierce,
Deb

name: Abigail
subject: just making sure you saw this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Lawrence O'Donnell of MSNBC described our race as "the most important election" of the year.

Just making sure you saw this, Peter:
_Lawrence O'Donnell of MSNBC described our race as "the most important election" of the year._
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114929812/568628554/-1368359461?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-09_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2U5ZjEzM2QtZGI4ZC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YK-R0VwpuMaESnLjfb0M0RzruAuok7uVMWt8ZUiBq_k=)
And he's right!
_This is our only chance to flip a Governor's seat in 2025._ And once we do, I will get to work bringing back jobs to Virginia, bringing down the cost of living, and standing up to the chaos coming out of Washington.

Now, I didn't hold back in my interview with Lawrence, and I won't with you either.
**Donald Trump has devastated Virginia's economy, but my opponent won't stop cheering him on.**
Winsome Earle-Sears has said Trump's tax law does "so many great things," and just the other day, she lied to Jake Tapper about cuts to healthcare.
The data is clear: 350,000 Virginians are projected to lose healthcare coverage and rural hospitals are set to close due to the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill." Everyday goods are skyrocketing due to Trump's tariffs, and thousands of our civil servants are now unemployed due to DOGE.
_The Bureau of Labor Statistics just announced that Virginia lost more than 43,000 jobs earlier this year._ And our unemployment rate has ticked up for seven straight months. _(The last time that happened was the 2008 financial crisis.)_
Now, I have a plan to get Virginia's economy back on track, and I'm ready to go anywhere and everywhere to talk about it. Yes, that means more interviews, more events, and more TV ads.

clean_body: Lawrence O'Donnell of MSNBC described our race as "the most important election" of the year. Just making sure you saw this, Peter: Lawrence O'Donnell of MSNBC described our race as "the most important election" of the year. = And he's right! This is our only chance to flip a Governor's seat in 2025. And once we do, I will get to work bringing back jobs to Virginia, bringing down the cost of living, and standing up to the chaos coming out of Washington. But step one is winning at the ballot box, and that's where you come in. = = Thanks for standing with me, Abigail Spanberger \-------- Forwarded message -------- From: Abigail Spanberger <info@abigailspanberger.com> Date: Fri, Sep 5, 2025 at 12:39 PM Subject: re: Donald Trump's attacks on Virginia's economy To: <Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Peter, last night, I joined Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to discuss my campaign for Governor of Virginia and the state of our economy, and I'd like to tell you about it. = But first, as the Democratic nominee in the biggest election of Donald Trump's second term, I'm counting on grassroots donations to win big, to send a message to this White House, and to set an example for the entire nation. = = = = = = = Now, I didn't hold back in my interview with Lawrence, and I won't with you either. Donald Trump has devastated Virginia's economy, but my opponent won't stop cheering him on. Winsome Earle-Sears has said Trump's tax law does "so many great things," and just the other day, she lied to Jake Tapper about cuts to healthcare. The data is clear: 350,000 Virginians are projected to lose healthcare coverage and rural hospitals are set to close due to the so-called "Big, Beautiful Bill." Everyday goods are skyrocketing due to Trump's tariffs, and thousands of our civil servants are now unemployed due to DOGE. The Bureau of Labor Statistics just announced that Virginia lost more than 43,000 jobs earlier this year. And our unemployment rate has ticked up for seven straight months. (The last time that happened was the 2008 financial crisis.) Now, I have a plan to get Virginia's economy back on track, and I'm ready to go anywhere and everywhere to talk about it. Yes, that means more interviews, more events, and more TV ads. But all this campaigning is expensive, and the donations from these emails go a long way toward funding our work. = = = = = = = Thank you for considering, Abigail By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States

**➤➤ PRIVACY THREAT: Trump’s DOJ demands your voter registration data — what’s the real agenda?** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114930038/568637942/-1876887045?refcode=em-9.9.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTZkMGM0Yy1kZDhkLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZUGt6gR1C-CLQg0sgkJ8HkI0ncuGakJLdpkaqVz70w=)**
* * *
Friend. The Department of Justice is **demanding voter registration data from at least 19 states, asking for full copies of voter rolls** , complete with sensitive information like partial Social Security numbers, addresses, and driver’s license details. But here’s the kicker: **There’s no valid legal justification.** Experts – and election officials themselves – warn that this is not about improving election safety or fixing the rolls. This is about harvesting data to fuel conspiracy theories, target voters, and potentially build a national database that centralizes power over how we vote. But state leaders are fighting back. Arizona Secretary of State Adrian Fontes called the request unconstitutional, and is refusing to comply. Maine’s Shenna Bellows told them,**“The DOJ can go jump in the Gulf of Maine.”** These are the kinds of leaders we’re proud to support. Our Democratic Secretaries of State are the first line of defense against these attacks. Now, more than ever, we need your help to protect election administration from data grabs and authoritarian scheming. name: Wes Moore
subject: This team pulled through (of course!)
body:
We’re closing out today together, and I’m already so proud of what we accomplished.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)
I’m proud to be a Marylander every day, but y’all really blew me out of the water today. Let’s GO! 💥
The amount of support we received today surpassed my whole team’s expectations. It means the world to me to know that you have my back in this fight.
I’ll be straight with you: _It’s going to be a long and difficult battle ahead of us. But I’m not afraid of what’s to come._
I have no doubt that more Republican attacks will come our way – whether from the Oval Office or from right here in Maryland. But I refuse to be intimidated by those who seek to tear us down, Peter. And I know that together, you and I can weather any storm.
Now is the best time to contribute to our campaign. Starting off strong will help us budget, plan, and organize exactly how we’ll reach voters across the state. **I’m personally asking you to donate anything you can right now to become a Founding Donor.**
**You can use this custom link so I know it’s from you:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-5?refcode=em-20250909-5&personal;=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-5?refcode=em-20250909-5&refcode2=601_1086043_QGBLLj&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)**
Onwards,
Wes
P.S. I may or may not have made a bet with Dawn that my email to you would raise more than the one she sent you earlier today. **[If you have my back, can you help me win reelection (and this bet!) by chipping in anything you can today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250909-5?refcode=em-20250909-5&refcode2=601_1086043_QGBLLj&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)**

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250909-5&t=2&refcode2=601_1086043_QGBLLj&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=601%2E1086043%2EQGBLLj)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

Hey folks,
Today's episode of _Hack vs. Hunk_ is a must-watch. Stefan Smith and I dive into the chaos unfolding across the political landscape--from the Epstein letter bombshell to economic delusions straight from Trump's mouth. It's raw, it's real, and it's exactly the kind of conversation we need right now.
Here's what you'll hear:
* **[00:03:00]** A haunting deep dive into the newly surfaced Jeffrey Epstein "birthday book"--including Trump's creepy doodles, Mar-a-Lago connections, and the stunning banality of evil.
* **[00:14:00]** Trump's surreal radio interview where he fumbles basic economic facts. We ask: is he lying--or is he being lied to?
* **[00:22:00]** A powerful breakdown of the economic incentives (or lack thereof) for starting a family in America today--featuring the absurdity of Republican "baby bonds."
* **[00:30:00]** The white panic behind the attacks on DEI and affirmative action, and how fear of losing cultural dominance is fueling policy regression.
* **[00:33:00]** History nerd gold: we compare today's political moment to the Gilded Age, the Reagan jelly bean era, and the return of Tammany-style machine politics.

**[We're building Endless Urgency into something real here. Help me grow this movement, fund better our work, and create a space that cuts through the noise to what's happening to our country.](https://substack.com/redirect/79e5b8ab-6125-4359-ab7c-ba60d7b2df65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
With urgency,
--Mike

Georgia is **Ground Zero** in the fight to **KEEP** the Senate **RED**.

clean_body: | | | ****** Peter, This is Congressman Derrick Van Orden, and I need your attention immediately. Georgia is Ground Zero in the fight to KEEP the Senate RED. Because we've seen what happens when Democrats are in charge: 🛑 The border is thrown wide open. 🛑 Crime surges in our neighborhoods. 🛑 Inflation crushes working families. 🛑 And now Schumer is plotting to claw back just FOUR seats to seize the Senate and bring it all back. If he succeeds, Schumer will pack the Supreme Court , kill the filibuster , and ram through his Radical Left agenda. Mike isn't some polished politician. He's a trucker, a fighter, and one of the most effective America First voices in Congress. 🔴 Mike will SECURE the border. 🔴 He'll REBUILD our economy. 🔴 And he'll STAND UP to Schumer's Radical Left machine. But here 's the truth: ** Mike doesn't have Hollywood elites or Silicon Valley billionaires behind him. He has YOU. Every dollar COUNTS. Every donation MATTERS. Because if Georgia stays blue, Schumer takes the Senate. Will you rush a donation right now and help Mike Collins FLIP GEORGIA RED? Time is short. The stakes are MASSIVE. Let's flip Georgia. Let's hold the line. Let's stop Schumer. | ---|--- | | ** For America, Congressman Derrick Van Orden | | | | | | PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE | | PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622**

During August, Trump also displayed some of his worst authoritarian tendencies to date. He called for mid-decade gerrymandering, he dispatched troops to the streets of an American city, and he continued his attacks on the free press. name: Team Fetterman
subject: RFK Jr.’s mess at HHS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)
Hey Derek,
---
Things got heated last week when the Senate Finance Committee grilled Health Secretary RFK Jr. And for good reason.
CDC chaos. Top health experts pushed out. A vaccine policy that cuts access right before flu season. And a handpicked crew of anti-vaxxers calling the shots.
**It’s reckless. It’s dangerous. And we need to know where you stand.**
So if you missed it, we wanted to bump our note from last week. **[Will you please let us know if you think RFK Jr. is the right person to run the nation’s health system?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51630?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk246-su-fl&t=2&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)**
– Team Fetterman 💛
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Fetterman** Date: Thu, Sep 4, 2025
Subject: re: RFK Jr.
| | |
---
Hey Derek,
We need to check in about what's happening at the Department of Health and Human Services:
**LAST WEEK:** Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. fired the newly confirmed CDC director. Her offense? Refusing to cave and sign off on sweeping new vaccine restrictions.
**YESTERDAY:** Over 1,000 current and former HHS employees sent a blistering letter calling for RFK Jr.'s resignation. Their message? Between funding cuts and dangerous anti-vaccine theories, his leadership is putting lives at risk.

**SO TODAY:** RFK Jr. was grilled by the Senate Finance Committee because he's been pushing HHS into turmoil and terrorizing public health.
John Fetterman voted **NO** on RFK Jr.'s confirmation way back in February. He stands with the scientists and public health officials at HHS who are trying to protect American families – while RFK Jr. plays politics with their work.
**So we need to know where you stand in the midst of all of this. We need at least 5,000 responses before our poll closes at midnight, so please respond now:**
**Do you approve of RFK Jr.?**
| | | [YES](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51630?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk246-su-fl&t=3&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)
---
| [NO](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51630?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk246-su-fl&t=4&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)
---
Thanks for your response.
– Team Fetterman 💛
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk246-su-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10303_434096_xk5Cp5&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=10303%2E434096%2Exk5Cp5)

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: September 9th Bolick Brief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
http://www.BolickforArizona.com?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID

Good evening, friends!

It’s hard to believe we’re already in September! While the Valley continues to enjoy warm temperatures, we’re just four months away from the start of the next legislative session.

Here's what I've been up to recently:

** 🏫 Supporting Students Through School Choice
------------------------------------------------------------

Last week, I visited IntelliSchool (https://intellischool.org/credit-recovery/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) , a charter high school in our district that serves students from diverse backgrounds. Each student receives a personalized academic plan, allowing them to progress at their own pace—an essential support system, especially in the aftermath of COVID-related learning disruptions and chronic absenteeism

Throughout the year, IntelliSchool helps students across Arizona get back on track to graduate. This is a powerful example of how school choice continues to empower students to reach their goals.

**
⚖️ Senate Ethics Committee Update
------------------------------------------------------------

On September 2nd, an ethics complaint was filed against a fellow senator. As Chair of the Senate Ethics Committee, I issued a formal press release regarding the matter.
📄 Read the official statement here (https://www.azsenaterepublicans.gov/post/senate-ethics-committee-chairwoman-takes-action-on-complaint-against-senator-ortiz-refers-to-u-s-a?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

**
⚾ Celebrating 30 More Years of Baseball in Arizona
------------------------------------------------------------

I was honored to attend the commemorative bill signing ceremony (http://file///Users/Shawnna/Desktop/Check?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID out this gallery from AZCentral: Katie Hobbs signs bill to keep Arizona Diamondbacks in Phoenix https:/www.azcentral.com/picture-gallery/news/politics/arizona/2025/09/03/katie-hobbs-dbacks-bill-signed-photos/85961479007) at Chase Field, securing 30 more years of Arizona Diamondbacks baseball. We heard from countless supporters who wanted to keep the team in Arizona. Let’s play ball—and bring home another trophy!

**
🎓 Civic Engagement at Grand Canyon University
------------------------------------------------------------

I met with undergraduate honors students from GCU’s Canyon Civic Institute (https://www.gcuhonors.org/canyon-civic-institute?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) , who are preparing to be future leaders in government and law. It’s inspiring to see their commitment to civic engagement and discourse and public service.

**
🏛️ Preparing for the 2026 Legislative Session
------------------------------------------------------------

I continue to meet with constituents—both in person and over the phone—to discuss bill ideas for 2026. We’ve been reviewing various sections of Arizona’s statutes, including updates to our human trafficking laws. Public safety remains a top priority for me each legislative session.

As Chair of the Senate Committee on Regulatory Affairs and Government Efficiency, I’m also working with stakeholders to identify ways to reduce unnecessary red tape, especially for small business owners.

**
📉 NAEP 2024 Results: A Call to Action
------------------------------------------------------------

The National Assessment of Educational Progress (NAEP) 2024 results were released today, showing sharp declines in math (https://www.nationsreportcard.gov/reports/mathematics/2024/g12/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) and reading (https://www.nationsreportcard.gov/reports/reading/2024/g12/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) scores for 12th graders, and science (https://www.nationsreportcard.gov/reports/science/2024/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) scores for 8th graders. Thankfully, Arizona offers a wide range of educational options. I encourage families to review these results and consider making adjustments to ensure their children are on the path to success.

For more information about this national report card, you can learn more about NAEP
here (https://www.nationsreportcard.gov/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

📰 Bolick in the News
* Independent Correctional Oversight Office read here (https://azfreenews.com/2025/09/arizona-lawmakers-say-prison-safety-reforms-arrive-too-late-for-dozens-of-inmates/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* Bolick to Revive School Safety Legislation read A (https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/09/01/senator-plans-to-revive-school-safety-bill-after-fatal-stabbing/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID&mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) rizona Capitol Times (https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/09/01/senator-plans-to-revive-school-safety-bill-after-fatal-stabbing/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID&mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) and SW Valley Times (https://swvalleytimes.com/category/local-government/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
* Bolick Refers Complaint to US Attorney's Office
Read more at
AZ Free News (https://azfreenews.com/2025/09/sen-bolick-refers-complaint-against-sen-ortiz-to-u-s-attorneys-office/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Arizona Capitol Times (https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/09/06/gop-leadership-threatens-ortiz-with-expulsion-over-ice-posts/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Just the News (https://justthenews.com/government/state-houses/gop-arizona-state-senator-files-ethics-complaint-against-democrat-sharing?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

🗳️ Help Place My Name on the 2026 Republican Primary Ballot

As many of you may know, I was involved in a car accident at the end of June. I’ve spent the past few weeks focusing on healing and physical therapy, and I’m grateful for the support and well wishes I’ve received.

Now, I’m turning my attention back to serving our community—and I need your help.

If you reside in the following zip codes, there is a good chance I represent you at the state capitol: 85022, 85023, 85024, 85027, 85029, 85032, 85050, 85053, 85085, 85308, 85310, or 85331.

Please take a moment to sign my secure online nomination petition to ensure my name appears on the August 4, 2026, Republican primary ballot.

👉 Click here (https://go.azsos.gov/z9xl?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) to sign the petition

Your support means the world to me, and I’m excited to continue working on behalf of our legislative district.
Sign My Petition (https://go.azsos.gov/z9xl?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

🗳️ Help Us Keep This Seat — Support Our Campaign Today

As you may know, I will need to raise a significant amount of resources to retain this highly competitive State Senate seat. Your support is critical to helping us continue the work we’ve started and to ensure our community’s voice remains strong at the Capitol.

If you are so inclined, please consider making a contribution to our campaign today.

👉 Donate (https://secure.anedot.com/vote-bolick-statesenateld2/donate?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID) Now

Thank you for staying engaged. I look forward to continuing our work together to make Arizona stronger, safer, and more efficient.

Warm regards,
Shawnna
Donate (https://secure.anedot.com/vote-bolick-statesenateld2/donate?exitIntent=true&mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)

============================================================
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/ShawnnaLMBolick?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/Bolick4Arizona?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Website (https://www.bolickforarizona.com/?mc_cid=e59e9b6a1e&mc_eid=UNIQID)
PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK.
AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK.
Copyright © 2025 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved.

If you want to mail a donation, our mailing address is:
Shawnna Bolick
c/o Vote Bolick
610 E. Bell Road 2-142
Phoenix, AZ 85022

subject: This is the Final Push: less than 2 weeks until early voting begins!

body:
We are down to the wire. In less than two weeks, early voting begins in Virginia! | | | **** Friend,
We are down to the wire. **_In less than two weeks, early voting begins in Virginia_**** _._** That means voters will start making their choices — and we need to be ready on day one. But our MAGA extremist billionaire opponents are already pouring money into this race so they can defeat me. They’re spending BIG to end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. **_We cannot afford to fall behind — all of America is watching for Virginia’s results as a bellwether for next year’s midterms.

clean_body: We are down to the wire. In less than two weeks, early voting begins in Virginia! | | | ** Friend, We are down to the wire. In less than two weeks, early voting begins in Virginia** . That means voters will start making their choices — and we need to be ready on day one. But our MAGA extremist billionaire opponents are already pouring money into this race so they can defeat me. They’re spending BIG to end the 51-49 Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. We cannot afford to fall behind — all of America is watching for Virginia’s results as a bellwether for next year’s midterms. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Mom-of-four, social worker, and union leader Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to WIN. Together, we can make sure Virginia and America moves forward — not backward. Let’s finish this strong! With gratitude, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

subject: Focusing On Fiscal Responsibility
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer
body:
As Vice Chair of the House Finance Committee, I understand how important fiscal responsibility is. I have worked on key legislation during my time in office to help reduce Coloradans’ financial burdens, and I want to continue this work as the next State Treasurer. | | |

I have worked on key legislation during my time in office to help reduce Coloradans’ financial burdens, and I want to continue this work as the next State Treasurer. _**If elected, I want to ensure taxpayer dollars are managed responsibly, openly, and efficiently.**_**[Help us get there by making a donation to my campaign today.](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/oUDwk8qc9IIcboVAb3zzLSYuFs0cLugc6dmASCWLHzWcLdigrgl71IDFxei02U0jPZAraBOFcR4DNB14bYsW5EnLFKWkOdPQEu7AvAp9r0-lCnc8ABNbfK_hxPprj5nvZpf-zJHr4DKTS0az3k4djoN1MfUe-fxBqMv6u0xMK2lbiDv4ZqvKs1FSN_XCVpQPnuY6kTvrAy0d2TJz0IuuTPBrAbCZdNaaZ4XCiJmhRZMjjE3Ru2NBEu9oLatlBjQoS3Zy0PVawc3WwVrOPZoG8leEfxEGCiS0NbUZleWleIGnm4fwNRnlq4m1b8XUXN1SeI9gHFNRz9Mq4VAmK5H-1cMX4B6fNfWCiGrFIcMcUyTYM5RMk2ju21XXJsVsieIdRiEuy8dfDJmBO7V2z4XRcsjjZDJLVs4JYZK6kgfTZF-kUcI66jU4jQmyfL7Rl-Ifmv0ufS9CBCvvbGnQskmYJ0Kplb-3QHpXEcFePndvOLkQaLCvjAU0WB4KRTSwCyZrCr8P9c4fuLngMmBrLfBwPLgDv2EJFc3W19VzWyPAq7b2nfSbNS0ew0cqXcBqUer-tNleszqYRMZdnCrWbD6zdk31w7N1IlC13tMxcN8vyzwNVXaODa8aT-k8N4lOEjKugL6cdhiwcbtKRbr9zPv0yofHL5eD863AlBQHkYaGFlfVZzFNW3WX82EOed6fzLVwohnQNhMz6w6_Bdz72bQw4MhPMvicQA6kKwnkqHyJtKeE5vfrfGds_cZ5taFyOyZ9vnf1ALuV6y1RqjZpiLrEwt84_1VieEzjJjR7TYrrlAB0fQ_R0ulu_G0VIF29MEkLRmoX2HLhGqhUksIpZ0bBIHWraMyrFEvpDVegqzdt_cdfPnvy5tyI6oHIZcizgw5bAIeGe4hYNXiLJH3h-7j_OsiD88CcJGBoC7hevTHnvh8_-TcCUSmidYj1/D8bbGyxYuCwQSKkfM8Bz7TioUjgRYxQX/12)** We’re seeing economic uncertainty in our country. Just recently, Donald Trump declared he’s moving Space Command from Colorado to Alabama, which will take 1,700 jobs away from our state. Defense officials previously estimated that moving Space Command will cost hundreds of millions of dollars to complete. This is a waste of taxpayers dollars. I have championed **Limit on Rental Applications Fees** , which puts a cap on rental application fees, and **Price Gouging Protections** , which protects consumers from exploitative pricing during emergencies. clean_body: As Vice Chair of the House Finance Committee, I understand how important fiscal responsibility is. I have worked on key legislation during my time in office to help reduce Coloradans’ financial burdens, and I want to continue this work as the next State Treasurer. | | | Peter, As Vice Chair of the House Finance Committee, I understand how important fiscal responsibility is. I have worked on key legislation during my time in office to help reduce Coloradans’ financial burdens, and I want to continue this work as the next State Treasurer. If elected, I want to ensure taxpayer dollars are managed responsibly, openly, and efficiently. We’re seeing economic uncertainty in our country. Just recently, Donald Trump declared he’s moving Space Command from Colorado to Alabama, which will take 1,700 jobs away from our state. Defense officials previously estimated that moving Space Command will cost hundreds of millions of dollars to complete. This is a waste of taxpayers dollars. I have championed Limit on Rental Applications Fees , which puts a cap on rental application fees, and Price Gouging Protections , which protects consumers from exploitative pricing during emergencies. I’m running for State Treasurer to ensure fiscal responsibility for every Coloradan, and my track record proves it. **** ** ** ** ** ******************** **** Thanks so much, Brianna Fighting for working families, consumer protections, and small businesses in the House of Representatives has been the honor of Brianna's lifetime. Brianna is running to be your next Colorado State Treasurer to support small businesses, and fight hard to save hard-working Coloradans money. ****** Follow Brianna Online: ** Paid for by Brianna for Treasurer. Registered Agent Brianna Titone.

subject: Trump's Distastrous Economy — Help Us Fight Back

body:
The latest jobs report was a disaster — the worst in nearly four years. | | | Friend,
The latest jobs report is a disaster. As The New York Times reported, only 22,000 jobs were created in August — and unemployment spiked to 4.3% —the worst in nearly four years. Behind those numbers are families losing paychecks, bills piling up, and entire communities on edge. clean_body: The latest jobs report was a disaster — the worst in nearly four years. | | | Friend, The latest jobs report is a disaster. As The New York Times reported, only 22,000 jobs were created in August — and unemployment spiked to 4.3% —the worst in nearly four years. Behind those numbers are families losing paychecks, bills piling up, and entire communities on edge. ’s no other way to look at it: this is Trump’s disastrous economy at work. ****** Trump’s economy is sputtering, and MAGA politicians are still pushing the same failed trickle-down policies—tax breaks for the rich, while ordinary families scrape by. That’s not just unfair. It’s dangerous. Cedar Key Progress is mobilizing to demand real investment in jobs, wages, and relief. But the scale of this crisis means we need every supporter in the fight. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. In solidarity, The Cedar Key Progress Team P.S. This isn’t a blip. The numbers show a dangerous slide. ** | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. GOA Victory Fund endorsed pro-gun patriot Brandon Herrera. **_[_Will you?_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpge8hommjoqk8jvvjlj2vkast9mej7d1en3dq0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5ie1ob6clh2bs)_**
---
[ **YES! I'LL ENDORSE BRANDON** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gbcbatoq9u9rq30shr4tb88i7uavmui4pbn17g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
| | Friend, The battle for our Second Amendment is reaching a breaking point. The anti-gun lobby will stop at nothing to flip Congress and trample our God-given rights. That’s why I’m writing you today, because the future of gun rights in America depends on what we do next. We have a game-changing opportunity: Electing Brandon Herrera to the U.S. House of Representatives. Brandon is a relentless champion for the Second Amendment. He doesn’t just talk about standing up for gun owners—he lives it, fights for it, and bleeds for it. **But make no mistake: The Washington elite, anti-gun billionaires, and their media allies are targeting this race because they know how critical it is.** If we lose our pro-gun majority, the gun grabbers will:
* Ram through unconstitutional gun bans and Red Flag confiscation laws
* Shut down firearms manufacturers
* Cripple your right to self-defense

_**[Friend, I’m asking you to join me and the entire GOA Victory Fund team in endorsing Brandon Herrera.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2msoai1eia0to4c776a6ra5naoj6ats6ns5dg3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5ie1ob6clh2bs) **_
---
[ **SIGN TO ENDORSE BRANDON HERRERA** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze9icaoj6mvcip2f7b8oq365ffs0obgl4nsu6mcg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5ie1ob6clh2bs)
---
| | -GOA Victory Fund Team
---
_P.S. We need every passionate gun rights supporter to step up right here, right now, to endorse Brandon Herrera and show the gun control movement we will NOT back down!_[_**_Click here to add your name today._**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97a6ipafchtrn827sb1dn26qa74nsikjvr880v8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c5ie1ob6clh2bs)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The left is creating a generation of confused and fearful children
body:
If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.

| | |
---
| | Fellow conservative,I know you’ve seen how the Left is creating a generation of fearful and confused children. And some of the worst culprits in this ungodly indoctrination are at your very own local library!Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian.She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbiro7dqdukd5vasiqa7gvsk8cm38lm1nv7l7kng_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg517oo51risqo31ie0f4c3beni2bjkmdav5v4c0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zetjk7uvfura12avlvuq9b1porh4khf1oc7l60k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z00l1lgvj4kins771724gsk96uto080ukmrj8rn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg4h8bdr3q0v27rb4qmh0phusimqfouadcvg3qo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg6qu2s288c5a57eqku6u4bhdb08rkehgi1djgkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkr2bebaggu74rl71hkctluap0tav4rcivqh74bg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc0oo3vondri4d731b08t8kgp3av2dbkem4lq93g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zeumujhehcqm4ss09aqksocqt6lh0uf433idtic8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z67ktriqjl7293fs8je7pijqubefinulc523qhbg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)_**
---
[ **DONATE ** ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zef9dgmuicbd2tduoanvu9ssr9drrqf6cfj5rlio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm2o2b1udq4rlt5ccsh00h4kvh3iq0o0cl70tt18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36c5h2bs)
---
**Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 ****
---
|

---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA.And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming. We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values![**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs73g6p61vj3moqidqtrlhah5ipqautu7d8gu77g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36clh2bs) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own.So **BRAVE Books** has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries.Now with the guidance of **BRAVE Books** , committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. And whenever we can, **BRAVE Books** authors like swimmer **Riley Gaines** , TV personality **Missy Robertson** , and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries. 2025 was the third year of “See You at the Library” and I’m proud to say that because of the amazing support of patriots like you, we were invited by President Trump’s DOE to kick off our event at the Library of Congress!What a testimony it was to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to children and families in the heart of our nation’s capital. Now we have a new and historic goal for 2026 – the 250th birthday of our nation! We aim to reach 250,000 children in the next year.But we can’t do it without you. __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $125 or more today..._..](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsn7j1g9fvo9ifg7oe9vi6u8vdc9os58u58og95o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36clh2bs)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 250,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $125._](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5k343e5shusarihf39l9qsal2i40ea2tn863q0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36clh2bs)** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself.Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmt1ok3iskh23l2t88ctjm8u2438du8up3cq19i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64o36clh2bs)_**

---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
---
Kirk Cameron

subject: Judge Approves $25M Vanguard Settlement Over Mutual Fund Tax Dispute
body:

U.S. District Judge John Murphy in Philadelphia granted preliminary approval on Monday, calling the settlement sufficiently fair, reasonable, and adequate, after rejecting a $40 million [...]...Click to read more | [](http://trk.libertyledger._ZD01In0/xaUdo-JJ5fA1CukeGZjOkg)

# **[Postal Traffic To US Drops 80% After End Of Duty-Free Shipping](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Postal traffic to the U.S. plummeted 80% after President Donald Trump suspended the duty-free de minimis exemption on Aug. 29. The Universal Postal Union, the United Nation’s specialized agency for global postal cooperation, reported the decline. The data, exchanged between postal operators via the UPU’s electronic network, showed that traffic from UPU member countries to [...]...Click to read more

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Join me in supporting Winsome Earle-Sears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I come from a family that never had it easy.

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztb5ts1bbd89e0q8k2jk4ribi97csb4n3o0dh8mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs) Friend,
As a first-generation American, I know what it means to be the product of hardworking immigrant parents who sacrificed everything for their children to succeed.[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6tbgajdc8dv7542243jrsds1kf24sqjmfkpu880_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)My family and I at my graduation from HarvardI come from a family that never had it easy. But like so many other immigrants and blue-collar workers in America, no hardship could get my parents down. When things got tough, they'd hunker down and keep pursuing the American Dream.[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zooae2g50rmviqrqf55fp7rtggag5ptmta8kqsog_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)Winsome in her Marine uniformWinsome Earle-Sears's story is similar. Her dad came to America from Jamaica with $1.75 in his pocket and worked blue-collar jobs to build a life for Winsome and the rest of his family. She became a Marine, a small business owner, and the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia.
Winsome is a shining example of what it means to be a victor and not a victim. It would've been easy for her - or her parents - to blame their race for all of their hardships and choose to rely on the government rather than pave their own way in a new country. Instead, she and her dad are a reminder that the American Dream is alive and well - as long as we're willing to work for it.
[Join me in supporting Winsome for Governor so she can keep making sure the American Dream is available to everyone - no matter what's in their wallet or the color of their skin:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoleh44c6j8dnmno2loqeeoddlka7ortsa3drm50_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE $25
](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbhd7gl5pt55o9r7b8vbka8sql05hkh1jn0l76d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE $35
](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9iqva5ksr3pt0t2u8r2oeb6hpqfo47msjr3qupo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE $50
](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl44vbkrbdmc1jddmb9bavc9r1tomqgtpiq3noh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE $100
](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk7c89vhgnf6jeia1kr2i5pfd9opbarqujfi3n8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE NOW >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za3ng1kkukd9hous3fogitp2lcl1gjheg3vcr8p0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)I'm supporting Winsome because we need more people in politics who understand what it means to fight for opportunity, and who will work tirelessly to make sure the American Dream is within reach for everyone.
Both of our parents knew what it meant to work hard, especially to make sure their kids had more opportunities than were available to them. Now, we're both running for Governor in this amazing country, which is something our parents never could have dreamed of.
[Donate so that this American Dream we inherited is protected for the next generation and generations to come:](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zuoga1gtaitmlvns317qe1emeecfp9l9sg8actno_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)[DONATE NOW >>
](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgd923eeqds9r28jtqishv0akh3hvq8efi23ug0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)Together, we can do this.
Sincerely,Vivek Ramaswamy
* * *
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z80deihomfrbjd0l3r2u6n0jmrfs7gfe41vcd7b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7clg64p74c9h2bs)Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge.
