Border Czar Tom Homan **[lost his temper at Morning Joe co-host Mika Brzezinksi](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e54f5a-98d4-4ddc-8ab6-ec6ecac00fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she repeatedly suggested he is arresting innocent people across America rather than criminal illegal migrants.
"Mayor Wu and Gov. Healey ought to be calling ICE and thanking them for making their communities safer!" Homan went off.
"You used the term 'disappearing people,' that's disgusting!!"
**[Watch the tense live clash here:](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e54f5a-98d4-4ddc-8ab6-ec6ecac00fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e54f5a-98d4-4ddc-8ab6-ec6ecac00fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d9e54f5a-98d4-4ddc-8ab6-ec6ecac00fc0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Ifrah Law](https://substack.com/redirect/8edfaf11-f759-4ef4-9350-e99aa89243b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Ifrah Law heightens the success of iGaming clients through every phase of their business cycle**
Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/8edfaf11-f759-4ef4-9350-e99aa89243b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8edfaf11-f759-4ef4-9350-e99aa89243b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/8edfaf11-f759-4ef4-9350-e99aa89243b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
### _No Loyalty!_
# Kamala Harris BLASTS Biden's run for reelection as "reckless" and "ego" -driven
Former Vice President Kamala Harris **[harshly criticized President Biden's decision](https://substack.com/redirect/3a80ee5c-d8e5-48fa-b63b-d868a6fac814?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to run for reelection in her upcoming memoir "107 Days," calling it "recklessness" and arguing the choice "should not have been left to an individual's ego" given the high stakes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3a80ee5c-d8e5-48fa-b63b-d868a6fac814?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **White House Dynamics:** Harris accused Biden's staff of undermining her by failing to defend her against attacks and "adding fuel to negative narratives" about her, suggesting they viewed her success as diminishing Biden's standing rather than supporting it.
* **Loyalty vs. Action:** While defending her decision not to pressure Biden to drop out earlier as "loyalty," Harris admitted she was in the "worst position" to make that case since it would appear "self-serving" and like "naked ambition" coming from her.
* **Biden's Capacity:** Harris maintained that Biden was competent to serve as president but acknowledged he "got tired" at age 81, leading to "physical and verbal stumbles," particularly noting the poor debate performance against Donald Trump came after extensive travel to Europe and a West Coast fundraiser.

* * *
# Charlotte Democrat mayor wins primary after horrific stabbing in her city makes national headlines
Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles **[won Tuesday's Democratic mayoral primary](https://substack.com/redirect/1c1dd025-7833-4431-b19e-528f31226bb6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** despite facing criticism over her response to the stabbing death of Ukrainian refugee Iryna Zarutska on a city light-rail train last month by suspect Decarlos Brown Jr., who has 14 arrests over 12 years.
* **National Political Impact:** President Donald Trump attacked Democrats for being "soft on crime," claiming the victim's "blood is on the hands of the Democrats who refuse to put bad people in jail" and also blaming former Democratic Governor Roy Cooper, who is running for Senate in 2026.
* **Federal Charges Added:** The Department of Justice announced federal charges against Brown on Tuesday for committing an act causing death on a mass transportation system, in addition to the existing state first-degree murder charge, as the gruesome security video went viral and sparked national attention.
* **General Election Setup:** Lyles, Charlotte's first Black female mayor, now faces Republican nominee Terrie Donovan in the general election in the Democrat-dominated city, with crime becoming a central campaign issue even before the high-profile killing occurred.

* * *
# ICE agents retreat with slashed tires after standoff with protesters and suspected illegals
ICE and CBP agents arrived at a Rochester, New York home to detain suspected undocumented workers, but while one roofer was taken into custody, others refused to come down from the roof, **[leading to a four-hour standoff.](https://substack.com/redirect/f7608e96-1391-425f-af1b-752268606f05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/58231b65-e5ee-4095-8d3a-6cc2fd0bad61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_(Video from @rachbarnhart on X)_
* **Violent Protest Response:** More than 100 protesters gathered at the scene, chanting "shame" and calling agents "gestapo," with the confrontation escalating when protesters allegedly slashed the tires of a CBP vehicle, forcing agents to retreat and eventually abandon their operation.
* **Sanctuary City Context:** The incident occurred in Rochester, which recently voted unanimously to codify its sanctuary city policy, with the Western New York Coalition of Farmworker Serving Agencies helping to mediate the standoff and advocating for immigrant workers' rights.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: We are being outraised and outspent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Direct and honest:

**Direct and honest:**
We are being out-raised by our opponents, and last week we were outspent on television.
If we want to win, we cannot risk falling behind even more.
Now it absolutely stinks that our opponents can fund their campaign exclusively from one person writing multiple $10 million checks and Mike Johnson giving millions more...
But the reality is that if we want to win, we have to close the fundraising gap one way or another. This may be California, but the polling shows this will be incredibly close and if we continue to be outspent we can lose. Easily.
And if that happens, Trump has an even larger House majority than he did this cycle, and no check on his power for this final two years.
In less than one week we will make another set of spending decisions about what we can afford to do, and what we can't.
So if you have been waiting to make another contribution to help stop Trump from rigging the next election before a single vote is cast, here's the ask:
[**Can Gavin Newsom and Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute today to help Gavin Newsom pass the Election Rigging Response Act? Our average donation is around $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that lots and lots of people are giving today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250910&refcode2=2534_4767699_glWp_x&akid=2534%2E4767699%2EglWp_x)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/16e6a8bc-a80a-4a7d-8095-deed37dea918?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The principles of lower taxes that have driven national economic revivals are equally vital at the local level. Mayors, county supervisors, and city councils should prioritize tax reductions not as optional reforms but as essential strategies for fostering prosperity, attracting investment, and enhancing community well-being. High local taxes--particularly property, sales, and business levies--often deter growth, while cuts create a virtuous cycle of expansion. By applying supply-side economics locally, governments can stimulate private sector activity, broaden their revenue base, and reduce reliance on inefficient spending.
Economically, lower local taxes boost competitiveness. Cities and counties with reduced burdens become magnets for businesses and residents fleeing high-tax areas. For instance, Nashville, Tennessee, cut property tax rates in the 1990s and invested in infrastructure, leading to a population increase of 30% and a thriving music and healthcare economy.
Examples such as Nashville, illustrate the Laffer Curve in action: lower rates expand the tax base through increased economic activity, often yielding higher revenues. Arthur Laffer noted, "Too high a tax rate causes revenue to fall insofar as it makes the economy weaker." At the local level, this means property values rise as more people and firms relocate, offsetting initial cuts. High local taxes, conversely, stifle innovation and exacerbate inequality. They impose deadweight losses, discouraging homeownership, small business starts, and investment. In high-tax cities like San Francisco and New York, residents and companies have migrated to lower-tax locales, leading to budget shortfalls and service cuts.
Milton Friedman argued that taxes reduce incentives: "High taxes... discourage the productive use of resources." Locally, this translates to fewer jobs and slower wage growth. Ronald Reagan, who championed federal cuts, extended the logic: "The problem is not that people are taxed too little, the problem is that government spends too much."
Local officials often overspend on bureaucracies, but lower taxes force fiscal discipline, prioritizing essential services like public safety over wasteful projects. From a libertarian perspective, Murray Rothbard viewed all taxation as coercive, stating, "Taxation is theft... on a grand and colossal scale." At the local level, where taxes fund visible services, reductions empower individuals, allowing voluntary spending on community needs. Studies show that targeted local tax cuts, like those in Opportunity Zones under the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act, have revitalized distressed areas by attracting billions in investment, creating jobs in rural and urban neighborhoods alike.
Critics claim cuts favor the wealthy, but evidence shows broader benefits: lower taxes correlate with reduced unemployment and higher median incomes.
Detroit's revival, aided by property tax reforms post-bankruptcy, transformed it into a top startup hub, with population stabilizing and investment soaring.
Local leaders should follow suit to avoid stagnation, as seen in high-tax states like Illinois, where out-migration hampers growth.
In summary, lower tax policies at the local level unleash entrepreneurship, enhance fiscal health, and promote liberty. By heeding thinkers like Friedman, Reagan, and Rothbard, mayors and supervisors can build thriving communities where growth benefits all, proving that less taxation truly means more prosperity.

body:
This one will leave Washington scrambling as skeletons will be dragged kicking and screaming from the closet that they thought they had locked up tight.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1305305/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YveHNUbjlRdkZFRQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTA/LbmNsd0VCSU5nRA/qP2hpZHM9bmNBQmxGNEVNdTA2ZW9scw/gaMF8Dw/s8p390095ee)

| | | | [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Dear Patriot,

My team and I at OMG have been working non-stop to bring you our next major investigation.

This one will leave Washington scrambling as skeletons will be dragged kicking and screaming from the closet that they thought they had locked up tight.

The story has already made an impact, before we even released it, and I'll be reporting on that as well.

As we work, I need your help to keep the lights on and my small staff paid. [**Please, help us keep going by donating as much as you can today.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

This big story is one we ALMOST missed.

It came in from the thousands of tips OMG receives and was encrypted in a single file that we almost overlooked. I had to dedicate a team to the source to verify the file, then spend thousands of dollars on research to validate every detail before we chose to put it into production.

OMG does more work to make sure our stories are fair and accurate than the sloppy work the MSM does in their rush for news each day.

And they’re supported by the biggest advertisers in the world. OMG is supported by you and a handful of generous Americans who value the truth. [**And your backing is needed now, more than ever.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Please [**donate to help us finish this story and start working on the next one**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

Our tip lines are overflowing with dark stories that we have an obligation to review. Still, with limited time and resources, [**we can't keep up without your help**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

By donating, [**you’ll be among the first to receive our next investigation**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.), along with my personal updates throughout the week. You'll be kept "in the know" with as much as I can reveal before a release.

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for all that you do, and please, [**donate to stay informed of our work**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

In Truth,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. Our latest story has already made an impact, even before its release. However, we must complete the job and cover our expenses. [**Please donate what you can today to help us wrap this up and move on to the next big story**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.).

AI threatens millions of American jobs — it’s time to fight back.| | |

| | Big Tech has run roughshod over modern civilization — and they’re just getting started. Smartphones addict our children. Social media tracks our every click, pause, purchase, and preference.
Every so-called “innovation” has been nothing more than a power grab — always from us, straight into their hands. **[[FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIG TECH’S ABUSE]](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/kuV5fAfGDHGmWkNZqEa2vxjaZ0hIGrXmDb5qJoSyXhPIGGnhmKQb7lg4qffx7dN86kF5XqgCN8KfgmKH2BKsfB6VaEcgIdu5DMHAbfaB_e0kIrnwtOS1ai0tEIgNxp8X2WZAQOQIk_MzSXB8UaNkbu91qjCJiUUh0dmqI0gVeQmbjp6c_jpNizW-exF0esyRRVbXuMTojxN0SDzNdR84fdKTwgXpYzbShqVA2ZzqcLr13EWZyaWZWHl69fwNoiaIODkc8k9uEO7ZBgm1WolDiQrgUe_V3gRIxFM07AYwBt3P64VzgcaYPBxeo9TRrfM9g-LGW2RXH_dRId0y67-ALzgHY-tlpd5osqtiNTnAquVNiDqqRcFHloa9sFiZxz1n7_VIyAhmj9Zem665-FTABl7ZyR7C2eyd4LzGFQkLENJa0VzXdAqC7mIoznklD2PaoFQ0uoha0oFPJb7uwe8YJ8TVmNXp0Zs/30oMGCfQWNvsMnoTc8FZSa3AytDo0aIB/12)** But now, the tech elite has turned with rabid enthusiasm to artificial intelligence. And make no mistake: this isn’t about helping Americans — it’s about replacing them. _**AI-powered robots threaten to automate entire industries.**_
* **Truckers** : over 3.5 million jobs gone overnight with self-driving vehicles.
* **Delivery drivers and taxi workers** : millions more displaced.
* **Bank tellers, customer service reps, entry-level workers** : eliminated in the name of “efficiency.”

[**[FIGHT TO SAVE THE AMERICAN WORKER]**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/Iy_S5ZIukWlDH49mn7V3L-pniEC9NWZ9CoEToTggQxJREio5pHmQ4TlXk0jCR6IqqEuFGqgBgzbV_j9TKcqq4LaOHsKYYRGsG2SOMj0o8l4uAoQ9zFcDAvY3tAL7i8-dN9XRSwjYygf7epRfMW7bcv9euE9GGIiu2fDuEF7tQ4ZQHC5vyUnxedx_3Igwyri1vK73_pDS028FfJ3_Jzjul3WouFG3F0SJEfHOi8yVZ7tRGWTko4b6MusGxQH0MVuGaks8Jg5ORiCLyQy7GlxRXxYSVExgINm7l57mlYKVCK6mjP9_9MdfG_Lsy26s94nVRo3NW14kkoA31wMbOyYtDsOgUg8cj3iFGE3LKWxUxEqANTRE7UwM9Kh_Y5ir3kVmSJf7pR24o1dsEO6g9HHoiuzOR9Ch3jeKR1bHkZvAeyix-rGGTwnDOwiy03KXi06NqzAn1U78zl-dB1AIreWEcb0w29Yc4ok/HulNILIQUm3QEb10W7xlvyUex1PDvrgA/12) We must put the lives of American workers AHEAD of technology. AI should empower Americans — not destroy their rights, their jobs, or their future.

clean_body: AI threatens millions of American jobs — it’s time to fight back.| | | | | | | Big Tech has run roughshod over modern civilization — and they’re just getting started. Smartphones addict our children. Social media tracks our every click, pause, purchase, and preference. Every so-called “innovation” has been nothing more than a power grab — always from us, straight into their hands. [[FIGHT BACK AGAINST BIG TECH’S ABUSE]]() But now, the tech elite has turned with rabid enthusiasm to artificial intelligence. And make no mistake: this isn’t about helping Americans — it’s about replacing them. AI-powered robots threaten to automate entire industries. Truckers : over 3.5 million jobs gone overnight with self-driving vehicles. Delivery drivers and taxi workers : millions more displaced. Bank tellers, customer service reps, entry-level workers : eliminated in the name of “efficiency.” [[FIGHT TO SAVE THE AMERICAN WORKER]**]() We must put the lives of American workers AHEAD of technology. AI should empower Americans — not destroy their rights, their jobs, or their future. | | In Liberty, Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: Haley Stevens
subject: This is why I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
I’m ready to fight for the people that I love in the state that I love
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5799?t=2&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5800?t=3&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
null – see that little girl in the photo? That’s me! Way before I had the honor of serving Michiganders in Congress and launching this battleground campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator. I was about 12 or 13 years old there.
But don’t be fooled by school picture day (_and my trendy beaded necklace_). Growing up as the daughter of small-business owners – Mom and Dad had their own landscaping business – I was always around a lot of dirt, grease, grime, and heavy machinery. **I wouldn’t have had it any other way.**
My parents taught me the value of hard work – a value that binds all of us in Michigan together. After all, we’re the state that built America. The state that built the middle class.
In fact, do you know what one of my favorite memories is from growing up? When I got the keys to my first car, a used Oldsmobile Cutlass Supreme. That car represented the newfound freedom of teenage years. **But it was more to me than just that – it also meant I had a piece of Michigan.**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5800?t=4&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
I love Michigan. I love the people here. And I love that I’ve been able to fight for my state in Congress. But as I’ve traveled our state recently, it’s clear that the people I love are afraid. They’re afraid because of the chaos and uncertainty that Donald Trump and the GOP are inflicting upon our nation.
All across our state, I hear concerns about rising costs, fear of uncertainty in our auto industry, and worries about the future of Social Security and Medicare. And you better believe people are outright disturbed by Trump’s attacks on our democracy and personal freedoms. **This fear, uncertainty, and chaos – all of it is**** _unacceptable._**
That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. I’m ready to fight for the people I love and help block Trump’s dangerous agenda. But the path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan – and this battleground race is being called a “Toss Up” by elections experts.
**null, I need****your support to continue reaching out to voters and win in Michigan. [ _Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my grassroots campaign?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5800?t=5&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5801?t=6&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5802?t=7&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5803?t=8&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5800?t=9&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5804?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5799?t=11&akid=812%2E49239%2EcjJ0T1)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

subject: re: Aftyn Behn has always fought for our rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114955658/568715481/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_250909AllieB_N_AP_NO_9_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMjg3MDU2LTRjOGUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OnxjpmdUQOhxBl-GaqXAzvDS4Nac11B1ZoxlQg6MOWE=)
---
Hi Peter,

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg once said, “Women belong in all places where decisions are being made.” At Her Bold Move, we exist to make that happen—especially in states where majority-male legislatures are writing laws about women’s bodies.

Since its founding in 2020, Her Bold Move has supported hundreds of women across the country, including me. **Today, I am proud to say that they are joining me in standing with Aftyn Behn in Tennessee’s 7th Congressional District Special Election.**

[**Before I share more, Aftyn is in a primary that is coming up fast on October 7th. Will you chip in a split contribution of $20.25 or more today and join me in supporting Her Bold Move and Aftyn Behn for Congress?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_250909AllieB_N_AP_NO_9_G_N_L1&amount=20.25)

I know firsthand what happens when men in power pass laws that strip women of control over our own health. When my pregnancy developed fatal complications, Tennessee’s abortion ban forced me to carry until my life was in danger. Speaking out became my only option. I told my story in front of the state Capitol, in Congress, and to anyone who would listen — because silence never protected anyone.

**And every step of the way, Aftyn Behn was there.** Long before she ran for office herself, Aftyn was organizing alongside women like me, pushing back on Tennessee’s abortion ban, and amplifying the voices of those harmed by it. In the state legislature, she didn’t just vote the right way — she fought publicly and unapologetically against Republican attempts to criminalize healthcare, control our bodies, and punish families in crisis. When others looked away, she leaned in. **When they tried to silence us, she gave us a microphone.**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114955659/568715482/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_250909AllieB_N_AP_NO_9_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMjg3MDU2LTRjOGUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OnxjpmdUQOhxBl-GaqXAzvDS4Nac11B1ZoxlQg6MOWE=)
---
_Pictured: Rep. Aftyn Behn, D-Nashville, stands at her desk during a legislative session Tuesday, April 23, 2024, when the Underage Abortion Trafficking Act, a law criminalizing adults who "intentionally recruit, harbor, or transport" an unemancipated minor to get an abortion without notarized parental consent, passed in the majority-male TN legislature 74-24. Behn filed suit against the law._
---
That’s why I believe so deeply in Aftyn’s campaign for Congress. She has proven, time and again, that she will never back down when it comes to protecting our fundamental rights. She knows these fights aren’t abstract policy debates — they are life-and-death struggles for women, mothers, and families across Tennessee.

This race is about more than politics. It is about whether women’s lives and freedoms will continue to be treated as negotiable. Tennessee took my choice away when I needed it most, but I chose to fight back. And today,**I am choosing to fight alongside Aftyn Behn, because she has been in this fight from the very beginning.**

[**Aftyn’s campaign really needs to raise $30,000 in the next 10 days. Will you join me in helping her hit that goal by pitching in a split $20.25 or more contribution between Her Bold Move and Aftyn’s campaign today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-aftyn/?refcode=EM_F_250909AllieB_N_AP_NO_9_G_N_L2&amount=20.25)
---

---
** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114955665/568715488/-1821248200?refcode=EM_F_250909AllieB_N_AP_NO_9_G_N_EOTHER&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAzMjg3MDU2LTRjOGUtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OnxjpmdUQOhxBl-GaqXAzvDS4Nac11B1ZoxlQg6MOWE=)
---
My promise to my daughter Miley Rose is to never let her name die with her. I will keep telling the truth, and I will keep backing women who fight for us. Aftyn is that woman. She belongs in the room where decisions are being made — because those decisions are about our lives, our health, and our futures.

With love,

Allie Phillips

name: NRSC HQ
subject: You’re making a huge mistake by ignoring us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You have until 11:59 PM to verify your voter profile. >>
_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/pE1ZCfO7rMiH0yd8yEYIDffFw2FgfcMiz7f7rqTg2jCMJzjE9io6RqAeVYmNhbK3UJKABzDn9w5-6eKpx1Qy8SJcwfGhqbrAaxD1Fdorz6W0CMO4aUz2PArQVImloSwcC1xDexptG3jp0q2tB3aizzQbinwBTmAq-vEwmvZO3c87yRDoEHJCUTqY/ppD6G2Y7fWOtOQfWLQElc2SL5ZIZEA2p/12)_
---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: FWD: My family is counting on me. Families in every corner of America are counting on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I'm just passing this message from Congresswoman Ashley Hinson along to you. She is a Republican running for Senate to replace Joni Ernst, who isn't running for reelection. This is an unexpected opening for Democrats to win a Senate seat in Iowa- and if that happens, it puts our conservative majority at risk! We can't let that happen. Please chip in to make sure Ashley gets off to a strong start- thank you so much! [**_Click here to support her campaign >>_**](https://trk.email.tedcruz._OPKmLqtjSf5DJU5w) Ted Cruz
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative, I'll get straight to the point: **I 'm a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country.**** ** I was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I'm raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future. A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda. We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn't over. In Congress, I'm fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families.
* We've cut taxes.
* We've delivered relief for small businesses and family farms.
* We've put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending.
* We've closed the Southern Border, we're sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we're making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe.

That's why I'm running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done. Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids. This isn't going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can't get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage. Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump's Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat. clean_body: | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I'm just passing this message from Congresswoman Ashley Hinson along to you. She is a Republican running for Senate to replace Joni Ernst, who isn't running for reelection. This is an unexpected opening for Democrats to win a Senate seat in Iowa- and if that happens, it puts our conservative majority at risk! We can't let that happen. Please chip in to make sure Ashley gets off to a strong start- thank you so much! Ted Cruz | Fellow Conservative, I'll get straight to the point: I 'm a pro-Trump, conservative minivan-driving mom from the Midwest running for Senate in the biggest race in the entire country. I was born and raised in Iowa. Now, I'm raising my two boys in the state that has given me so much. I got into this fight for them, for their future. A few years ago, their school tried to allow kids to secretly change their gender identity at school WITHOUT telling the parents. This is one of the moments that changed me and fueled my fight against the radical Left and their woke agenda. We fought back against this nonsense, and we won. But the fight isn't over. In Congress, I'm fighting alongside President Trump to restore common sense and deliver real results for families. We've cut taxes. We've delivered relief for small businesses and family farms. We've put an end to waste, fraud, and abuse from federal spending. We've closed the Southern Border, we're sending criminal aliens back to where they came from, and we're making it crystal clear that nothing is more important than keeping Americans safe. That's why I'm running for Senate to stand with President Trump and get the job done. Democrats want to elect a Senator who will blindly obey their far-Left agenda, even if it means harming our kids. This isn't going to happen under my watch. I apologize for being so blunt, but if we can't get the resources to fight back against the Democrats, we will start out at a serious disadvantage. Democrats are bankrolling a blue wave to crush conservatives like me across the map. They want to destroy President Trump's Senate Majority to stonewall his agenda. The ONLY way to fight back is to ensure we have the resources to win this seat. I hope I can count on your support today--this is more than just defending another Republican Senate Seat--our conservative values are on the chopping block if we don't start preparing for the Democrats' onslaught of lies. Talk soon, Ashley Hinson | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250910-9400&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9400%2E614464%2EizvZC_)
Hey, Peter – it’s Wes Moore.
I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me: **I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland.**
Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Heartland Patriots’ support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too.
**[Would you please split a contribution of $10 – or any amount that feels right to you – between my campaign and Heartland Patriots? I can’t win this race without you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250910-9400&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9400%2E614464%2EizvZC_)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250910-9400&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9400%2E614464%2EizvZC_)**
Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together.
But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: **I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026.**
They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back.
But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, _let them try._
Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland.
**[Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250910-9400&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9400%2E614464%2EizvZC_)**
Elevate,
Wes

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) Are you getting our emails, friend?

[As one of our most engaged supporters in your state, we assumed you’d want to sign our petition urging Congress to make D.C. a state.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=3&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) **It’s a big deal:** Top Democrats in Washington are fighting for it tooth and nail...

...Because if D.C. became the 51st state, we’d gain two more Democratic Senators – _we’d have a clear path to the Senate Majority!!_ [**Maybe we were wrong. Maybe you don’t care. But if you do, sign the petition before it closes tomorrow morning at 9AM:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=4&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) | [URGE CONGRESS TO MAKE D.C. A STATE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=5&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7)
---
Thanks, friend.

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —

**Listen up:**
**WE TOLD YOU:** Key Democrats like Pete Buttigieg and Joe Biden all want Washington, DC to become the 51st STATE!

**WE TOLD YOU:** If DC became the 51st state, 700,000 Americans would get representation in Congress AND we’d gain 2 more Democratic Senators!

**WE TOLD YOU:** Donald Trump and the GOP HATE the idea of DC becoming a state because it would **WRECK their far-right agenda.** **So, we’re rushing to gather 20,000 signatures before 11:59 PM so that we can reach our goal and PRESSURE CONGRESS TO MAKE DC THE 51ST STATE!**
---

[**We’ve only got 14 hours to reach our midnight goal. Can you sign on now to stand with Top Democrats??**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=6&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=7&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7)
[ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=8&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7)
---
Listen – We’re counting on Top Democrats like you to step up and help support our campaign for DC Statehood.

DC has a larger population than Vermont and Wyoming but they have absolutely 0 voting representation in Congress... It's disgusting!

**Trump and his GOP are opposed to DC Statehood because they’re afraid of Democracy and giving power back to the people!**

But, we can’t stand by and idly watch for another second, that’s why we’re penning a massive petition.
[**20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT: Add your name to our MASSIVE petition to demand Congress make DC the 51st state! >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=9&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7) [ADD MY NAME >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68684?t=10&akid=23381%2E4449941%2EZSOgN7)

| |
---|---
**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: **Reason #1:** We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – a gift of $7 helps win races like those and more. **Reason #2:** We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. name: GIFFORDS.org
subject: 👋 To everybody who cares about GIFFORDS’s mission to end gun violence, please don’t scroll away… 🛑
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If everyone getting this email donated even $1, we'd have the resources to show that our movement is stronger than ever.
#

Hello - if you care about stopping gun violence in Pennsylvania and across America, then please read this.
For more than a decade, Gabby Giffords has led the fight to demand change and save lives from gun violence.
That’s only possible with supporters like you.

Thanks to your grassroots donations, we’ve been able to endorse candidates in the toughest races, run effective ads, and mobilize across the country.
Your support helped us pass the most significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years — and over 700 more gun laws in states nationwide. These laws have saved lives.
And now, your support is crucial as we fight back against the Trump administration’s efforts to weaken gun laws.

If everyone who opened this email chipped in even $10 to GIFFORDS today, then we would have the resources to reach our ambitious goal for this quarter.
But we know not everyone can. Only 2% of people who open emails have chipped in this year to power our work.
That’s why we’re asking you to be part of that group today.

[**If ending gun violence is worth $10, we’re asking you to join the chorus of Americans donating to GIFFORDS PAC ahead of our mid-month deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-sep25.vnrwKJ&refcode=em250910-1-b&t=1&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-sep25.LcBf1X&amount=10&t=20&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $27](https://go.giffords.org/go/61945?c0=giffords-em-sep25.fYNgW6&refcode=em250910-1-b&t=21&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-sep25.OgxiUJ&refcode=em250910-1-b&t=22&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-sep25.HTMwGp&refcode=em250910-1-b&t=23&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-sep25.fqUxQD&refcode=em250910-1-b&t=24&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7)**
---
****

Thank you,
GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=10858%2E3935704%2Ed0xTi7) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: President Trump - Breaking News
subject: I have seen the horrific video.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
What was he doing riding the train and walking the streets? Criminals like this need to be Locked Up!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **LOCK ‘EM UP!!**
****
Friend,
I have seen the horrific video of a beautiful, young Ukrainian refugee, who came to America to escape the vicious War in Ukraine, and was innocently riding the Metro in Charlotte, North Carolina, where she was brutally ambushed by a mentally deranged lunatic.
The perpetrator was a well known career criminal, who had been previously arrested and released on CASHLESS BAIL in January, a total of 14 TIMES.
What the hell was he doing riding the train, and walking the streets? **Criminals like this need to be LOCKED UP.** ****
The blood of this innocent woman can literally be seen dripping from his knife, and now her blood is on the hands of the Democrats who refuse to put bad people in jail, including Former Disgraced Governor and “Wannabe Senator” Roy Cooper.
North Carolina, and every State, needs LAW AND ORDER, and only Republicans will deliver it!
I am organizing a call-to-action for every Real American that wants JUSTICE. I want you to be a part of it. NO, WE NEED YOU NOW! This will be like no other I’ve done before, and I want FIVE MILLION PEOPLE TO SIGN IT!!!
Please, if you want to make our cities safe again, make this pledge to your fellow brothers and sisters:
**#1** Stop Catch & Release! **#2** Lock Up Criminals! **#3** Eliminate Cashless Bail!

subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
Hurry and get it now...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21915/6374453/2399de8b4bc953f5f575ac00a64b82b48c3d3085/86004ed0aacfd85958549976cc189eb95612bc02)
---
| | |
---
_September 10th, 2025 at 06:24 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21915/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/86004ed0aacfd85958549976cc189eb95612bc02). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21915/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/86004ed0aacfd85958549976cc189eb95612bc02).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21915/6374453/13b58c49c993fc3e2c15dbedda3be8fe41322c41/86004ed0aacfd85958549976cc189eb95612bc02)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---

* * *
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and the Republican Party’s Medicaid “work requirements” would strip vital care away from people with disabilities. As Health and Human Services Secretary, RFK Jr. blames individuals for their chronic illnesses and ties their worth to productivity. He now decides who counts as “medically frail” or “having special needs,” determining who gets work exemptions. RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz, who leads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid, aren’t diagnosing, they’re scapegoating. They reduce chronic illnesses to “bad diets” and label those suffering as unpatriotic. Oz tells Medicaid patients to “prove your worth,” while Trump’s former Agriculture Secretary suggests they replace deported farm workers. _Translation: Work or die!_ It’s cruel, it’s reckless, and its exactly why Able Dems exists. **We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies - leaders who know that health care is a right, not a privilege. Leaders who will slam the brakes on schemes that kick people off Medicaid, punish those who can’t work, and slash the lifelines our community depends on.** [**Please donate whatever you can right now to empower our candidates and stop this assault on our care.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8QkTeDxRvklnqoRpDFXVTH15soNxZbbUhUrzpG21Jz1M9o4szSBeuOH-4JjM5FgtsPLSaFtgGZIap0yC2IEYEMavNebrMBVBBgOQHJ0BoobTkbeVNq1Sk-2KdB0obzqDyEa6nibc1PF6zUcGwTkSwjMGdgM3xzb0PVLGm4M6uGALJU8Tdgk0Yme7e8m05RV5wjvxno2BEFgLUezb3GDfRBDIJ1x4dOiMxJlGSYVZjDBiMZOFM7FAcC2a8QYjEA-PIDWqSLOiQjs4BuiY2kbELYxc/4js/lXugpzkNSyagMBUFXSjSng/h2/h001.jfj9TlfCBi1qWtMZ8Xo3a01PaAW6N85wb2hl3b_wzNI) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

As Health and Human Services Secretary, RFK Jr. blames individuals for their chronic illnesses and ties their worth to productivity. He now decides who counts as “medically frail” or “having special needs,” determining who gets work exemptions. RFK Jr. and Dr. Oz, who leads the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid, aren’t diagnosing, they’re scapegoating. They reduce chronic illnesses to “bad diets” and label those suffering as unpatriotic. Oz tells Medicaid patients to “prove your worth,” while Trump’s former Agriculture Secretary suggests they replace deported farm workers. Translation: Work or die! It’s cruel, it’s reckless, and its exactly why Able Dems exists. We elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies - leaders who know that health care is a right, not a privilege. Leaders who will slam the brakes on schemes that kick people off Medicaid, punish those who can’t work, and slash the lifelines our community depends on. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** This is not theoretical. body:

# [Russia Attacks Poland--And Trump's Too Busy Eating Seafood](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173275115&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMjc1MTE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc1MTU5NzAsImV4cCI6MTc2MDEwNzk3MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gJXVQxjIkbJeJXaYG6UAGYTje9WPXl5lRBW49fzH3Wc)
### This is what happens when America elects an unqualified narcissist.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Sep 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173275115&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMjc1MTE1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1NzUxNTk3MCwiZXhwIjoxNzYwMTA3OTcwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.xeECmgHVXFr4elFKOithqkuYFFjCPXwQE--tFFdfxwg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173275115&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMjc1MTE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc1MTU5NzAsImV4cCI6MTc2MDEwNzk3MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gJXVQxjIkbJeJXaYG6UAGYTje9WPXl5lRBW49fzH3Wc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=173275115&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczMjc1MTE1LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc1MTU5NzAsImV4cCI6MTc2MDEwNzk3MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.gJXVQxjIkbJeJXaYG6UAGYTje9WPXl5lRBW49fzH3Wc)
---
| | [](https://substack..Gy0T4b1QmskWRFO5tlvG8bobofiFqfSvs3vX0QQm1C8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/endlessurgency/p/russia-attacks-polandand-trumps-too?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Details are still coming in overnight, but Russia just violated Poland's airspace with unmanned drones--an act that should be treated as an act of war against a NATO ally. And while the world waited for American leadership, where were Donald Trump and J.D. Vance? At Joe's Seafood, mugging for cameras and stuffing their faces like a couple of jackasses.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/0a2d38a4-a62c-4ae7-9679-3b29891e8fd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/0a2d38a4-a62c-4ae7-9679-3b29891e8fd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is exactly what I've been warning about for months on conservative media.
Trump struts around demanding a Nobel Peace Prize, bragging about all the wars he supposedly stopped. But every conflict we've seen this year is the direct result of cowardly, incompetent American leadership. We've got a president who can't tell friend from enemy, who sucks up to dictators, rolls out the red carpet for murderers, and lets our military kneel before foreign strongmen. He's gutted the Department of Defense (and no, I ain't calling it by its new name) and handed the keys to hacks like Pete Hegseth--rubber-stamped by Senate Republicans who've enabled this disaster every step of the way.
And now? Poland may be forced to invoke Article 5 of NATO. That's not a drill. Article 5 means the potential for war. A real one. And here's the truth: under strong American leadership, this doesn't happen . Not under Joe Biden. Not under Reagan. Not under Clinton. Not even under Bush. But it is happening under Trump--because our enemies don't fear us. They see a reality show president who talks tough but folds under pressure. They don't believe we'll defend our allies. And why would they?
Trump brags about how he "kept the peace" between Pakistan and India or Israel and Iran--but real leadership prevents those conflicts from getting close in the first place. Under Trump, Israel bombs Qatar's capital without even informing us. That they didn't loop him in on their strike against Iran either says it all: the U.S. has become irrelevant on the global stage.
_**[I'm committed to keeping Endless Urgency free for everyone--but I rely on paid subscribers (starting at just $8/month) to keep it going. If you find value in the work, consider becoming a paid subscriber:](https://substack.com/redirect/0a2d38a4-a62c-4ae7-9679-3b29891e8fd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/0a2d38a4-a62c-4ae7-9679-3b29891e8fd6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Meanwhile, Russia, China, Iran, and North Korea are drawing closer. They're building a new axis of power while we isolate ourselves. Europe sees it clearly--that's why they're unified around Ukraine. They know the future of their continent hinges on that fight. But instead of standing with them, Trump pushes idiotic tariffs, alienates allies like Canada, Mexico, Europe--even Vietnam, a crucial partner in Asia. We've handed global leadership to a man who doesn't understand the job and doesn't care to learn it. For God's sake, it's well known Trump doesn't even read his briefings. The guy is clueless, and now everyone's paying for it.
Poland scrambling jets to intercept Russian drones isn't just their crisis--it's the price of Trump's weakness. And that price is rising. If another world war breaks out in Europe, it'll be on Trump and J.D. Vance. Their failures aren't theoretical--they're real, and they're dangerous.
This is a turning point. Americans of every political stripe need to stand up and say: enough. We stand with Ukraine. We stand with Poland. We stand with democracy. There are still millions of us--conservative, liberal, independent--who don't bend to dictators and sure as hell won't host them like honored guests to score cheap political points.
Let's be very clear: none of this happens if Donald Trump isn't in the White House. Any remotely serious leader--Democrat or Republican--would've prevented it. But Trump is uniquely unfit. He's weak. He's desperate to be liked by men like Putin. Since their meeting in Alaska, Putin has escalated bombings in Ukraine, killed civilians, and hit an American-owned factory--with barely a shrug from Washington.
Meanwhile, China is flexing its economic muscle, expanding its reach, and stepping into the void left by Trump, Vance, Rubio, and every coward who helped dismantle America's global role--starting with USAID. Do you feel safer with Russia emboldened and China ascendant? I sure as hell don't.
That's the legacy of Trumpism: a smaller, weaker America. A world unraveling while our president cosplays as a dictator at home. And every day Trump is in power, that unraveling accelerates--undoing a century of work by leaders from both parties who, however flawed, believed in keeping the peace and holding the line.
We are on dangerous ground. And unless we act, America's future will be decided by others. That's what happens when you put an unqualified narcissist in charge of a leading the free world.
So stand up. Speak out. Fight back. Because if we don't, we're not just losing our place in the world--we're handing it over to those who want to burn it down.

This is what happens when America elects an unqualified narcissist. | | | Sep 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Details are still coming in overnight, but Russia just violated Poland's airspace with unmanned drones--an act that should be treated as an act of war against a NATO ally. And while the world waited for American leadership, where were Donald Trump and J.D. Vance? At Joe's Seafood, mugging for cameras and stuffing their faces like a couple of jackasses. This is exactly what I've been warning about for months on conservative media. Trump struts around demanding a Nobel Peace Prize, bragging about all the wars he supposedly stopped. But every conflict we've seen this year is the direct result of cowardly, incompetent American leadership. We've got a president who can't tell friend from enemy, who sucks up to dictators, rolls out the red carpet for murderers, and lets our military kneel before foreign strongmen. He's gutted the Department of Defense (and no, I ain't calling it by its new name) and handed the keys to hacks like Pete Hegseth--rubber-stamped by Senate Republicans who've enabled this disaster every step of the way. And now? Poland may be forced to invoke Article 5 of NATO. That's not a drill. Article 5 means the potential for war. A real one. And here's the truth: under strong American leadership, this doesn't happen . Not under Joe Biden. Not under Reagan. Not under Clinton. Not even under Bush. But it is happening under Trump--because our enemies don't fear us. They see a reality show president who talks tough but folds under pressure. They don't believe we'll defend our allies. And why would they? Trump brags about how he "kept the peace" between Pakistan and India or Israel and Iran--but real leadership prevents those conflicts from getting close in the first place. Under Trump, Israel bombs Qatar's capital without even informing us. That they didn't loop him in on their strike against Iran either says it all: the U.S. has become irrelevant on the global stage. Meanwhile, Russia, China, Iran, and North Korea are drawing closer. They're building a new axis of power while we isolate ourselves. Europe sees it clearly--that's why they're unified around Ukraine. They know the future of their continent hinges on that fight. But instead of standing with them, Trump pushes idiotic tariffs, alienates allies like Canada, Mexico, Europe--even Vietnam, a crucial partner in Asia. We are demanding answers on medication abortion
I wanted to make sure you saw the news on our latest case.

[**Last week, we filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration for refusing to answer our FOIA requests for more information about their medication abortion policies.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964359/568738246/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

| Peter,

For decades, the science has been clear: Medication abortion is overwhelmingly safe and effective. But the Trump administration is trying to cloud that truth with secrecy and political interference.

[**Today, we filed a lawsuit against the Trump administration for failing to respond to our FOIA requests for information about HHS' and FDA's actions on medication abortion.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964376/568738284/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237) | [**FUND THE LAWSUIT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964394/568738290/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "FUND THE LAWSUIT")
---
We asked for safety data and information about potential political influence in decision making about mifepristone, the abortion pill safely used by millions. _What did we get in return? Silence. Delays. Confusion._

The public has a right to know if political pressure is influencing decisions about mifepristone. But the administration is refusing to turn over the documents.

[**So we're escalating: we're taking them to court to force them to release the truth.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964404/568738320/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

Because this isn't just about paperwork. It's about exposing how anti-abortion forces are working behind closed doors to restrict medication abortion. What is the Trump administration hiding from us? We're using every legal tool possible to dig in and find out, but litigation takes resources. [**That's where you come in.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964413/568738346/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)
[**HELP US TAKE ON TRUMP**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964421/568738364/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237 "HELP US TAKE ON TRUMP")

[**The administration may want to hide the truth, but with your support we're holding them accountable.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114964424/568738387/1824768205?sourceid=1150886&utm_campaign=26emama-0904aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4ZDIwMy01NThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4QU-PKIBYHv1th2PPbb9Eppk3-7TlPRpDb2temPhnSo=&emci=523dc7b0-c18d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a608d203-558e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=954237)

clean_body: We are demanding answers on medication abortion I wanted to make sure you saw the news on our latest case. Peter, your ongoing support makes this lawsuit, and the fight for medication abortion access everywhere, possible. Thank you for fighting with us, Tyler Kalogeros-Treschuk Senior Director, Individual Giving * From: Rachana Desai Martin <info@reprorights.org> Sent: Monday, September 8, 2025 1:18 PM To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Subject: We just sued the Trump administration | | ---|--- | Peter, For decades, the science has been clear: Medication abortion is overwhelmingly safe and effective. But the Trump administration is trying to cloud that truth with secrecy and political interference. | "FUND THE LAWSUIT" We asked for safety data and information about potential political influence in decision making about mifepristone, the abortion pill safely used by millions. What did we get in return? Silence. Delays. Confusion. The public has a right to know if political pressure is influencing decisions about mifepristone. But the administration is refusing to turn over the documents. Because this isn't just about paperwork. It's about exposing how anti-abortion forces are working behind closed doors to restrict medication abortion. What is the Trump administration hiding from us? We're using every legal tool possible to dig in and find out, but litigation takes resources. "HELP US TAKE ON TRUMP" Onward, Rachana Desai Martin Chief Program Officer, U.S. Programs "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: “Blacks can’t share my water fountain” - this is the state of the Democrat party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
clean_body: is a sign that a racist protester held up as I spoke to the Arlington County School Board about keeping our girls safe.I'm appalled, but not surprised, Peter. Unfortunately, I've become used to this kind of vile hate. Over the years, I've endured nasty slurs & I've been called so many horrible names. The so-called "tolerant Left" will unleash its true racism the second a black woman dares to defy the Democrat party and defend conservative principles. They simply can't comprehend that I will NOT conform to their radical ideology simply because of my skin colorThe truth is, I used to be a Democrat. But when I realized that Republicans were trying to lift up EVERY American, I made the switch. As the sitting Lieutenant Governor of Virginia, the former Capitol of the Confederacy, I'm an immigrant, a Marine, and above all, a human being. This kind of disgusting hatred has no place in our nation. I won't let their slurs define me, and I certainly won't let them stop me! The Left can spew all the racist rhetoric it wants, Peter. But I know that with your support, I will win my CRUCIAL race for Governor of Virginia in November. Here's my humble appeal: Democrats are willing to be so brazen with their racist rhetoric because they believe conservatives won't stand up to them. They think regular Americans are weak and afraid. on the liberal media & rich Democrats is never easy. But with you by my side, I know we will prevail in November and beyond. Thank you for your support. God bless you, Winsome Earle-SearsChristianMotherMarineImmigrantLt. Governor of Virginia . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 |

name: Lt. Col. David Flippo
subject: Mesquite Nevada Patriots Endorse David Flippo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Conservative grassroots activists know we are the candidate to unseat Steven Horsford | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/89a7700d4bab/welcome-to-team-flippo-10340152?e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=5803f9514a&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| | I am proud to announce that the **Mesquite Nevada Patriots** have officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04**. The Mesquite Nevada Patriots are passionate grassroots activists who do everything they can to ensure that conservative Republicans are elected to represent the state of Nevada. I have tremendous support and respect for the on-the-ground work they do for Nevada and to help President Trump’s agenda! Here is why they believe we are the campaign to beat Steven Horsford.
---
| [ ](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=ce92389a25&e=273c9a71fb)
---
| "On behalf of the Mesquite Nevada Patriots, we are proud to endorse Lt. Col. David Flippo for Congress. Mesquite Patriots is a grassroots organization dedicated to fighting for conservative values and supporting President Trump's agenda.

Nominating a true Constitutional Conservative Republican is both pragmatic and principled if we want to defeat his far-left Democrat opponent, Steven Horsford. We believe that David Flippo is the best man for the job and the one to beat Steven Horsford.

David Flippo is that conservative Republican. He is a combat veteran, an oil field manager, a business owner, a proven leader, and a man who will put Nevada first. He stands with President Trump, is prepared to defend our Constitution, and will fight for the values that matter to our Nevadan families and communities. The Mesquite Nevada Patriots are proud to stand with David Flippo."
---
| [STAND WITH DAVID](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=31a9f42bea&e=273c9a71fb "STAND WITH DAVID")
---
| Activists and conservatives all across Southern Nevada are excited about our mission to secure the border, defend our police, and**fight for the policies the majority of the American people** voted for! In Washington, I will fight for the **values of the Mesquite Nevada Patriots and all Nevadans!**

We have a real opportunity to bring real, positive, conservative change to Nevada, but it will take all of us working together. **Will you join our movement to flip NV-04?**
---
| [DONATE AND BUILD ON OUR MOMENTUM!](https://electdavidflippo.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9aba26b775663b53df718fc1a&id=f771673318&e=273c9a71fb "DONATE AND BUILD ON OUR MOMENTUM!")

body:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114966753/568744500/1341216162?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Schiff_250910_t1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmVjN2JkNC01NjhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F1SltKnXH0oIWcjxHM16XsDm76P_0LQTZPFY34epfeY=) I have important news to share with you, Derek.

**Right-wing internet troll Laura Loomer – a white nationalist, conspiracy theorist, and 9/11-denier – is calling the shots on matters of national security.**

After discovering a routine meeting Senator Mark Warner had planned at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia (an engagement that is crucial to his job as Vice Chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee), Loomer took to the internet to attack Senator Warner’s record.

She called for him to be removed from office, tried for treason, and even labeled him a “liar” and “communist FRAUD!”

**And worst of all, the Trump administration CANCELED Mark’s visit.**

This is the kind of baseless abuse of power that the Trump administration welcomes, Derek.

It’s another blatant attempt at political retaliation against Trump’s enemies – and right now, Senator Warner is among their top targets. He has stood up and spoken out about every dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible move the Trump administration has made. He has challenged the administration whenever they have put Americans’ livelihoods or the security of our nation at risk.

Mark’s a threat to the Trump regime, so we need to be prepared for Republicans to target his reelection next year.

**But there's one thing I know about Mark: he won’t let Trump, Laura Loomer, or anyone else stop him from fulfilling his responsibilities as Virginia’s Senator and the top Democrat on the Senate Intelligence Committee.**

[**_Unfortunately, this fight is only going to get uglier, Derek, so Senator Warner is going to need your help.
