clean_body: | | | = I have important news to share with you, Derek. Right-wing internet troll Laura Loomer – a white nationalist, conspiracy theorist, and 9/11-denier – is calling the shots on matters of national security. After discovering a routine meeting Senator Mark Warner had planned at the National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency’s headquarters in Springfield, Virginia (an engagement that is crucial to his job as Vice Chairman of the Senate Intelligence Committee), Loomer took to the internet to attack Senator Warner’s record. She called for him to be removed from office, tried for treason, and even labeled him a “liar” and “communist FRAUD!” And worst of all, the Trump administration CANCELED Mark’s visit. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = ******=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** This is the kind of baseless abuse of power that the Trump administration welcomes, Derek. It’s another blatant attempt at political retaliation against Trump’s enemies – and right now, Senator Warner is among their top targets. He has stood up and spoken out about every dangerous, reckless, or irresponsible move the Trump administration has made. He has challenged the administration whenever they have put Americans’ livelihoods or the security of our nation at risk. Mark’s a threat to the Trump regime, so we need to be prepared for Republicans to target his reelection next year. But there's one thing I know about Mark: he won’t let Trump, Laura Loomer, or anyone else stop him from fulfilling his responsibilities as Virginia’s Senator and the top Democrat on the Senate Intelligence Committee. = Thank you for standing with Mark, Adam Schiff ******=****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Voter Action Project
subject: We need your support to register more voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091025_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091025_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091025_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091025_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091025_1&amount=20]

clean_body: This is about the future of Virginia and all of America. | | | ** Friend, I’m going to level with you. This race isn’t just about one district — it’s about the future of Virginia and all of America. My race has been identified as one of the most crucial red-to-blue flip opportunities in the nation . And, the Daily Signal writes, “all eyes turn to Virginia” in this year’s elections as a major bellwether for next year’s crucial midterms. If we win here, we won’t just expand our Democratic majority in the House of Delegates — we’ll secure the power to protect reproductive freedom, defend workers’ rights, and invest in our schools**. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Republicans know how high the stakes are. They’re pouring money into this race because they understand that holding this seat means shrinking — or even flipping — our majority And they plan to undo the progress we’ve fought so hard for. The truth is, we have a real shot to win._But only if grassroots supporters like you stand with us in this final stretch. ** I’m proud to be in this fight with you. Onward, Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | Greater Georgia Newsletter September 2025
---
| As election season heats up, Greater Georgia is on the move registering new voters, engaging neighbors across the state, and safeguarding fair, secure elections rooted in Georgia's values.
Here's what we're working on as we head into the final stretch before this November's General Election.
---
| |
---
|
## Psst... We've been keeping a secret!
---
The word is out -- Greater Georgia has launched our [largest voter registration drive](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JWxhb3XALFhPptVcLYAjdn_Y-d7c0Xs5t4Seap-wI5B3ZLoxtk8WviJ1BRPwRdL70DcZuT9nXgMf4zdaOgFncYXhtBIr2xzw1Lc7bDSwm7m3EbhVuZi1tly18383uUonMVrh21GFTZRCq_kZMTASXlhzm4c3fYnET_fbCyZvO_xLaDCTu-VpKu9kLCY4MgRaPx6M5JnRri3MeOlOMPbBPpeNBBORgmvyXdb1Ow4i_2PtIiAc6_oLww==&c=bs59DRKhSAJ38d7qzg-waGC5QAv_6f6IbigBuy7FdT2wQ6tq7FiSXQ==&ch=rb9-UTahWQ8HWaFI-UlA0y6czeHJgCTX3iDU9W2f4uZnO0LoRONcxA==) yet!
We are making sure every eligible Georgian who shares our values has the opportunity to vote this November and in the critical 2026 midterms.
We'll be in mailboxes, on cell phones, at rodeos, and grocery store parking lots... and we will need YOUR help to make sure more than 120,000 Georgians who share our core beliefs get registered in time to vote.
---
|
---
Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com.
---
| [HELP US REGISTER VOTERS](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JWxhb3XALFhPptVcLYAjdn_Y-d7c0Xs5t4Seap-wI5B3ZLoxtk8Wvq_2krwOBYwfEg6wXHxrLFc1FutTLE6DBKyAkfQl46gdCqh-HKf14oBlmk3sPuGKHQxYO0wmAvFsLhmqLgzmtK03hLpxfxxiLlqjnvvWJcIf9r25pctd6ho=&c=bs59DRKhSAJ38d7qzg-waGC5QAv_6f6IbigBuy7FdT2wQ6tq7FiSXQ==&ch=rb9-UTahWQ8HWaFI-UlA0y6czeHJgCTX3iDU9W2f4uZnO0LoRONcxA==)
---
|
---
## Hitting the Road: South Georgia Swing
---
Last week, our team traveled to Valdosta to join Senator Russ Goodman and Representative John LaHood as part of our statewide education tour to highlight state resources made available by the State Legislature.
---
|
---
|
---
We also stopped in Moultrie, GA for the South Region FFA Rally.
Volunteers shared with more than 300 students the ways that conservative governance has delivered training, support, relief, and opportunities for Georgia's thriving agriculture industry -- and 19 students registered to vote!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
## Election Reminders
---
No candidate secured over 50% in the State Senate District 21 special election, triggering a runoff scheduled for September 23, 2025.
Democrat Debra Shigley now faces Republican Jason Dickerson.
There is also a statewide election for PSC, county referendums, and municipal elections on the November 4, 2025 ballot.
Check out this new feature to add the November election on your calendar so you don't miss out! ⬇️
---
| [ADD TO YOUR CALENDAR](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JWxhb3XALFhPptVcLYAjdn_Y-d7c0Xs5t4Seap-wI5B3ZLoxtk8WviJ1BRPwRdL7AcJ2NV6mAcZgHxO-NxaRWFRgq2-sn6NIioUlnaG3gSvtgWyYCCAA61n_f9RhTkDjGD7bOQiLgKPmnMbrQ7qre9OfqFu7EhNPJxujaIE_sRY=&c=bs59DRKhSAJ38d7qzg-waGC5QAv_6f6IbigBuy7FdT2wQ6tq7FiSXQ==&ch=rb9-UTahWQ8HWaFI-UlA0y6czeHJgCTX3iDU9W2f4uZnO0LoRONcxA==)

## Help Welcome our Fall Interns
---
| |
---
| We're excited to welcome our fall 2025 interns! These bright and driven young leaders are already making an impact, helping with outreach, research, and communications. They represent the future of Georgia leadership, and we're thrilled to have them on board.

clean_body: Election Season Loading... | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter September 2025 | As election season heats up, Greater Georgia is on the move registering new voters, engaging neighbors across the state, and safeguarding fair, secure elections rooted in Georgia's values. Here's what we're working on as we head into the final stretch before this November's General Election. | | | Psst... We've been keeping a secret! The word is out -- Greater Georgia has launched our == yet! We are making sure every eligible Georgian who shares our values has the opportunity to vote this November and in the critical 2026 midterms. We'll be in mailboxes, on cell phones, at rodeos, and grocery store parking lots... and we will need YOUR help to make sure more than 120,000 Georgians who share our core beliefs get registered in time to vote. | Use the link below to sign up to receive details about upcoming Greater Georgia volunteer opportunities, or contact Dylan Blitz at dylan@greatergeorgia.com. | == | Hitting the Road: South Georgia Swing Last week, our team traveled to Valdosta to join Senator Russ Goodman and Representative John LaHood as part of our statewide education tour to highlight state resources made available by the State Legislature. | | We also stopped in Moultrie, GA for the South Region FFA Rally. Volunteers shared with more than 300 students the ways that conservative governance has delivered training, support, relief, and opportunities for Georgia's thriving agriculture industry -- and 19 students registered to vote! | | | Election Reminders No candidate secured over 50% in the State Senate District 21 special election, triggering a runoff scheduled for September 23, 2025. Democrat Debra Shigley now faces Republican Jason Dickerson. There is also a statewide election for PSC, county referendums, and municipal elections on the November 4, 2025 ballot. Check out this new feature to add the November election on your calendar so you don't miss out! ⬇️ | == | | Help Welcome our Fall Interns | | | We're excited to welcome our fall 2025 interns! These bright and driven young leaders are already making an impact, helping with outreach, research, and communications. They represent the future of Georgia leadership, and we're thrilled to have them on board. | | | In the News | == Nearly 478,000 inactive voter registrations are being canceled in Georgia, a move Greater Georgia's Terry Fye says is common sense for protecting election integrity. == Fulton County is being fined $10,000 a day until it appoints Republican nominees to its election board as required by law. == Speaker Burns pledges support for Georgians impacted by paper mill closures. | | | | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. | | Peter, I’ve gotten a lot of pushback since I first announced I was running for Congress. People said I was too young. That I didn’t look or act like a Congressman. That my legislative priorities were too pie-in-the-sky. But there’s one subject Republicans can’t get _enough_ of attacking me for: not being rich. What they don’t realize is that their favorite attack line is actually something we need _more_ of. **We need and deserve young, working, everyday people in Congress who know firsthand the struggles of the working class – and I’m proud to represent us. But increasing our ranks means building an unbeatable organizing movement, and to do that, I need as much grassroots support as I can get. I need _you_ , Peter.** [**_If you believe in having representatives who can _actually_ represent the lives real people live, will you chip in to my campaign right now? Every dollar helps me keep fighting for us in Congress, and build a fair future for the working class >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/-9zLFZL4Kz6ZXmgkBWZang~~/AAPPABA~/DIIneaZoeqStnpRaevdNjhKX4v8RSGNKJGTj6B8KFUtcecoVN9ZUhkQgI-uesuPFK08bRvg0TT7ddmf603JAdgpIJ8Bnk2KSwe8MFzFjyAn8MkZc5Eai43opMkPXDvlJp6YihqAUrVyZP_DBLNsj5BjM3wlP5L2PBj1D4omPrvGV7pHrIid3Mx31O3xQJ31mgcKWSdT-LZD2UT4PccgIlHTB9jYZRYI3OJv8zujNftm3FspB6s13pRxdiPi_iXrnwV7eyt0yKB0rqhOGag8ADNXVQAN3kl4w3AP5JUUoStuaDaBSji5KTI3G3rmowlRCUZ0PJw7c2bSD2VcO2SjXfaNX7If4w3JXqG0D6_zbF3E~) | [DONATE $27 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/mcz4U-v-9MV41_WHx_JS4Q~~/AAPPABA~/DIIneaZoeqStnpRaevdNjhKX4v8RSGNKJGTj6B8KFUtcecoVN9ZUhkQgI-uesuPFnO1SEtEjLBRntCqt6jCZMcBk-FtvOhKOWyKKn1DyLBj7gqD2pVS_EK6a3glJnOymaoZTyk9wupiOQn0j3pcpnuRgtRo90Z7nck0gTvtvO1cHQy3H57CJBXf4jGRx2T2XQ87CyEUj-Eeo_FT0-kIv1lUwlQXkS0rnbx24ZYWAIup7HDOfkjnf9r-yqgLvQvWElLvHKsGt7Tazs_l4uG3IdN6-Vn8xEciWJiAIBQJvY-oICYSHckoMnPVQldXomw63FcFV1KkMjbjfJtHLt9enoaESnMIJy-LEn2SXyP4bNlg~)

I’ll never apologize for having humble beginnings – because my family _fought_ to give me what chances I’ve had. My abuela, mom, and aunt fled Cuba in the 1960s with no money, and without knowing English. My abuela worked multiple factory jobs just to give her kids a better shot.
It’s her legacy I’m carrying forward when I walk onto the House floor, Peter. Because working people know – we’re in this together.
But let’s be real: You shouldn’t have to be working class to care about working class _priorities._ **You don’t need to be rejected by an apartment, or become houseless, or drive Uber to make ends meet – all of which I’ve done – to know that our economy isn’t working for everybody. You just have to care.
**
[**_I’m fighting to stay in Congress because I care, Peter. But the born-rich Republican donor class hates that, and will spend whatever it takes to hold me back. I need your help to stay here and build the world we deserve _despite_ them. subject: Knock Doors & Make Calls for Leslie Mehta and Abigail Spanberger

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Trump’s tariffs: Stupid AND illegal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Derek,
We already knew Donald Trump’s cost-raising tariff regime was stupid. Now we know it’s illegal, too!
A federal appeals court rightfully ruled that Trump overstepped his presidential authority and that these tariffs were an abuse of an emergency powers law.
We’re not talking about targeted trade measures. Trump’s tariffs are sweeping, unnecessary taxes on goods from nearly every country on earth, and the American people are paying the price — literally.
But instead of accepting this court ruling, Trump is now demanding that the Supreme Court swoop in and rescue his reckless scheme.
It’s shameful — and millions of people here in Virginia and across the country are feeling the consequences of this President’s idiotic actions with skyrocketing grocery bills and higher prices across the board on the goods families buy every day.
People are losing jobs. Small businesses have been forced to scale back or close their doors entirely. And inflation is squeezing the families who can least afford it.
This is the chaos and cruelty of Trump’s leadership — and it’s exactly why I’ve forced votes in the Senate to try and stop him.
With Congress back in session, I want you to know I’m not letting up.
I will continue to do everything I can to hold Trump accountable and block his harmful policies. And when we can’t do that, I will make sure my Republican colleagues own their positions — getting them on the record when they enable Trump’s worst impulses at the expense of their own constituents.
But I need you with me in this fight. An important way to fight Trump’s idiotic and illegal tariffs — and everything they represent — is to show overwhelming grassroots opposition. Will you add your name to my petition today? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n5snuqqg5UCaZPJ8UrTQLg2?contactdata=4vBZ3NEuy9b+/rm08YMlzPdayPgW6KKfjoNvaCbOUIwZhcH3/yDZQTNTKwVi2W+c5yMZYqBCNA7ssrpXwd6ftC9uiWH1xM5ut/M/gsUU6RgInSsMa4Vl2H6sPcdnZ1FptkRdgexACYc5RbMfgKCanfcyuImXhq6locyTPyOd3fI=]
ADD MY NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/n5snuqqg5UCaZPJ8UrTQLg2?contactdata=4vBZ3NEuy9b+/rm08YMlzPdayPgW6KKfjoNvaCbOUIwZhcH3/yDZQTNTKwVi2W+c5yMZYqBCNA7ssrpXwd6ftC9uiWH1xM5ut/M/gsUU6RgInSsMa4Vl2H6sPcdnZ1FptkRdgexACYc5RbMfgKCanfcyuImXhq6locyTPyOd3fI=]
Let’s make it clear that Virginians and Americans everywhere are done footing the bill for Trump’s abuses of power.
Thanks for speaking out with me.
Tim Kaine

name: James Talarico
subject: How I came to this decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
The past 24 hours have been nonstop. Running for Senate feels a little like drinking from a firehose. But I had a moment of free time this morning, and I wanted to reach out to tell you more about my decision to run for Senate.
Before I was a politician, I was a language arts teacher at a Title 1 middle school on the westside of San Antonio. Every day, my students struggled heroically to overcome poverty and systems designed to hold them back.
Growing up, I saw that same fight in my mother — a preacher’s daughter from Laredo who left home at 19. She moved up to Austin and met my birth father, whose drinking problem sometimes led to violence.
One night, he became abusive again, but that night, my mother’s love rose to meet it. She packed all our stuff into her little Ford Escort and took me to the hotel where she worked. The manager let us stay in one of the rooms until we found a small apartment of our own in East Austin.
Like my students, my mom was a fighter. And she passed that fighting spirit along to me.
I first ran for the Texas House in 2018 to fight for working people like my mom and my students. It was a race no one thought we could win, but together we flipped a district Donald Trump had won just two years earlier.
As a state legislator, I’ve led the fight against the billionaire mega-donors that have rigged the system against working Texans. And I’m the only member of the Texas Legislature who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money.
Now, as those same billionaire mega-donors take over the federal government, we need more fighters in Washington who will take power back for working people.
[**If you agree, I’m asking you to pitch in $5 to power this campaign. If we’re going to take back our state and our country, I need you with me.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250910-1&t=1&akid=24%2E1347274%2EDtYD1N)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

subject: September Survey is OPEN

body:
Lizzie’s looking forward to reading your responses! |
---

| | | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114969376/568752659/-718123517?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWYzZTYzZS01OThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zZTiE4xUDJke20fKhp-TSuRFNqBhcrcPt6vL2TyMjcw=&emci=4f1a5705-ed8c-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a5f3e63e-598e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=30230943)

Fellow Conservative,

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. _**Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?**_

**As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t.** Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: **arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar.**

And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.

_They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota._
_They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments._
_They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed._

And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

body:
[1]State Democrats Committee

Peter — there’s a
lot going on.

In times like these, no one could blame you for wanting to sit it out
until 2028 when Democrats get our chance to take back the White House. But
the data nerds all agree — Democrats can’t afford to wait that long.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]Gif with three rotating headlines: 1) Wall Street Journal: Democrats
get lowest rating from voters in 35 years. 2) The Telegraph: Time is
running out for the Democrats. 3) The Atlantic: If the party doesn't
figure out how to compete in more states, perpetual GOP dominance is all
but assured.

Things have been looking bad for months. So please, let us explain how
everything just changed in the last few weeks and [ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]why your support of
$5 or more to elect Democrats is so important now — not
just later.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]CHIP IN NOW

Right now, Republicans control the Senate with a 53-47 majority. Nine
months ago, the Senate map looked really tough, with only Maine and North
Carolina being obvious flip opportunities in 2026 — and the 2028 map
looked EVEN TOUGHER.

That meant even if we flipped both Senate seats next year, it was more
than likely Democrats would have been stuck in the minority. And on top of
that, Republicans in Texas and across the country are actively trying to
rig their district maps for the House. Both situations meant even with a
new Democratic president (Newsom, Ocasio-Cortez, Buttigieg, Harris,
Beshear, Whitmer!) it was looking less and less likely like Democrats
would have the majorities in Congress that they’d need to deliver for
working families and restore our democracy.

BUT THEN DEMOCRATS STARTED FIGHTING BACK.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]The Guardian: 'We are at war - bring it on': Democrats ready to fight
dirty to stop Trump

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]CBS News: California Democrats prepare redistricting effort to counter
Texas GOP

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]'Democrats lead in the U.S. House popular vote' Results from the August
Strength in Numbers/Verasight poll

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1007&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING »

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1008&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]The Washington Post: Sherrod Brown plans to run for Senate in Ohio
again, boosting Democrats' hopes of retaking a seat in the increasingly
red-leaning state.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1009&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]Newsweek headline: GOP Senators Worried About Losing Republican Seat in
Texas: What Polls Show

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1010&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]The Washington Post: Sen. Joni Ernst (R-Iowa) will not seek reelection
to a third term, creating an opening for Democrats in their bid to regain
control of the Senate.

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1011&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING »

Now Republicans are on defense all over the country for both the House AND
the Senate in 2026. If we can take either or both back in 2026, that means
we won’t have to wait just until 2028 to restore our democracy — we’ll
finally have the power in Congress that we need to grind Trump’s takeover
of our country to a screeching halt.

But the oligarchs backing Trump know this too — they’re ALREADY writing
million-dollar checks to prop up unpopular Republican incumbents across
the country. That’s why Democrats can’t afford to sit it out until 2028 —
we’ve got a democracy to save!

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94603?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1012&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]So, can we count on your support of $5 or whatever you
can chip in today to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot
nationwide in 2026? This is our chance to make a difference — we can’t
waste it!

If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your
contribution instantly:

[ https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94604?refcode=em20250910-9402&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=1013&akid=9402%2E614464%2ESbiVmo ]Contribute $5

clean_body: [1]State Democrats Committee Peter — there’s a lot going on. In times like these, no one could blame you for wanting to sit it out until 2028 when Democrats get our chance to take back the White House. But the data nerds all agree — Democrats can’t afford to wait that long. [ ]Gif with three rotating headlines: 1) Wall Street Journal: Democrats get lowest rating from voters in 35 years. 2) The Telegraph: Time is running out for the Democrats. 3) The Atlantic: If the party doesn't figure out how to compete in more states, perpetual GOP dominance is all but assured. Things have been looking bad for months. So please, let us explain how everything just changed in the last few weeks and [ ]why your support of $5 or more to elect Democrats is so important now — not just later. [ ]CHIP IN NOW Right now, Republicans control the Senate with a 53-47 majority. Nine months ago, the Senate map looked really tough, with only Maine and North Carolina being obvious flip opportunities in 2026 — and the 2028 map looked EVEN TOUGHER. That meant even if we flipped both Senate seats next year, it was more than likely Democrats would have been stuck in the minority. And on top of that, Republicans in Texas and across the country are actively trying to rig their district maps for the House. Both situations meant even with a new Democratic president (Newsom, Ocasio-Cortez, Buttigieg, Harris, Beshear, Whitmer!) it was looking less and less likely like Democrats would have the majorities in Congress that they’d need to deliver for working families and restore our democracy. BUT THEN DEMOCRATS STARTED FIGHTING BACK. [ ]The Guardian: 'We are at war - bring it on': Democrats ready to fight dirty to stop Trump [ ]CBS News: California Democrats prepare redistricting effort to counter Texas GOP [ ]'Democrats lead in the U.S. House popular vote' Results from the August Strength in Numbers/Verasight poll [ ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING » [ ]The Washington Post: Sherrod Brown plans to run for Senate in Ohio again, boosting Democrats' hopes of retaking a seat in the increasingly red-leaning state. [ ]Newsweek headline: GOP Senators Worried About Losing Republican Seat in Texas: What Polls Show [ ]The Washington Post: Sen. Joni Ernst (R-Iowa) will not seek reelection to a third term, creating an opening for Democrats in their bid to regain control of the Senate. [ ]HELP DEMOCRATS KEEP FIGHTING » Now Republicans are on defense all over the country for both the House AND the Senate in 2026. If we can take either or both back in 2026, that means we won’t have to wait just until 2028 to restore our democracy — we’ll finally have the power in Congress that we need to grind Trump’s takeover of our country to a screeching halt. But the oligarchs backing Trump know this too — they’re ALREADY writing million-dollar checks to prop up unpopular Republican incumbents across the country. That’s why Democrats can’t afford to sit it out until 2028 — we’ve got a democracy to save! [ ]So, can we count on your support of $5 or whatever you can chip in today to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in 2026? This is our chance to make a difference — we can’t waste it! If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: [ ]Contribute $5 [ ]Contribute $15 [ ]Contribute $30 [ ]Contribute $50 [ ]Contribute $100 [ ]Contribute $250 [ ]Give another amount Thank you for making a difference, —SDC

name: Marc Elias
subject: Let me explain...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey there, it's Marc Elias.

For years, I've gone to court to stop Trump and defend democracy -- and I've won 64 times. **Now, working with the DSCC, we're doing our part to safeguard voting rights, uphold the rule of law, and protect your freedom.**

But I won't lie: Trump's actions put all that work at risk -- and we need to fight back NOW. [**Support from grassroots Democrats like you is what powers the fight to flip the Senate so Democrats can put a stop to Trump's extremism. Will you give $5 to the DSCC to help us stop Trump's allies by winning back a Democratic Senate majority?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250910-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250910-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21188%2E9716520%2Ef-rWmA)

Let me explain further:

Donald Trump is ignoring due process and openly mocking the courts. He's threatening the very foundation of our democracy by attacking fair, free, and secure elections. And he's going after voting rights -- the very bedrock of our democracy.

Worst of all, Trump has a seemingly **endless** supply of fools and cowards in the Republican Party who are willing to help him.

But the DSCC and I are fighting back: The _moment_ Trump signed an executive order to interfere in our elections and threaten voting rights, we filed suit against him on behalf of Democrats nationwide. And the good news is, we've already notched some key victories in the case!

**But the fight isn't over yet. Donald Trump is an aspiring despot -- not just for a single day -- and despots _never_ willingly give up their power. We have to take it from them.**

Winning the Senate is the first step, and Democrats need to flip just four seats to claim the majority and wrest power away from the GOP.

**As I've said before, the fight for democracy is the fight of our generation.[Right now, the best thing YOU can do is chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand in this fight with me to unseat Senate Republicans and elect a Democratic Senate majority the first chance we get >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21844?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250910-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250910-MarcElias-EliasStandingUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=21188%2E9716520%2Ef-rWmA)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Friend,
This morning, Democrat Ghazala “Hidin’ Hashmi” hosted a so-called “roundtable discussion.” The catch? Attendees had to send a special RSVP just to find out the secret location.
Why? **Because her campaign is terrified of Republican Lt. Governor nominee John Reid** showing up and asking the tough questions she’s been dodging all year.
John Reid has challenged Hashmi to **TEN debates.** She has accepted **ZERO.** Instead, she hides behind closed doors, staging “invite-only” events while refusing to face Virginians - or the press.
Here are just a few questions Hidin’ Hashmi refuses to answer:
* Why did she back indefinite school closures and forced masking of children?
* Why hasn’t she taken responsibility for massive student learning loss?
* Why does she support biological males in girls’ sports and locker rooms?
* Why won’t she debate John Reid, even once?

Virginians deserve answers. Instead, all they get from Hidin’ Hashmi is silence.
**John Reid is ready to lead -** with honesty, fairness, and common sense. But to fight back against Hashmi’s secrecy and the Democrats’ radical agenda, we need your immediate support.
**We need your help** to ensure John Reid and the Republican Party of Virginia hold Democrats accountable and win in November.

clean_body: | | | | Where is she??? Friend, This morning, Democrat Ghazala “Hidin’ Hashmi” hosted a so-called “roundtable discussion.” The catch? Attendees had to send a special RSVP just to find out the secret location. Why? Because her campaign is terrified of Republican Lt. Governor nominee John Reid showing up and asking the tough questions she’s been dodging all year. John Reid has challenged Hashmi to TEN debates. She has accepted ZERO. Instead, she hides behind closed doors, staging “invite-only” events while refusing to face Virginians - or the press. Here are just a few questions Hidin’ Hashmi refuses to answer: Why did she back indefinite school closures and forced masking of children? Why hasn’t she taken responsibility for massive student learning loss? Why does she support biological males in girls’ sports and locker rooms? Why won’t she debate John Reid, even once? Virginians deserve answers. Instead, all they get from Hidin’ Hashmi is silence. John Reid is ready to lead - with honesty, fairness, and common sense. But to fight back against Hashmi’s secrecy and the Democrats’ radical agenda, we need your immediate support. We need your help to ensure John Reid and the Republican Party of Virginia hold Democrats accountable and win in November. | | The contrast could not be clearer: John Reid is ready to face Virginians. Hidin’ Hashmi is hiding from them. Let’s send her packing. The Republican Party of Virginia | = \- == PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF VIRGINIA

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Nobody deserves this more than you.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2075qzvvmayoo07hcoplht4i5avfq7bib9g64qx2jfl0eymtrpxmhduxnqjfdig6jg050mvzylk6s5xmipy&__stmp=t2drek&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3najjmynyi5jxi9ly46z9oih7gshpcysrhle27yjqpx95339gbgnjjywpqu65ln5f524gm892mua1vebnaedan2tb8l9vkr9newc82va685ow6npn9kilswifcst6l49ry6w6vyzth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3najjmynyi5jxi9ly46z9oih7gshpcysrhle27yjqpx95339gbgnjjywpqu65ln5f524gm892mua1vebnaedan2tb8l9vkr9newc82va685ow6npn9kilswifcst6l49ry6w6vyzth&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2drek&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is openly rooting for Trump’s death. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1cd7106636434d288aa953d035f7f291&_e=7s5nK1D1h13RqFCQmOwGyXDubhSpdUx5N--JwgyH6o6dt-FFwXyJP3c_OTCr2Ag7lvzrcisczytkwgaY2FS7AxeNHjNv73ksXs_NuIISn-CHVOcd1aJD9MwSCzVh_0jQp-2xiKreKNg4NQIDn8ndWZ_so7kVkbqCgzNJPShCVOcEnd1VB-JIjSAxdH_7sT4wC8evGChXiZI1US_9xqbqRMpjE4ud-jgD3t44kpKFH1dOQNvTBRbVf-SHmx3ws9TQyjSFDMQpv-lkHlL2DWGFgc7uYeBlp-YOTg-K2r57_9kAf5ZsRn5U3sc2nhE4ZeFoLuM0U-AIw-I83CSvWdoATZ0Ub4ufSTbQD8yuyhDg5Zw3d4lA1ioqkVn3MOOOTWsvliurhUOaeeNOYPVfVFHsvtPo0pqXpf8PR90AQzB7UZYigkLeT3pErrCCY2xDRYlhCAY8eU6SWajC-0jLFQAsuznHyl4zqakwcHftsbvN8e916KHgDy_M2mkYyGjCQ_MrPyLQtAsGKXAtsFJCqtp72r_uzUfuery4nPbkXokAI_XXLgM8TMfOwF176YtXYS27nney3nqq24tw_Sg72vtCh7izPBsLIScCjWiF7zeNWjbu9u6Nh_IwHq-Bpjw9oRadIrGTZGOSEqlRPxn6tO4Y3ICQoPFJsOe9HoaIe1HAo7XhIm21JaVzxIAGsud1drcyIQ3v5NhKLeQ6wNEZsagkIuatuBL4vwuZIKlHTiYwiTypjWzW6UzbJ4I2sIebHuu2)

---
_[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1cd7106636434d288aa953d035f7f291&_e=7s5nK1D1h13RqFCQmOwGyXDubhSpdUx5N--JwgyH6o6dt-FFwXyJP3c_OTCr2Ag7lvzrcisczytkwgaY2FS7AxeNHjNv73ksXs_NuIISn-CHVOcd1aJD9MwSCzVh_0jQp-2xiKreKNg4NQIDn8ndWZ_so7kVkbqCgzNJPShCVOcEnd1VB-JIjSAxdH_7sT4wC8evGChXiZI1US_9xqbqRMpjE4ud-jgD3t44kpKFH1dOQNvTBRbVf-SHmx3ws9TQyjSFDMQpv-lkHlL2DWGFgX4T-zDM3UWwYe0VPmEchdio78pkC78-LFVWWDlzgZ9_cRuXx4_sISMpd-jX3dXjeiG_BzZldmpTCUQbBCatuq_E_ePv92brcbundfXN537gkILA_FrhZcTUqN0aWUQhm3QbXklpnUNax8-BlXb4XopuWTxtkbrdYV9U9AfLGd1xXvPHFsMewH4TaTDNoLPawj3gHsNOgG49XWZ4F6YFBMWy29CqA4lIaTscgAtzATPERIC1MtErDUQ3hfWFM2SQvTT8BjB4KHZbSSPpxkW4OFGBoI0NJai51fMl6ctAQI1bN47uuSgcRXcmZucqjfkWtlmDYqkc0XAlG0OU1RGcxiVoT7yzzUM6MoRgguF7OBmw6BnZzpKOY9pTGHWfds2LAyh5pMzKiVX7x_hOTCocv231xCfyeOaJzDd_6MizV11eDv3DfsUNH7o5QNzfO2n9QXs_Kuasz77aAnmCCDd9MyvpOtGEz3hHs_Gcc66ZXVrW)_

Fellow Conservative,

I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. _**Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States?**_

**As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t.** Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: **arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar.**

And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous.

_They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota._
_They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments._
_They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed._

And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE.

clean_body: Minnesota Governor Tim Walz is openly rooting for Trump’s death. | Fellow Conservative, I can only say THANK GOD President Trump beat Kamala Harris last November. Can you imagine having a vice president who has so little moral clarity that he would root for the death of a sitting president of the United States? As a former Navy SEAL, I can’t. Tim Walz personifies everything that I’m not: arrogant, overconfident, hateful, mean-spirited, progressive, deceitful — and on top of it all, a liar. And here’s the kicker: my opponent in this Senate race is even worse. She’s more progressive than Walz, more radical than Walz, and every bit as dangerous. They both want to ban firearms in Minnesota. They both begin their speeches with land acknowledgments. They both see Republicans not as a loyal opposition, but as enemies to be crushed. And if they get their way, they’ll forcefully instill their warped vision of America on EVERYONE. This fight matters. This isn’t just about insults, or even about Walz. It’s about you. It’s about me. It’s about anyone who believes in this country’s founding values. Walz and his allies think we’re “buffoons.” They think we’re “aholes.” They think we’ll take it. I’ve faced far worse. I joined the Marine Corps after 9/11. I’ve served our nation in over 70 countries. I know what it takes to win against chaos and extremism. And I know what it means to serve something bigger than yourself. This Senate race is my most challenging mission yet. Minnesota hasn’t gone red since 1976. I’m the underdog. But with your help, I can deliver our team a win in this critical battleground race. If you’re as outraged as I am that Walz would wish death on the President of the United States, You have a choice. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9259047/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvbVNZS2Y2cXByRQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTA/LbmNsWjFOdFA2Qg/qP2hpZHM9bmNxNjFoeEJXdXBHMHJscw/gaMGlyw/sdj12124206)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more... And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__ Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Jena for CO
subject: Making sure you saw our recap
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Friend,
You can’t make up the madness that has come out of the Trump Administration over the last few weeks – especially the direct hits on Colorado.
Take a minute to read our recap below, and chip in today to support Jena’s campaign for Attorney General. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
– Jena for CO
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
It’s been a chaotic few weeks, Peter.
First: Trump threatened that if the State of Colorado didn’t release Tina Peters (his fellow election conspiracy theorist and convicted criminal) from prison, there would be “harsh measures” taken.
Then: Trump announced he would be relocating U.S. Space Command from Colorado to Alabama, citing Colorado’s use of mail ballots as the reason why he has a problem with our state.
Now: It’s time to send the message that Colorado is ready to fight back. Jena has stood up to Trump as Secretary of State, and now she is running to be the Attorney General who will protect our rights and freedoms from Trump’s extremism.
Chip in now to show you’re with Jena in the fight against Trump → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg?&]
While we don’t know what Trump will do next, here’s what we do know: Colorado voters have rejected him three times in our free and fair elections. Trump blames mail ballots instead of his failing policies.
Tina Peters was convicted in a fair trial by a jury of her peers. Trump’s attempts to put pressure on the justice system is an embarrassment.
We must reject this behavior and elect an AG who will continue to uphold the law and protect our rights.
Chip in today to help us power Jena’s campaign in the wake of Trump’s chaos. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
Thanks,
Team Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

Louisville, CO 80027
United States

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: I need you Derek

Helping people in Western Pennsylvania is front and center to everything I do.
When I talk to folks at home, they tell me exactly what they want from their government:
They want a tax cut that actually helps working people—not handouts for billionaires. They want Medicare and Social Security protected, not gutted to line corporate pockets. They don’t want Medicaid slashed so Wall Street and robber barons can get even richer. They want leaders to fight for the basic bargain of the American Dream.
That’s why I’m in this fight. I’m sick and tired of the Wall Street-driven corporate mindset that outsourced our jobs, rigged the economy for the wealthy, that price gouges hard working families, and that crushes unions and kills small businesses.
I work every day in Congress to change that. But my Republican colleagues? They aren’t fighting for any of that. They’re fighting for the same broken system that sold out hardworking families.
[_**Look, I’ll stand up to them every chance I get, but I need you standing with me in this work. I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: **Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.** [Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod and the Democratic Party of Georgia. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114975954/568772748/35740560?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_091025_SHERRODSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2ZlMWU4Zi02MzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7l4l1UMTCpKyORLkcdpX8Xz8ujaCJTRKPZSDMStqMys=) We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! _We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._ Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. **But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.** [Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. Defend the right to vote by adding your name now >>>>

| **Trump just passed a plan that will disenfranchise MILLIONS of voters – rural Americans, military service members, and disabled Americans are all at risk!** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114976018/568772849/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250910_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFlM2M2My02MzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80-xVFg4wwWgyAHy5s9frkof2AE3NV6frpmFFC6jNvU=&emci=606d958e-a48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1d1e3c63-638e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114976019/568772850/399364649?refcode=NDCAF_20250910_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDFlM2M2My02MzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=80-xVFg4wwWgyAHy5s9frkof2AE3NV6frpmFFC6jNvU=&emci=606d958e-a48d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=1d1e3c63-638e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)

**Nearly 1 in 3 Americans used mail-in voting to cast their ballots in the last election** – and studies confirm it doesn’t favor one party over the other, it simply makes voting more accessible.

Donald Trump knows Americans disapprove of his MAGA agenda – **Trump’s disapproval rating stands at 55% according to the Economist.**

That’s why he’s pushing forward an unconstitutional order to ban mail-in ballots and suppress the votes of millions of Americans!

_We’re standing up in Congress to defend the right to vote but we need grassroots Democrats like you to join us._

subject: You're Invited! Kelvin King for Secretary of State Campaign Kickoff
body:
You're Invited! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lwfaa/icymi-kelvin-king-for-ga-sec-of-state-14193059?e=cb396c52a2)

# _You're Invited!_****
# **Kelvin King for Secretary of State
Campaign Kickoff**
Friends & Supporters, We are excited to officially kick off Kelvin King’s campaign for Secretary of State! Although Kelvin filed to run in July, we didn’t have a chance to host a formal kickoff — until now. This event is an opportunity to gather supporters, energize our team, and create a rallying point to build momentum for this important race.
**Join us on Tuesday, October 7th, 2025, from 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM at the Park Bench Atlanta at the Battery.**

**Location:** 900 Battery Ave SE, Ste 1060, Atlanta, GA 30339 Come connect, celebrate, and learn more about Kelvin’s vision for the future.

Bring your friends, family, and neighbors — let’s make this kickoff a memorable start to a successful campaign!
**Parking recommendation:**
Parking is available in the Red Deck, which is the closest parking lot to the restaurant.

Be sure to RSVP! Space is limited. We look forward to seeing you there and kicking off this journey together!

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: NH’s Senate race could be one of the most expensive — ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We always knew this race would be tough. Now it’s official.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250910_1_expensive?refcode=em20250910-2290&amount=5&refcode2=2290_582294_y_-Uj-&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250910_1_expensive?refcode=em20250910-2290&amount=5&refcode2=2290_582294_y_-Uj-&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)
We always knew this race would be a tough one — but now it's official:
**National Republicans are projecting it will be the most expensive race in New Hampshire history.**
Why? Because they think they’ve found their golden ticket in John E. Sununu — a former senator who sold out to corporate boardrooms and has a record that fits perfectly with Donald Trump’s extreme agenda. He’ll have the full backing of Republican megadonors and super PACs.
But we’ve got something they can’t buy: **grassroots power from real people who believe in fighting for working families, protecting reproductive rights, and putting people over profits.**
[**So please, chip in $5 or whatever you can right now. Every bit helps us stay in this fight to beat the GOP, keep New Hampshire blue, and flip the Senate in 2026.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250910_1_expensive?refcode=em20250910-2290&amount=5&refcode2=2290_582294_y_-Uj-&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250910_1_expensive?amount=5&refcode=em20250910-2290&refcode2=2290_582294_y_-Uj-&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)**
Thank you,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250910-1?t=2&refcode2=2290_582294_y_-Uj-&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=2290%2E582294%2Ey_-Uj-)

name: Senator Jennifer Boysko
subject: Boysko Bulletin: Invite to the Tysons Stakeholders Alliance "No Fairfax Casino Webinar"
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/Bulletin.jpeg]
Boysko Bulletin: Invite to the "No Fairfax Casino Webinar"
Dear Peter,
The fight to keep a casino out of the Tysons community continues. Please join us for a webinar on September 24 at 7 pm. I’ve included the Tysons Stakeholders Alliance flyer below.
Click here to register. [https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_Rqt00jQbTRmfU7loyV7jdQ]
Please share this flyer and encourage your friends and neighbors to learn more about the ongoing work to keep Tysons casino free.
Kindest regards,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2024%20February%20Images/electronic%20signature.png]
Jennifer B. Boysko
Member, Senate of Virginia
Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church)
PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jb27-website] .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/102624/images/2025%20September/2e773531-7687-4c07-a50e-7ba0667b7990.png]
The Tysons Stakeholders Alliance Invites You to:
“No Tysons Casino – A Webinar for Concerned Residents of Fairfax County”
September 24 at 7 pm
The Tysons Stakeholders Alliance is an alliance of residents who live in the Greater Tysons region who are opposed to a casino in our community. We invite everyone concerned about the Tysons casino project to attend our upcoming webinar on September 24.
On September 24 from 7:00-8:00 p.m., join the Advisory Board members of the Tysons Stakeholders Alliance for an informational webinar about why a casino is a bad idea for Fairfax County.
You’ll hear from Paula Martino, Andy Pavord, Claudia Diamond and Sally Horn about the many reasons that this would be a bad development for our community. Among the topics to be covered: current status of the casino proposal and what to expect next, how a casino will impact the local economy and your pocketbook, how a casino will affect the fabric of our community, and what you can do to help fight it. There will be an opportunity to submit questions to panelists at the end of the webinar.
REGISTER HERE [https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/WN_Rqt00jQbTRmfU7loyV7jdQ] and feel free to share the registration link with others in your network.
Keep in Touch
I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, and Juliet Morro. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Friend me on Facebook [https://bit.ly/2PskgOp] and follow me on X. [https://bit.ly/3uLhVhC]
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe.
Friends of Jennifer Boysko
PO Box 247
Herndon, VA 20172
United States

clean_body: [] Boysko Bulletin: Invite to the "No Fairfax Casino Webinar" Dear Peter, The fight to keep a casino out of the Tysons community continues. Please join us for a webinar on September 24 at 7 pm. I’ve included the Tysons Stakeholders Alliance flyer below. Click here to register. [] Please share this flyer and encourage your friends and neighbors to learn more about the ongoing work to keep Tysons casino free. Kindest regards, [] Jennifer B. Boysko Member, Senate of Virginia Representing the newly created 38th Senate District making up the northernmost portions of Fairfax County (Great Falls, Herndon, McLean, Reston, WolfTrap, parts of unincorporated Vienna and a slice of Falls Church) PS If you would like to support my work, please visit my fundraising page [] . [] The Tysons Stakeholders Alliance Invites You to: “No Tysons Casino – A Webinar for Concerned Residents of Fairfax County” September 24 at 7 pm The Tysons Stakeholders Alliance is an alliance of residents who live in the Greater Tysons region who are opposed to a casino in our community. We invite everyone concerned about the Tysons casino project to attend our upcoming webinar on September 24. On September 24 from 7:00-8:00 p.m., join the Advisory Board members of the Tysons Stakeholders Alliance for an informational webinar about why a casino is a bad idea for Fairfax County. You’ll hear from Paula Martino, Andy Pavord, Claudia Diamond and Sally Horn about the many reasons that this would be a bad development for our community. Among the topics to be covered: current status of the casino proposal and what to expect next, how a casino will impact the local economy and your pocketbook, how a casino will affect the fabric of our community, and what you can do to help fight it. There will be an opportunity to submit questions to panelists at the end of the webinar. REGISTER HERE [] and feel free to share the registration link with others in your network. Keep in Touch I am back in District 38 with my Chief of Staff Karen Harrison, and aides, Kathy Shupe, and Juliet Morro. For constituent services and to schedule meetings with your community group, please call (703) 437-0086 or email Senator Boysko@senate.virginia.gov. Friend me on Facebook [] and follow me on X. [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe. Friends of Jennifer Boysko PO Box 247 Herndon, VA 20172 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

| | | **President Trump, you suck at being president. You are just so terrible, in so many ways.** If all the presidents who sucked from throughout history got together, and formed a club, they would elect you "president of Presidents Who Suck." **[Please resign today, for the good of America](https://default.salsalabs.org/T741697a6-58af-437c-85ca-32612da8268e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** Focus on retirement, where you can suck at things like golf, fishing, yelling at the kids on your lawn, and other things that won't put the country in peril. [**President Trump, you suck. Please resign NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0249a024-773e-46ca-a62f-20be3f6d5353/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Announcing a major arrest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
This week my office announced an arrest and the filing of felony charges:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em250910&t=1&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)
Abuse or neglect of our elders is unacceptable. My office is taking action to hold perpetrators accountable:
**This week, we announced an arrest and filed felony charges for alleged severe neglect at an elder care facility in San Diego County.**
The owner of the facility left it severely understaffed. Residents were often left in bed all day in soiled diapers — sometimes for days at a time. They suffered from bed sores, dehydration, and malnourishment.
_No one should be treated this way._ It’s horrific to imagine our parents or grandparents suffering like this, and it won’t be tolerated in California.
Our elders deserve care that is safe, dignified, and held to the highest standards. When trusted caregivers put Californians in harm’s way, we will act.
Elder abuse isn’t just cruel and harmful — it often goes hand-in-hand with fraud against Medi-Cal, the program that supports elder care across our state.
**As Attorney General, I am committed to rooting out fraud, standing against abuse, and holding bad actors accountable — and this week marks a major step forward in those efforts.**
**[If you agree this work is critical, will you chip in today to my re-election campaign so I can keep fighting for seniors, families, and all who call California home?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250910-a?refcode=em20250910-1945&refcode2=1945_1088799_9Llf6m&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250910-a?refcode=em20250910-1945&amount=5&refcode2=1945_1088799_9Llf6m&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)**
Thank you for anything you can give to support our work. I’m grateful for your partnership.[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250910-a?refcode=em20250910-1945&refcode2=1945_1088799_9Llf6m&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)
Rob
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250910-a?refcode=em20250910-1945&refcode2=1945_1088799_9Llf6m&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250910-a?refcode=em20250910-1945&refcode2=1945_1088799_9Llf6m&akid=1945%2E1088799%2E9Llf6m)**

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m working in Congress. You shape what comes next.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114977377/568776921/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDkxNzg5OC02NzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDgKPE2DLwCZmBkndo1nJQzB1Bu77pp4NQENw2Kh1Ts=)
It’s only been one week since Congress returned to session, and already House Republicans are signaling they’d rather provoke a government shutdown than work across the aisle. Democrats haven’t even been invited to the negotiating table – and it’s our communities, our families, and our future that will bear the cost if things grind to a halt. I’ve joined my colleagues in demanding that GOP leadership allow bipartisan talks to move forward. **[But while Republicans delay, I’m focused on doing my job. That means checking in with folks back home. What should Congress be focused on? What’s keeping you up at night? Share your priorities in our survey below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114977383/568776977/-1975055819?refcode=em-9.9.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDkxNzg5OC02NzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDgKPE2DLwCZmBkndo1nJQzB1Bu77pp4NQENw2Kh1Ts=&emci=38aea0b2-4c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed917898-678e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13891387)** | **[Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114977388/568776979/-1975055819?refcode=em-9.9.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDkxNzg5OC02NzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xDgKPE2DLwCZmBkndo1nJQzB1Bu77pp4NQENw2Kh1Ts=&emci=38aea0b2-4c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ed917898-678e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=13891387)**

We’re on the frontlines in the battle to save our democracy from GOP corruption. Peter,

**HAPPENING NOW:** Missouri Republicans are forcing through two pieces of legislation to rig the congressional maps and make it nearly impossible for ballot measures to pass — _all on behalf of President Donald Trump._

The GOP's intentions are clear: They want to secure majority rule, split up Black and brown communities, and stop Missouri voters from passing the popular measures Republicans are so staunchly against.

Missouri Democrats are working overtime to fight back. They're going as far as _sleeping_ on the Missouri House floor in a days-long protest against Republicans' unconstitutional acts.

[**We’re on the frontlines in the battle to save our democracy from GOP corruption, and we need to show Trump and his allies that we-the-people are standing with Democrats in this fight.
