name: Donald John Trump
subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2075qzzqujjhjooktigqsi0jo7fvh5ov88qyzu6u9fh3bcblsjwzi5h2w7lf9zvkkgj8dxuo8ujjh4paj96&__stmp=t2du1f&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3nak6iga9cdtqdiobbla0xs8q8nxlba5bfq829bs9qmvj8xrbzi2t8hk7swwho9sp4nyu46ltqjkgdhh8kelf9qj82hh9d4u9ceagkiunyyucskuy812lci0qsiq86dalbevuwlz12&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3nak6iga9cdtqdiobbla0xs8q8nxlba5bfq829bs9qmvj8xrbzi2t8hk7swwho9sp4nyu46ltqjkgdhh8kelf9qj82hh9d4u9ceagkiunyyucskuy812lci0qsiq86dalbevuwlz12&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2du1f&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

let us explain –
#
Peter,
This race just became a two-person contest.
Over the past few months, we’ve seen our coalition grow — and our continued momentum is even more important now that our campaign is the only progressive movement in this race.
**And to bring this home for Detroit, Downriver, and beyond, we're going to need all the help we can get.**
We're running a people-powered campaign to represent EVERYONE in the Mighty 13th. One of Congress’s richest and most corrupt multimillionaires is running against us, and we're going to need to work now to make sure we can mount a full fight.
This is where you come in. We're approaching our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we still need to add 71 individual donors to reach our goal.
**[Peter, our communities are unified towards a better vision for our future. But we need to put in the work NOW to make sure we can make this dream a reality. # Hello Capitalists,
### **Here 's everything you need to be following today:**
* Trump unloads on Powell after stunning inflation drop
* NASDAQ bets big on Tokenization with huge investment
* Oracle has its best day in 26 years
* Bessent shreds the fed over 17 years of failures
* Klarna's IPO soars above expectations
* Microsoft's new partner wheels out a huge share offering

### **Today 's markets:**
* **DOW: 45475.30 ( ⬇️0.52%) - 🔴**
* **S &P: 6538.81 (⬆️0.40%) - ✅**
* **NASDAQ: 21941.33 ( ⬆️0.28%) - ✅**
* **CBOE VIX Volatility Index: $15.10 ( ⬆️0.33%) - ⚠️⬆️**

* * *
* * *
# Trump slams Powell after inflation drop stuns Wall Street
U.S. wholesale prices **[unexpectedly fell 0.1%](https://substack.com/redirect/48dc01e4-54ae-4942-be3e-be754d4c7c22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in August, defying economists' forecasts of a rise and contrasting July's surge, prompting President Donald Trump to again call on Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell to implement an interest rate cut in an upcoming meeting.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48dc01e4-54ae-4942-be3e-be754d4c7c22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Inflation Drops Sharply:** August's headline Producer Price Index declined 0.1% monthly, reversing July's notable increase and surprising markets with lower-than-expected inflation signals.
* **Core Measure Also Declines:** Excluding volatile food and energy, core PPI mirrored the drop at 0.1% for the month, against projections of a 0.3% uptick, indicating broader price stabilization.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5aaeb34-5f20-4320-8ec0-23cebbb723d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Forecasts Widely Missed:** Economists via Dow Jones anticipated a 0.3% headline rise, but the actual decline highlights subdued wholesale cost pressures across sectors.
* **Market Bets on Cuts:** Traders now see a 100% chance of a quarter-point rate cut on Sept. 17, with some expecting a half-point move, per CME Group's FedWatch tool.
* **From the White House:** The data reignited calls for rate cuts.
"Much like the BLS has failed the American people, so has Jerome 'Too Late' Powell -- who has officially run out of excuses and must cut the rates now," White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said in a statement.
* **BLS Revisions Spark Debate:** Citigroup's Andrew Hollenhorst suggests revised payroll data from Tuesday could justify a half-point rate cut.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Investors are watching this fast-growing tech company](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's **Mode Mobile** , 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.
Their EarnPhone has helped users earn and save over $325M, driving $75M+ in revenue and **[an eye-popping 32,481% growth](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** And having secured partnerships with **Walmart** and **Best Buy** , Mode's not stopping there...
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into **[an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **The difference is that you still have a chance to invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering before the window closes.
They've just been granted the stock ticker _**$MODE**_ by the Nasdaq and over 50,000 investors participated in their previously sold out offering at $0.30/share.
**⏳[$52M+ already raised -- invest before the opportunity closes.](https://substack.com/redirect/7a1f1373-dd48-4a73-986c-ed98ae1a6eb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
* * *
| | POLL
---

* * *
* * *
# Nasdaq makes $50 million investment into the future of stock trading
In a bold move **[bridging traditional finance and crypto](https://substack.com/redirect/0f851e17-6904-457d-a960-7a912764c765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , Nasdaq announced Tuesday a $50 million investment in Gemini, the Winklevoss twins' crypto exchange, forging a partnership to deliver custodial services and tokenized asset tools to institutional clients amid evolving regulations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f851e17-6904-457d-a960-7a912764c765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Investment Fuels Strategic Alliance** : Nasdaq Ventures' $50 million stake in Gemini enables non-exclusive collaboration, distinct from the exchange's upcoming IPO raising up to $317 million on Friday.
* **Custody Services Expanded** : The partnership allows Nasdaq to provide Gemini's custodial solutions, including multi-custodial and staking options, to its financial institution clients for secure crypto asset management.
* **Calypso Distribution Boosted** : Gemini becomes a key distributor for Nasdaq's Calypso trade management system, enhancing collateral handling across traditional and digital assets.
* **Tokenization Landscape Advanced** : This aligns with Nasdaq's SEC proposal for trading tokenized stocks and ETPs, positioning it as a pioneer in blockchain-based securities integration.

* * *
* * *
# Bessent slams The Fed "foremost driver of inequality in America"
In an oped published to International Economy, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent likened the Federal Reserve's post-2008 monetary experiments **[to a runaway virus,](https://substack.com/redirect/6a632204-393d-4053-a98d-43309f562859?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/6a632204-393d-4053-a98d-43309f562859?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)that have deepened inequality and blurred fiscal lines, jeopardizing its independence and prompting urgent calls for reform to restore credibility. Bessent argues that:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6a632204-393d-4053-a98d-43309f562859?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Flawed Forecasts Undermine Credibility:** The Fed's post-2008 tools failed to predict economic trends, overestimating GDP growth by $1 trillion, revealing overreliance on faulty models and neglect of supply-side dynamics.
* **Wealth Effect Widens Inequality:** Post-crisis policies favored asset owners, boosting large firms and homeowners while squeezing smaller businesses and locking younger, poorer households out of wealth gains.
* **Regulatory Overreach Sparks Conflicts:** The Dodd-Frank Act's expansion of Fed oversight, highlighted by the 2023 Silicon Valley Bank collapse, muddies accountability, necessitating a return to specialized bank supervision.
* **Reform Urgently Needed:** To preserve independence, the Fed must limit unconventional policies like quantitative easing and undergo a nonpartisan review to refocus on its core mandate.
* * *
* * *

# Oracle stock explodes 40% on AI Boom, has its best day in 26 years
Oracle's shares **[skyrocketed more than 40%](https://substack.com/redirect/df85cc85-fe33-4af4-a56e-8fb0f4d52808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday--the company's best day since 1999--after reporting a staggering $455 billion cloud backlog, fueled by explosive AI demand that shattered Wall Street expectations and propelled its market cap toward $1 trillion.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/05e569fb-c003-4f36-8961-37cab65a9865?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Backlog Surges Dramatically:** Remaining performance obligations hit $455 billion, up 359% year-over-year, far exceeding analysts' $180 billion forecast.
* **Revenue Projections Soar:** Cloud infrastructure expected to reach $18 billion in fiscal 2026, scaling to $144 billion over next four years amid AI growth.
* **Analysts Stunned Historic:** Melius Research's Ben Reitzes called the backlog "astounding" and "historic," while D.A. Davidson's Gil Luria deemed numbers "absolutely staggering."
* **AI Trade Confirmed:** Wells Fargo analysts hailed results as "momentous confirmation" of Oracle's AI strategy, boosting investor confidence in long-term cloud dominance.

* * *
* * *
# Klarna's IPO soars above its target price taking its value to $15 Billion
Swedish buy-now-pay-later giant Klarna **[priced its long-awaited IPO at $40](https://substack.com/redirect/1efd9489-9998-47b5-b886-30229e11053e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** per share Tuesday, topping its target and valuing the company at $15 billion on the New York Stock Exchange, signaling strong investor appetite for fintech amid a rebounding tech market.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/905ddae7-c280-4fcc-bc48-4095359d2934?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Pricing Exceeds Expectations:** With shares set at $40, surpassing anticipated $35-$37 range, the IPO will raise $1.37 billion total with $200 million for Klarna and $1.17 billion to shareholders.
* **Revenue Model Diversifies:** Klarna generates income via merchant fees, interest on installment plans, and late charges; its Q2 revenue rose 20% to $823 million despite $53 million net loss.
* **Strategic Bank Pivot:** Klarna is rebranding as a digital retail bank to broaden its services beyond just short-term financing, competing with Affirm in the evolving payments landscape.
* **Market Timing Optimistic:** The debut follows successful tech IPOs like Circle and Figma, testing Wall Street's enthusiasm after earlier delays over U.S. tariff concerns.

* * *
* * *
# Fresh off the back of yesterday's $17 Billion Microsoft deal, Nebius launches a $3 Billion dollar share deal
Amsterdam-based AI infrastructure firm Nebius **[announced Wednesday](https://substack.com/redirect/f4898f11-80ac-4988-9ada-cc55b4d6da3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** it will raise $3 billion through convertible notes and shares to fuel its explosive growth, this comes after a blockbuster $17.4 billion GPU deal with Microsoft that could reshape global cloud computing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f4898f11-80ac-4988-9ada-cc55b4d6da3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Funding Breakdown Details:** The capital infusion splits into $2 billion private convertible notes and $1 billion public Class A shares, led by Goldman Sachs with Morgan Stanley, BofA, and Citigroup as key underwriters.
* **Strategic Microsoft Pact:** The five-year agreement supplies Microsoft with GPU capacity, potentially expanding to $19.4 billion in value through added services, bolstering Nebius' role in AI hardware supply.
* **Expansion Fuel Injection:** Proceeds from the expansion will target acquiring more compute hardware, securing land for data centers, and partnering with power providers to meet surging demand from generative AI technologies.
* * *
* * *

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Philly: Let’s pack City Hall for Kendra & Nicolas this Thursday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
Be there as City Council kicks off the new session! | | | It’s Back to Council Time, Peter! 🎉 This Thursday, September 11th, Philadelphia City Council returns from summer recess for its first meeting of the new session — and our WFP City Councilmembers **Kendra Brooks** and **Nicolas O’Rourke** will be back on the floor fighting for working families. As they step back into Council chambers, we want them to feel the strength of our movement, with the halls of City Hall filled with supporters like you, showing them that Philadelphia has their back. We’ll gather outside City Hall (corner of Broad & JFK) starting at 8:00 am. name: John Padora
subject: This is how we beat Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Together, we can flip CO-04 and take back the House.

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6bsqqOQaHLORFoSa3qY6Tw~~/AAUS1hA~/LfSurkFIj_97awnerF__PIdkZ5eRJCTfx3mVQoqYCLmSdaZexjaPn8e4wA6dKpQGC0i8S0hp8hY5qAyr40KipgY0NGVoN-r2iS5NGEeUHdlTYc8YIff_TTRNHB0Rhlcd)
| | Friend, Let’s be real: Lauren Boebert has turned our district into a punchline. While families here struggle with rising costs, housing shortages, and rural hospitals closing their doors, Boebert is too busy chasing headlines, posting memes, and picking fights on social media. She’s not fighting for us, she’s fighting for attention. Boebert calls herself a fighter, but she’s really just a rubber stamp for Donald Trump’s extremist agenda. She cheers on mass deportations, backs attacks on reproductive freedom, and spends her time stoking culture wars instead of fixing the very real problems people in Eastern Colorado face every single day. That’s not leadership. That’s theater. And it’s embarrassing. I know what it’s like to grow up without a safety net. To worry about bills, to rely on Medicaid and food stamps, to claw my way out of addiction and chronic pain. Those experiences didn’t break me — they built me. And they’re why I’m running: **to fight for farmers, working families, and kids who deserve a future built on solutions, not soundbites.** Lauren Boebert has had her chance. She chose the spotlight. I’m choosing the people. Now I need your help to get this campaign off the ground. We’re up against Trump’s MAGA machine, corporate PAC money, and a politician who thrives on distraction. But if we stand together, we can send her packing and bring real leadership back to Colorado’s 4th District. [**Add your name to say you're on board for getting rid of Lauren Boebert and electing a champion for the people.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/SjW9n5OjuNIlVSTjybuRAA~~/AAUS1hA~/e_zyAER6OyIyxnAWikiMe-lQRHW8nuOFmzahErfqfaGGCVbjJP7UHfyTqfm3K0EzlbTwh3km8S_u8x9ZW7PypE10lx9gcKx0zrgJ8ZwlCRgxfulYztcrlCUtkUnu23CplnBsYrTLCAIFFqEKkG_6mgAAmlrQxzuNDIPOWi9V-nig634Y9c158cLcXjj6srvLQHfA-X1zAwW-obSb457KIm9FFHFQ0NiAxZnn0gOVFExcqlkiLHytCA4ewiIpqpDrAq3PuHZZC9jGOfd131OsDQ~~) | | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/SjW9n5OjuNIlVSTjybuRAA~~/AAUS1hA~/e_zyAER6OyIyxnAWikiMe-lQRHW8nuOFmzahErfqfaGGCVbjJP7UHfyTqfm3K0EzlbTwh3km8S_u8x9ZW7PypE10lx9gcKx0zrgJ8ZwlCRgxfulYztcrlCUtkUnu23CplnBsYrTLCAIFFqEKkG_6mgAAmlrQxzuNDIPOWi9V-nig634Y9c158cLcXjj6srvLQHfA-X1zAwW-obSb457KIm9FFHFQ0NiAxZnn0gOVFExcqlkiLHytCA4ewiIpqpDrAq3PuHZZC9jGOfd131OsDQ~~)

Thank you,
John Padora

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to the Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114979431/568783437/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzkyNmY0NS02OThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ytiUs4w968463vvzjuryeqnkhuuaOve8Nbiio3yUCk8=&emci=70f1cd1e-e289-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=23926f45-698e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, urging him to reverse the Trump administration's disastrous decision to eliminate funding for Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs).** This decision is a blow to widely supported salmon recovery and habitat restoration efforts and undermines longstanding Tribal partnerships built over many years. RFEGs represent a unique model to engage local communities in salmon recovery through hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships with tribal, federal, state, and private entities. Operating as fourteen independent entities across Washington state, these groups sponsor some of the largest, most complex habitat projects focused on specific geographic regions, allowing them to tailor projects to local needs while contributing to a statewide coordinated salmon recovery strategy. From the letter: _"We write to express our deep concern regarding the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service's (FWS) elimination of $1,285,000 of Fiscal Year 2025 funding for Washington state's Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This widely supported program is a critical component of community-driven salmon recovery efforts, creating thousands of jobs and spurring millions of dollars in economic development across all corners of our state. Your decision to cut funding undermines longstanding partnerships and progress that have been built over many years._ _Many RFEGs rely on federal funds as core operational support that enable them to leverage additional resources. Without this foundation, the capacity to plan, coordinate and execute complex restoration projects will be drastically diminished."_ A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy. I am committed to standing up for our environment even in the face of the Trump administration's destructive cuts. clean_body: I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to the Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum. | | | | I joined some of my Democratic colleagues in a letter to Department of the Interior Secretary Doug Burgum, urging him to reverse the Trump administration's disastrous decision to eliminate funding for Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This decision is a blow to widely supported salmon recovery and habitat restoration efforts and undermines longstanding Tribal partnerships built over many years. RFEGs represent a unique model to engage local communities in salmon recovery through hands-on habitat restoration, public outreach, and partnerships with tribal, federal, state, and private entities. Operating as fourteen independent entities across Washington state, these groups sponsor some of the largest, most complex habitat projects focused on specific geographic regions, allowing them to tailor projects to local needs while contributing to a statewide coordinated salmon recovery strategy. From the letter: "We write to express our deep concern regarding the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service's (FWS) elimination of $1,285,000 of Fiscal Year 2025 funding for Washington state's Regional Fisheries Enhancement Groups (RFEGs). This widely supported program is a critical component of community-driven salmon recovery efforts, creating thousands of jobs and spurring millions of dollars in economic development across all corners of our state. Your decision to cut funding undermines longstanding partnerships and progress that have been built over many years. Many RFEGs rely on federal funds as core operational support that enable them to leverage additional resources. Without this foundation, the capacity to plan, coordinate and execute complex restoration projects will be drastically diminished." A healthy environment is vital to Washingtonians' way of life and the regional economy. I am committed to standing up for our environment even in the face of the Trump administration's destructive cuts. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: About Jack Ciattarelli
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4726?t=2&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| As Election Day comes closer and closer, I want to share with you everything you need to know about my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, and his plans for our state if we let him win this race.

And after reading this email, if you agree that my opponent is the wrong person to be leading New Jersey, I hope you’ll [_**split whatever you can between my campaign and The Long Run PAC to help me win this upcoming election.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4726?t=3&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| [DONATE ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4726?t=4&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
**On abortion rights:** Jack Ciattarelli supports a statewide abortion ban and wants to defund Planned Parenthood healthcare centers in New Jersey, which would lead to patients losing access to not only abortion care, but also cancer and STI screenings, routine gynecological exams, and more.

**On affordability:** My opponent proudly stood alongside Trump as Washington Republicans cut Medicaid, set Medicare on track for disaster, took away food assistance, and gave billionaires a massive tax break in their price hike bill. Not only did he urge Republican Members of Congress to vote for Trump’s agenda — he’s promising to implement it at the state level here in New Jersey, too.

**On Trump:** Ciattarelli got Trump’s endorsement in this race after shamelessly begging for it. He praises the disastrous policies Trump is implementing in Washington and promises, and even said this: “When I’m governor, we’re gonna do the same in New Jersey.”

, it’s abundantly clear — **Jack Ciattarelli is out of touch with New Jersey, and we cannot let him become the next governor of our state.**

But with far-right super PACs lining the pockets of his campaign, I’m relying on my grassroots supporters now more than ever to help us out in the final stretch of this campaign.

[**_If you’re with me, please split whatever you can between my team and The Long Run PAC to help our campaign fight back against Jack Ciattarelli and his far-right backers and win this election._**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4726?t=6&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4727?t=7&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4728?t=9&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4729?t=11&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4730?t=13&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4731?t=15&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---
Thank you,

\- Mikie
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4726?t=17&akid=5602%2E196590%2EEJDVro)
---

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Statement on Death of Charlie Kirk
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bhQ6MsEkWaXr90pODNa4UZMbscd2ChH_CDB5THxyvL-OymYN6GbfKHQdXbkj3zL2ouRJjtP0KqcYlpi6R5CRRJtPIKnM2F_kbPaOglbHT_AjBPxEfHlKDRnkiXS0Zzdqvc7v96arNOI9vX8fv1lPXQ==&c=Q6bMARTtS_aa9yu5kIfSiBgfOwWeYmBAfyDaxUenzjihb3_50VXCHQ==&ch=ljET09bmi1WPGuXs-l4GSV2gud9ZSU3VNXfEzD41nh4p9yZonMosCw==)
---
| MassGOP Statement on Death of Charlie Kirk
---
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
PRESS CONTACT: Mark Steffen, [mark@massgop.com](mailto:mark@massgop.com)
BOSTON, MA -- Massachusetts Republican Party Chair Amy Carnevale released the following statement on the death of Charlie Kirk, founder of Turning Point USA.
"The MassGOP is devastated to learn that Charlie Kirk has died. Through his work engaging young people, Charlie had the pulse of college campuses like no one else. His aim was to bring thoughtful and civilized discussions to our young people. Tonight and forever he will be missed."
###

Patriot - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them!

Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this!

You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears.

_U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears_
---
I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. _**I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Patriot.**_

There's a saying: _Once a Marine, always a Marine._ Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country.

But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD!

**And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!!** Now, Democrats want me _GONE_. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; _the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative!_

Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be _EVEN CLOSER_! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Patriot.

I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | I’m running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people.| | | | Patriot - Thank you for opening this email. It may be hard to believe, but under 30% of conservatives who get messages from me even bother to open them! Numbers like that make it tough for conservatives like me because we rely on texts, emails, letters, and phone calls to keep in touch with supporters. So, I just want to start by saying thanks so much for reading this! You may not know me, but my name is Winsome Earle-Sears. U.S. Marine Corporal Winsome Earle-Sears I served our nation in the US Marine Corps as an electrician & a diesel mechanic. I kept my brothers & sisters on the move and equipped to DEFEND our nation from terrorists & communists. It was during my service that I learned what real leadership and sacrifice are. I am forever grateful that I had the privilege to serve and defend our nation, Patriot. There's a saying: Once a Marine, always a Marine. Every Marine shares the same spirit of duty and service that inspired me to join--to defend our neighbors and our nation. That's why, today, I'm still serving my country. But now, I'm fighting for my friends' and neighbors' freedoms as a civilian. In 2021, I decided to run for Lieutenant Governor of Virginia because I saw that our nation needed a strong Christian, someone who has served this great country, to step up and LEAD! And after a historic and hard-fought battle, my team and I won by LESS THAN 1.6% of the vote!! Now, Democrats want me GONE. It doesn't matter that I'm a patriotic Marine, a strong Christian, and a mom & grandma; the Left can 't stand me because I am a proud and unapologetic conservative! Now I'm running for Governor, and polls show this race could be EVEN CLOSER! I know my team, and I have a tough battle ahead of us. We're putting everything we've got into defending our values and showing the Left that they can't buy this election; losing simply is not an option, Patriot. I'm running a campaign that is FOR the people and BY the people. Liberal billionaires & Hollywood elites aren't bankrolling me; I'm counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win! And the fact is , if we don't have the support of every conservative reading this email, I have no idea how my team and I are going to keep up with the millions and MILLIONS of dollars the Democrats have stacked against us, Patriot! So please do not sit on the sidelines - make a donation to support me today, Patriot! Thanks so much for your support, Winsome Earle-Sears US Marine Corporal | . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114979703/568784438/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE916_20250910_ErnstRetiring_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWY4NjZjYy02YThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cj0JxRYooxbbLNLGo1__aaFb4ig5qSARJvK-h5Lm3Rw=) Peter,

Back in June, we called out Joni Ernst for the cruel "we all are going to die" comment she made to constituents who were concerned about losing their Medicaid coverage as a result of Trump's billionaire budget bill, which Joni proudly supported. And we warned that if Republicans continue to be this careless with the health and wellbeing of voters nationwide, it wouldn't be long until the ripple effect reached the ballot box.

Well, turns out Sen. Ernst doesn't want to find out: she just announced she's not running for reelection next year.

**Joni knows it, and so do we: The Republican Party's reckless, dangerous agenda and cruel nonchalance is _not_ popular with voters, and it will cost them big in 2026.**

With your help, even more of Joni's colleagues will see the writing on the wall. We're going to continue sounding the alarm, because we're not letting the GOP get away with their blatant disregard for our communities.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114979711/568784446/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE916_20250910_ErnstRetiring_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWY4NjZjYy02YThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cj0JxRYooxbbLNLGo1__aaFb4ig5qSARJvK-h5Lm3Rw=)
Last week, GOP Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall.

When a concerned constituent pointed out that people would die as a result of Republicans' devastating proposed cuts to Medicaid, Ernst's response wasn't concern. It wasn't urgency. It wasn't compassion. It was a shrug, a smirk — and six chilling words:

**"We all are going to die."**

This is the Republican agenda in action: Prioritize billionaire tax breaks above all. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost.

At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. It's still early in the cycle, but comments like this are a clear signal to us: It's time to take a closer look at states like Iowa and races like Joni Ernst's (who happens to be up for election in 2026!). We've seen this kind of cruel nonchalance from Republicans since the day Trump arrived at the White House. Comments like Ernst's don't just expose how dangerous the Republican agenda is — they also create real political vulnerability. The public outrage in response to Ernst's remarks has proven one thing: Voters across the political spectrum are paying attention, and they're furious.

If Republicans are willing to be this brazenly dismissive and careless to their own voters just to stay in Donald Trump's good graces, it won't be long until the ripple effect reaches the ballot box. **In fact, they may be more beatable than anyone thought.**

****[**Peter, will you donate today to help us hold Republicans like Joni Ernst accountable?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/114979712/568784447/-140265690?refcode=WUEFE916_20250910_ErnstRetiring_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1056965&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNWY4NjZjYy02YThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cj0JxRYooxbbLNLGo1__aaFb4ig5qSARJvK-h5Lm3Rw=)****

clean_body: Pushing back against Republicans IS WORKING! | = Peter, Back in June, we called out Joni Ernst for the cruel "we all are going to die" comment she made to constituents who were concerned about losing their Medicaid coverage as a result of Trump's billionaire budget bill, which Joni proudly supported. And we warned that if Republicans continue to be this careless with the health and wellbeing of voters nationwide, it wouldn't be long until the ripple effect reached the ballot box. Well, turns out Sen. Ernst doesn't want to find out: she just announced she's not running for reelection next year. Joni knows it, and so do we: The Republican Party's reckless, dangerous agenda and cruel nonchalance is not popular with voters, and it will cost them big in 2026. With your help, even more of Joni's colleagues will see the writing on the wall. We're going to continue sounding the alarm, because we're not letting the GOP get away with their blatant disregard for our communities. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's keep it up. Together, we can STOP Republicans and TAKE BACK power. \- the EMILYs List team —Original Message— Sent: Mon., June 2, 2025 From: EMILYs List = Last week, GOP Sen. Joni Ernst said the quiet part out loud at a town hall. When a concerned constituent pointed out that people would die as a result of Republicans' devastating proposed cuts to Medicaid, Ernst's response wasn't concern. It wasn't urgency. It wasn't compassion. It was a shrug, a smirk — and six chilling words: "We all are going to die." This is the Republican agenda in action: Prioritize billionaire tax breaks above all. Cut off lifesaving medical care from the people who need it most. Slash services families rely on — and then brush off the human cost. At EMILYs List, we're sounding the alarm. It's still early in the cycle, but comments like this are a clear signal to us: It's time to take a closer look at states like Iowa and races like Joni Ernst's (who happens to be up for election in 2026!). We've seen this kind of cruel nonchalance from Republicans since the day Trump arrived at the White House. Comments like Ernst's don't just expose how dangerous the Republican agenda is — they also create real political vulnerability. The public outrage in response to Ernst's remarks has proven one thing: Voters across the political spectrum are paying attention, and they're furious. If Republicans are willing to be this brazenly dismissive and careless to their own voters just to stay in Donald Trump's good graces, it won't be long until the ripple effect reaches the ballot box. In fact, they may be more beatable than anyone thought. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We're not exaggerating when we say: Republican policies have a body count. name: Keith
subject: I want to hear from you, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

As Attorney General, I strive to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect. To make sure I’m doing this job effectively, I take every opportunity to hear directly from Minnesotans like you.

That’s why I’m reaching out today, Peter. We’ve created a short survey to gather feedback from this grassroots team, and your input is invaluable to me.

Will you take a few moments to fill out our 2025 priorities survey?

TAKE THE SURVEY: https://secure.ngpvan.com/k21KsOf_r0694aeCxv897w2

Providing your thoughts today will help us ensure that every decision we make helps you and your loved ones thrive — because everybody counts and everybody matters.

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250910ke

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417

Peter,

**I 'm looking for some Patriots to join me in packing up Ilhan Omar's bags and sending her back to where she came from: Somalia.** Are you with me?

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=274f7c242e6b4f4ebef94918c0f4b64a&_e=Y8jIK39nWREozcaDdl1fiwiHTB8b-e_owhQ2gLN-9FuWJbXljUFVsFwnLuAcg8NMBYkDtuAlhbrKY3ZNpRSHBdtWXnoaBBVj-78NR3fC_iJ2B5WxSxM0aLntTyKje9RhSx4A993HqcHaZcrJH_eroj5T43NtesOm9Qy-vIaqT60pjsum1ctoGTUEU02njpcd67nQoHhBRLbPhtjmkwcTQ0ft-SltVnHhUBa1Vw45FbO-eL6ByHXnq4TC2KZ7YWE3lCqjL0VcEiPTUeqWTjD3UBAFBL5yYKqXCq0nXP1No7xzq8GHbWdc70Yy6rlZpvgLPi_7sOLPc6cjOLAUNLL6Uvp0awwStp1l1X41TzbEzfcSSNTC2I_ff1CSyQ65WOCL7yK5Y-f7Wr3hKwDOjv-yflqmj-k9m0NNSbz8hZdcF1H2MZoPQwMUYCX7VqsNgtNAbxkqyHWXNGqGipb9E_0TuSvl2aZTib3K_Wjb9yaJYsK61DqgaJsY-sFvaGg2Vg6cCvOhEl0REu0juUsDm2BFnnrtkqtyo0O2sBu45PnG3knrL1AbI8MZsU9-O0WD8jR5)

because I'll do whatever it takes

Friend, I'll do whatever it takes to stand up to this fascist regime, **even if it means getting arrested and detained.** I'm not going to let Donald Trump and his "Department of War" attack our city, go after our immigrant communities, and use us as a stepping stone to overtake the country.
That's why the other day, I protested at the Broadview ICE detention center just outside of Chicago at 1930 Beach Street, where masked agents are **_detaining and deporting_** our neighbors. Friend, it's Kat Abughazaleh, and if this isn't a sign of what's to come, I don't know what is.
As always, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, click [**here**](https://ka4il.us/l/p8XOZ7j85fOl)**,** or if you'd like to unsubscribe from all future emails, click **here**.
**_Donald Trump is planning on attacking payment processor ActBlue in another attempt by his administration to push the limits of his power._**
The detainment of Mahmoud Kahlil, the deportation of Kilmar Abrego Garcia, and the outright denial to follow a ruling made by the Supreme Court are all blatant oversteps that attack our right to free speech and due process and challenge the rule of law.
Friend, I've spent years watching Fox News and listening to their rhetoric get more and more extreme, and Donald Trump is doing exactly what they want.
**_Fascism is, and has always been, their end goal._**
Their vision is one of a militarized country where only certain people—a few dozen rich men—have a seat at the table, and dissidents like me are silenced.
Trump and Elon know that progressive movements like ours are in the way because I've made it abundantly clear that strongly worded letters, wearing matching outfits while holding up signs, and meaningless acts of symbolism **aren't my thing.**
As a member of Congress, I'm going to be unwavering in my fight for our communities.
I will not vote for authoritarian bills in the name of "compromise," I will not abandon or demonize vulnerable groups to cater to the right, and I will not change my stances for fear of retaliation.
And Friend, that's what this action on ActBlue is: retaliation. Campaigns like ours rely on small dollars from people like you to support us, and ActBlue is integral to making that work.

Peter, I didn’t get into politics planning to go to Washington. My call to service has led me to help the people of North Carolina from here in Raleigh, as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator before that. I thought I could do the most good from right here at home, and it’s been humbling to have so many North Carolinians put their trust in me to lead our state. **But when I look at what’s happening in Washington now, well, Peter, I can’t just sit by and watch.** Not while folks are losing their health care and powerful politicians are more interested in lining the pockets of their billionaire donors than standing up for their constituents. Not while the federal government’s actions are hurting families here in North Carolina and beyond. National Republican groups will go all out to defeat me because they don’t want me speaking out against their extremism. They can try to buy this race, but they will not stop me from standing up for what’s right — just like I always have. **[I am humbly asking for your support today to help us take on the GOP and flip this seat for Democrats. This is the most competitive Senate race of 2026, so anything you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114980201/568786067/-1743631236?refcode=ea.efc466e7-6c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.efc466e7-6c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM0NjZlNy02YzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5ukFOBslKzoYatCDrcwXeciUbnsuQ_t7wzWaSAFb2s=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114980202/568786068/-1743631236?refcode=ea.efc466e7-6c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.efc466e7-6c8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmM0NjZlNy02YzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t5ukFOBslKzoYatCDrcwXeciUbnsuQ_t7wzWaSAFb2s=)**

clean_body: This wasn’t in my plan. | Peter, I didn’t get into politics planning to go to Washington. My call to service has led me to help the people of North Carolina from here in Raleigh, as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator before that. I thought I could do the most good from right here at home, and it’s been humbling to have so many North Carolinians put their trust in me to lead our state. But when I look at what’s happening in Washington now, well, Peter, I can’t just sit by and watch. Not while folks are losing their health care and powerful politicians are more interested in lining the pockets of their billionaire donors than standing up for their constituents. Not while the federal government’s actions are hurting families here in North Carolina and beyond. National Republican groups will go all out to defeat me because they don’t want me speaking out against their extremism. They can try to buy this race, but they will not stop me from standing up for what’s right — just like I always have. = | = Thanks very much, Roy Cooper = Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

| Peter,

Like many of you, I share the fatigue I know you must be facing. The news is nonstop, the notifications are relentless, and the attacks are constant.

I know you hear from my campaign a ton, and these messages aren’t always what you want to read. I just wanted to reach out to be transparent with you about why these emails are important.
---
| [GIVE NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114980763/568788136/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-09-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2MTgxOGEtNmY4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=1lJR-nPqq9bajkKyiOXn96ZlVmWQkO5pdbGczGp4ka4=)

Right now, we’re living in a Republican trifecta. They control the White House, the Senate, and the House. Complete and utter control. And they haven’t held back for a second. They’ve used that power to pass some of the most devastating assistance cuts in our country’s history and undermine our democracy.

Now, I wanted to share what gives me hope. **Next November, we have a real shot at flipping the House and stopping this madness.**

This district is one of the most competitive in the country. Democrats HAVE to win this seat if we want to flip the House. There’s simply no other path. Last year, Republicans won by less than 4,000 votes. Every election expert is calling this race a toss-up, and Ryan Mackenzie was just named one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election.

I know we can win. We have to win. There’s no way forward if we don’t.

So that’s why I send you these emails. The gravity of this opportunity keeps me putting one foot in front of the other. And that’s why I have to keep asking for your support. Because without supporters like you, Peter, our campaign doesn’t have a chance at standing up to the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers.

[_**If you’re able to make a contribution today of $10, $15, or whatever feels right, I’d be extremely grateful. clean_body: Like many of you, I share the fatigue I know you must be facing. The news is nonstop, the notifications are relentless, and the attacks are constant. | = | Peter, Like many of you, I share the fatigue I know you must be facing. The news is nonstop, the notifications are relentless, and the attacks are constant. I know you hear from my campaign a ton, and these messages aren’t always what you want to read. I just wanted to reach out to be transparent with you about why these emails are important. | = Right now, we’re living in a Republican trifecta. They control the White House, the Senate, and the House. Complete and utter control. And they haven’t held back for a second. They’ve used that power to pass some of the most devastating assistance cuts in our country’s history and undermine our democracy. Now, I wanted to share what gives me hope. Next November, we have a real shot at flipping the House and stopping this madness. This district is one of the most competitive in the country. Democrats HAVE to win this seat if we want to flip the House. There’s simply no other path. Last year, Republicans won by less than 4,000 votes. Every election expert is calling this race a toss-up, and Ryan Mackenzie was just named one of the most vulnerable Republicans seeking re-election. I know we can win. We have to win. There’s no way forward if we don’t. So that’s why I send you these emails. The gravity of this opportunity keeps me putting one foot in front of the other. And that’s why I have to keep asking for your support. Because without supporters like you, Peter, our campaign doesn’t have a chance at standing up to the record-breaking Republican fundraising numbers. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Together, we are building something powerful. Thank you. – Carol * | | = Paid for by Carol for PA Carol for PA P.O Box 83 Allentown, PA 18105 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

name: Callie Barr
subject: I'm not asking for money
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/callie-barr-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/callie-barr-1]
Peter,
There’s an affordability crisis in America that is impacting all of us, and today I’m asking you to share your story.
Share your story by clicking on the following link: MY STORY [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1U1ymPEW4y8hbQpLkpi91K1y2Cl_0VraFENA3NkheXRM/edit]
Let me explain why.
The affordability crisis is hitting rural communities like ours especially hard. Families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula are being squeezed out of the very basics they need to build a life - and our leaders in Washington are more interested in fighting culture wars than fighting for working people.
What do working people want? We want to be able to afford to live a LIFE: Local Housing, Income, Food, and Essential healthcare for all people, and essential care for our veterans.
Because here's what I believe: if we can't afford a place to live, good-paying work, food on the table, and healthcare when we need it, we can't build families. We can't build communities. We can't build the future we deserve.
Why an affordable LIFE Matters
Some might say this acronym is quirky. Maybe it is. But I think it's also honest about what politics should actually be for - giving people the building blocks they need to build a life.
Not the culture war distractions. Not the partisan talking points. The basics: a place to live, work that pays, food on the table, healthcare when you need it.
These aren't Democratic issues or Republican issues. They're human issues. And in the past, we've had leaders from both parties who understood that.
After over twenty years as a military spouse and veteran advocate, I know what it means to serve people, not political parties. This is a fight for the people we love - it’s about giving them a future.
Your Story Matters
Here's the thing about this affordability crisis - it's hitting everyone differently, but it's hitting almost everyone. The teacher who can't afford to live in the district where she works. The senior who drives two hours for specialized care. The young couple putting off having kids because they can't afford a house. The senior choosing between medications and groceries.
There's an affordability crisis in America, and I need your story.
If housing costs have forced impossible choices in your family, I want to hear about it. If you've struggled to find work that pays enough to get ahead, not just get by, tell me. If you've worried about putting food on the table or accessing healthcare, your experience matters.
Because your stories - our stories - are why I'm running. They're proof that we need leaders who will fight for an affordable LIFE, not just talk about it.
Share your story by clicking on the following link: MY STORY [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1U1ymPEW4y8hbQpLkpi91K1y2Cl_0VraFENA3NkheXRM/edit]
Every story helps me understand what's at stake and helps build the case for the changes we need.
We can work together to make these essentials more affordable. But only if we choose leaders who remember that our government should work for the people building a life, not the powerful protecting their profits.
Thank you for taking the time to read this. Thank you for caring about our communities. And thank you, in advance, for sharing your story.
Together, we can build a future where every family in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula has what they need for LIFE.
Callie Barr
Proud Candidate for Congress in MI-01

clean_body: [] Peter, There’s an affordability crisis in America that is impacting all of us, and today I’m asking you to share your story. Share your story by clicking on the following link: MY STORY [] Let me explain why. The affordability crisis is hitting rural communities like ours especially hard. Families in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula are being squeezed out of the very basics they need to build a life - and our leaders in Washington are more interested in fighting culture wars than fighting for working people. What do working people want? We want to be able to afford to live a LIFE: Local Housing, Income, Food, and Essential healthcare for all people, and essential care for our veterans. Because here's what I believe: if we can't afford a place to live, good-paying work, food on the table, and healthcare when we need it, we can't build families. We can't build communities. We can't build the future we deserve. Why an affordable LIFE Matters Some might say this acronym is quirky. Maybe it is. But I think it's also honest about what politics should actually be for - giving people the building blocks they need to build a life. Not the culture war distractions. Not the partisan talking points. The basics: a place to live, work that pays, food on the table, healthcare when you need it. These aren't Democratic issues or Republican issues. They're human issues. And in the past, we've had leaders from both parties who understood that. After over twenty years as a military spouse and veteran advocate, I know what it means to serve people, not political parties. This is a fight for the people we love - it’s about giving them a future. Your Story Matters Here's the thing about this affordability crisis - it's hitting everyone differently, but it's hitting almost everyone. The teacher who can't afford to live in the district where she works. The senior who drives two hours for specialized care. The young couple putting off having kids because they can't afford a house. The senior choosing between medications and groceries. There's an affordability crisis in America, and I need your story. If housing costs have forced impossible choices in your family, I want to hear about it. If you've struggled to find work that pays enough to get ahead, not just get by, tell me. If you've worried about putting food on the table or accessing healthcare, your experience matters. Because your stories - our stories - are why I'm running. They're proof that we need leaders who will fight for an affordable LIFE, not just talk about it. Share your story by clicking on the following link: MY STORY [] Every story helps me understand what's at stake and helps build the case for the changes we need. We can work together to make these essentials more affordable. But only if we choose leaders who remember that our government should work for the people building a life, not the powerful protecting their profits. Thank you for taking the time to read this. Thank you for caring about our communities. And thank you, in advance, for sharing your story. Together, we can build a future where every family in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula has what they need for LIFE. Callie Barr Proud Candidate for Congress in MI-01 callieforcongress.com [callieforcongress.com] [] Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, lawyer, and advocate for veterans. Friend, This week, the U.S. House of Representatives and the Senate are set to vote on a record-breaking military budget—at the same time that Trump is declaring war on Black-led U.S. cities. Trump has changed the name of the Department of Defense to the Department of War, and he posted online saying that Chicago’s “about to find out why it’s called the Department of WAR.” He just sent ICE to Chicago to ramp up deportation raids, and he’s threatening to send U.S. troops there as well. We can’t let Congress send nearly $1 trillion taxpayer dollars to Trump’s Pentagon as the fascist-in-chief militarizes our cities. [**Add your name now to demand members of Congress reject 2026’s military budget when it comes up for votes this week!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9WDifJMqK2ZAKNDza039FJvspUwi2H0xQu4IFAh9LOCRpe8Ea5hVUkp1qLS-DiDhpuMNRkWSQjqSrtji-EUP2i3xRuZLXQ6goRzXDELSyzkoTzmhvCDe4x1mGDHestb375r7jPIDVRHamsdHgQ5AP_T8yvF5iZu9TwxhyWQqAeHUFePxdMASDyP1lD-AECYfi8SbkfD7NDvS-IsNBC30_GjHvOLPpnWd-BszMVTC1EjiTz7dZXq9BsI2ML9SmiwtXgsJn6vcuinCGPSzVJubYfyFdDnDUht1F-cAcNzEj8uLoHnnBaB4tn5IaiqtHupeh5T72hJjn9h3kwIgFfzaKNVpCOIDzQaQ4EG8UIFNIh9Z1nsOcaegdpK-2kDDmuDdZ284jP_kJ9yY3QVjIaISylfyX19iLTHdEMVf_hRiToxnXSmOyxkHdIOdg_NXVoHcb97eZ6NBiXRFn9TPxtRKjR1MTUm7Ngm8hi6cuyhxl1LrzJPkC6vfsr0ayNeA6U7PcSZqhalrbG2S54pG8cCv7kaTyWg5BD0fvl8LxIBkLGYnHpu5uE8s7SUWEk6Zcm6DKyUDUN-6g2f4csFNtFssBcEXr8T1YWAABtmhAyxYkwDPKdOhulD36Z4kT3F2pPg2w1SQrAOZzry1w5VOyOqrKMQ/4js/d7wMz5LTRUyTpYSzwrb-ew/h1/h001.G-NyD_i9l5UCljnp2i9yecGfCsM6XdfI5tdgHlOgkmQ) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9WDifJMqK2ZAKNDza039FJvspUwi2H0xQu4IFAh9LOCRpe8Ea5hVUkp1qLS-DiDhpuMNRkWSQjqSrtji-EUP2i3xRuZLXQ6goRzXDELSyzkoTzmhvCDe4x1mGDHestb375r7jPIDVRHamsdHgQ5AP_QwtgTODKOYFnMqp5UyHh86MFk_eY72z0Y6aV01152waF56L4PEB-IQlKExEHialZgfASvgJb340nuIeqywDdzJ4-EYkJVJUqwJBeY7UQ322RXl5nB03mrbTHOYsBboM6nV4tA8SCF-mf_nmLQ5tcWkaE13BjTwgG0HVxqjoZxQpHG7jweAmlzBnUJ5cHqjFIV4hSNf47FQtbuFSTZjXp-lBB-H6cDLKmIUanHHD03nQ106Rja5ezS1w8TWgf1V-PZShNPMe2OcPpBUhz60VeWhkiKLLYN9lAIEDlY-fr8HWB9Z8H_G5kGgsRZe8pxdgw1N0b6vV83Rz7isEi_u7_DDVRSLSbMEbDzmNnyeO1WXzuNO47ZyqNy04XJVWZbFCUAfhWnNaRX6qHxLFrc1z6gGBKg-dNBI2uANCeUPxpNv1GO9mxMOCOioZUD68Y2dHEnuByubjCsOeNJ1M_a-wQqhGGQwE69wIU2WZJHF9GhqSwZsvOQJqBoQ7INYH6MbvMQ/4js/d7wMz5LTRUyTpYSzwrb-ew/h2/h001.nMuVyzzWFt0cslxn4pjvvRXxd6nDAyI4G289IgHfCEk)
---
Each year, the majority of my colleagues vote to waste our tax dollars on endless war—while Americans struggle to access clean water, housing, basic healthcare, and enough food for their kids.
**Why do they do this? Because many members of Congress own stock in and receive massive campaign contributions from weapons corporations.**
Half of the annual military budget goes directly to these corporations—so when my colleagues vote to increase funding for the military, many of them profit personally.
I’m leading the push to ban members of Congress from investing in the weapons industry, and I’m demanding Congress invest in our communities instead.
[**Please join me and add your name to call on Congress to reject the military budget when it comes up for votes this week.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9WDifJMqK2ZAKNDza039FJvspUwi2H0xQu4IFAh9LOCRpe8Ea5hVUkp1qLS-DiDhpuMNRkWSQjqSrtji-EUP2i3xRuZLXQ6goRzXDELSyzkoTzmhvCDe4x1mGDHestb375r7jPIDVRHamsdHgQ5AP_bzI_AfSurw6tpeu6f7lpXFyXtWqOm3XFyH-pn2NzrwbeI6Qrtnu5q3Z_HLxrHYTflkxzlsabClvTwTheFCyfqF_3KM4y4SfrtaKNO0BkI-X_y642qi6EAfXQ2mS7G9rD8kUSA7VaGVUuxrvvEgWdEt76kj61T814oraeExO_FHGBwmNxVlATjPG4IKmxa_B7J9i77mqQtqgZx11Q3uD0X-tD48dDRKziU9K0JYViOCwtHQsUtWf4L9Rm01312VvXubrV9ktr7W5z7X5kEqEnBEA3xi0PwlbPIU0aSAFwaeDL1deuV08TdFTito0o95NzTXqGJXvKEZ72Ko4pgyiWcuiE8vnisppUte359WzODuJsGFb9OWTFEPzDPumunTSy7RBiRAkCT4IHCb2_HChvk80enAXMRfe-r0AgJwo6U2t7ijwoxtwT0K-OlX4aeYTrEh_S6SNbqgCYHk4qMmNXsuvASKmoh6M8WnK79Cc9geK7CUVn3dlv1tF9GtGAK3k-A/4js/d7wMz5LTRUyTpYSzwrb-ew/h3/h001.U7_S_sjlV5rTYX4YlF_FiojunNf7qHf4CmulWVH35L0)
Thank you. Together, we’ll continue to fight fascism and work toward a safer country and world for all—where everyone has what they need to thrive.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Congress is voting next week to hand Trump even more money for state violence—**a record-breaking military budget of nearly $1 trillion taxpayer dollars.**

clean_body: We can’t let Congress send $1 trillion taxpayer dollars to militarize our cities. | | | Friend, This week, the U.S. House of Representatives and the Senate are set to vote on a record-breaking military budget—at the same time that Trump is declaring war on Black-led U.S. cities. Trump has changed the name of the Department of Defense to the Department of War, and he posted online saying that Chicago’s “about to find out why it’s called the Department of WAR.” He just sent ICE to Chicago to ramp up deportation raids, and he’s threatening to send U.S. troops there as well. We can’t let Congress send nearly $1 trillion taxpayer dollars to Trump’s Pentagon as the fascist-in-chief militarizes our cities. | Each year, the majority of my colleagues vote to waste our tax dollars on endless war—while Americans struggle to access clean water, housing, basic healthcare, and enough food for their kids. Why do they do this? Because many members of Congress own stock in and receive massive campaign contributions from weapons corporations. Half of the annual military budget goes directly to these corporations—so when my colleagues vote to increase funding for the military, many of them profit personally. I’m leading the push to ban members of Congress from investing in the weapons industry, and I’m demanding Congress invest in our communities instead. Thank you. Together, we’ll continue to fight fascism and work toward a safer country and world for all—where everyone has what they need to thrive. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Sept 6, 2025 Subject: Add your name before next week’s vote on the military budget: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Congress is voting next week to hand Trump even more money for state violence—a record-breaking military budget of nearly $1 trillion taxpayer dollars. The fascist-in-chief will use this to put more troops on our streets and continue attacking other countries. He’s illegally using the military for law enforcement, and he’s egging on ethnic cleansing and occupation in Palestine. There are too many war-mongers in our government. Half of the annual Pentagon budget goes to weapons corporations, which many members of Congress own stock in and receive campaign contributions from.1 So when my colleagues press that yes button to vote for increases to the military budget, some are personally benefiting financially. That’s why I’m leading the push to ban members of Congress from investing in the weapons industry. Before the Senate and House of Representatives vote on the military budget , we must speak up and urge Congress to invest in life rather than death. Members of Congress already sent an additional $150 billion to the Pentagon war machine in the Big Budget Betrayal bill earlier this year. Shamefully, they did this while voting to cut healthcare and food assistance for families in their districts. Many of my colleagues who claim to care about waste and fraud have no problem voting for increases in the Pentagon budget, even though the Pentagon hasn’t passed an audit for 7 years in a row. Imagine the transformative impact on our communities if we spent $1 trillion more on life instead of death, every year. We could guarantee access to healthcare, housing, clean air and water, and more. We deserve a government that represents and serves the people, especially now when Americans are struggling with rising poverty, homelessness, and hunger. Thank you for speaking up. Our government has the money needed to lift children out of poverty and ensure that all Americans can thrive, but we need to keep pushing to make that happen. With you in the fight, Rashida 1\. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. For nearly 80 years, the CDC has protected Americans through every major public health crisis, developing life-saving tools and guidance for millions.

[ **But now, RFK Jr. is steering us toward disaster and threatening to erase decades of critical progress and dismantle everything the CDC has built.** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68665?t=7&akid=23383%2E4449941%2EacjGXw)

Just look at the damage he’s done already...
**-** He **FIRED** thousands of federal health workers.
**-** He **GUTTED** crucial funding for mRNA vaccine research.
**-** He **LIED** about unproven treatments for the measles outbreak.
**-** He **OUSTED** all 17 members of the CDC’s vaccine advisory committee.
[**AND NOW, HE FIRED THE NEW CDC DIRECTOR (!?!)**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68665?t=8&akid=23383%2E4449941%2EacjGXw)

This is a full-scale attack on public health across the country – **_and we’re running out of time to stop it._**

If we’re going to make a difference, we need at least 25,000 Democrats to sign our petition before we send it at MIDNIGHT – but your signature is still missing!!
[ **So please, friend, add your name to our petition and stand with the CDC against Trump and RFK Jr’s attacks before it’s too late >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68665?t=9&akid=23383%2E4449941%2EacjGXw)
[SIGN ON NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68665?t=10&akid=23383%2E4449941%2EacjGXw)

| | | _**Our democracy is on the line.**_

**[It’s time for us to stand up. We demand that Congress **stand up and reject Trump’s plan for authoritarian rule.**
Why this matters:
* Authoritarian playbooks often target how power is wielded — not just who holds it. Without resistance, Trump’s proposals could dismantle democratic checks and balances.
* When public pressure mounts and citizens take to the streets, institutions and officials begin to draw a line.
* This petition is our chance to raise our voices together — and send a clear message to Congress: democracy is not negotiable.

By signing, you're joining thousands of Americans who refuse to sit quietly while democracy is eroded.
**[This is a clarion call for all of us to protect the bedrock of our freedoms. clean_body: | | | Our democracy is on the line. **This isn’t hyperbole — Trump’s DC takeover isn’t about reducing crime. It’s about creating an authoritarian police state to squash dissent. We demand that Congress stand up and reject Trump’s plan for authoritarian rule. Why this matters: Authoritarian playbooks often target how power is wielded — not just who holds it. Without resistance, Trump’s proposals could dismantle democratic checks and balances. When public pressure mounts and citizens take to the streets, institutions and officials begin to draw a line. This petition is our chance to raise our voices together — and send a clear message to Congress: democracy is not negotiable. By signing, you're joining thousands of Americans who refuse to sit quietly while democracy is eroded. | In unity and defense of our freedoms, The Cedar Key Progress Team Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Giving you my Makarov
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
body:
Patriot,
In case you haven't heard the news, I've decided to run again for Congress in Texas against the most notorious anti-gun "Republican," Tony Gonzales.
We came incredibly close to defeating him last time, and with the experience I've gained and the lessons I learned, I am confident that we can win.
But it will take more than that: it will take additional help from you. That's why I'm asking you to donate TODAY at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/S8Zs763797638jIOdF3zicPMDQ/44rl5Tb1iykFhJyd7mbAQQ).
This race is important enough to me that I want to give you an additional incentive to contribute. To one lucky donor, I'll give away my prized Bulgarian Makarov in 9x18. With a threaded barrel, it is suppressor ready. This battle-tested collector's piece was the standard sidearm of the Red Army and Warsaw Pact forces and is known for its accuracy and robust design.
**Please note that due to government regulations that I look forward to dismantling once I 'm elected, we will not be including the suppressor that you see in the photo, but you are welcome to attach one of your own depending on how much your locality respects your rights. It's custom threaded for 1/2x28. **
Every $5 you donate will earn you one entry to win. A $20 donation will earn you four entries, $100 will earn you twenty entries, and so on. The deadline is September 27th and I look forward to personally calling the winner.
Please make your contribution today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/7OQ0cYRsv76378RsAAle4eLw/44rl5Tb1iykFhJyd7mbAQQ) to help my campaign and for the chance to own a fully functional piece of history.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by Brandon Herrera for Congress
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/44rl5Tb1iykFhJyd7mbAQQ)

Peter, The radical Left is laser-focused on one goal: **taking back the Senate.**

They want a blank check to ram through their woke agenda of universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, and every crazy policy you and I have fought against.

_If we lose, we lose it all._

Universal healthcare will destroy your choices. The Green New Deal will destroy American jobs and cripple our economy. **They 'll trample on our freedom, and we'll be forced to live in their utopian nightmare.**

That's why I need your help right now, Peter.

If every liberty-loving American chipped in just $5--less than a cup of joe--we can build the firewall to stop the woke takeover. [_**Will you make a quick sacrifice today so we’re not forced to sacrifice our country tomorrow?**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/0vEAUjNH7YfW45NsuF4CWmgTtBdM60friIGsD51W2D_g5EiOUkWC-xkPPzoJkWCFf7GMz4ZhvsFch7QwarMhUZOpz-wN0_HY-NId1b_ZMq5JVARlS658DOWrfMg_Im5TEdpaOmleEsmoadTst8GofCqfnV2mx4wwvx8MXwTr5hCJRp0aeWEj5kpAaXvQEhlaeOKlq0Cj4zJOB8mquxIQF09RQyRAxJfcqufIPttM7JzNftloclXHE05DY1Dgse0DmuK6k5X-K8s5rzQFPQ4W3Y_Gzx2Bl6fb2lFZ4b-Dlnl-FNXnCkYEk0cYG2TFf-QnSTtzAxu0Z6pTq5GpEz-nfsBHTpUWBPRJBJIuXbJIy29pC4M7vBNjLjH-EPeg6S9VdphU139CGoVN-GCToDqYH1ivPkAiFf221PYC6sCLzKoWOrKrwPP86qQt0EhKvKtDBHz-lBSfUmgLhy1Rl0T0zhFcyp8fOYhi88asmrI9CTKbd9uO8PzcGuukc1_xTLUsNnKa7hk9IxA9lWJjYSWNXyEwFAkPw62j2EEJ4a2xcbhQhi4675CZijV_qE868rBRqc1uwoorlGE5tLc5CF8nlWPAGKtFKLHJk_VVhv_zCUsrMjCcNcFyBgZmvz8FziYXTj7gmOa0uFi69lYDxn67GRn3VR5AscfSlT9RQO5Fq6Bm2HJlL09wBX3q93tCIHxzVHhNhDk2ACV645FOtPyGPrva55XZQKMXP5dZUojEzQ/8OcjY-NfKGutUaZPJhB4j4M7HkGPKOOA/12)
