body:
This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=ffd0fcadef094e63a08cf815b66ffca4&_e=bx3dJp9I2bRFlv-y3CpkCCO4Iw-wVdBOOZpNerqXiwEM7Uu0RquE9N5GhwHq3Dkbi2Qlt0WkNLYNl_WtfqRVBmCjk17KLGzjuNtBDnJk2rk6ZPgGmoISXwC2QuvPtRTxBaaOdlkDvutiXM1M18moSeBXb49-DXrYS9sLTuWNTdS0fGcPcM5IWl8WROcmznIapQ1a-v6TncMA9MY54ns9VkGNRGvklFEjoThO3UxXX1zrYqyVBKqQcZcACrFBNq9jvT7a3Yyx6OroqDenhifISTw6X4uicmLTmoXdHxwk8vsFSCqEPGEACs6bryInsPXHyRrqGuMrSwncW9XcjDeLp2rDlbJe_21pERtqbLfh8KgRls7g6txVXakUvdKcdyck-sGntEmYUD0f5gFQ4limoJozKINIzwvNY1MGQLra75piFN_wpWxWQF2OQ6Rk9r1Aw34XegT1fQlco6kDTHGWTOfGXqWTw1GAzUzmk6QopJaf5LqlN1ZG-m7WGFUr9XM0T5I6MC3DL48rSskWav0UgKDSAMi3uxkH7sQ1rRTZsz5IEyvQhdL9zNyVG1vgSBINoeJlSmdaaSesUn9_8uN_rtwCQo7nG_2yH-7jJkbSz4uZFFC5UDwYdEbUDcx3CIwKxSr3TEaYI9Lp8kbl5VhAmm1MgtOR6vm16WDk4XHlJYu3FIQxeuRsDUBMYwBhINCLNaOF3wyL49KawU1EChGCmDJ3qF_X544LpOSxLA2HfSgKBKhdNC5jYK_WxOiHWMMKAqwpUfHeg8exM-c_Y9Xo5g%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

Iryna Zarutska fled the war in Ukraine in search of safety. She came to America hoping for a better life. Instead, she was murdered on a Charlotte train by a man with _14 prior arrests_ who never should have been back on the streets.

This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. In this case, Magistrate Judge Teresa Stokes released a repeat criminal—while also running a treatment center with government contracts. It reeks of conflict of interest, and it cost Iryna her life.

**That’s not compassion._That’s corruption._**

clean_body: This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. | Friend, Iryna Zarutska fled the war in Ukraine in search of safety. She came to America hoping for a better life. Instead, she was murdered on a Charlotte train by a man with 14 prior arrests who never should have been back on the streets. This is what happens when judges put ideology over public safety. In this case, Magistrate Judge Teresa Stokes released a repeat criminal—while also running a treatment center with government contracts. It reeks of conflict of interest, and it cost Iryna her life. That’s not compassion.That’s corruption. I’m Marty O’Donnell, and I’m running for Congress in Nevada’s 3rd District because this broken system is failing innocent people every single day. When judges and politicians side with criminals, it’s families and communities who pay the price. President Trump has called for a crackdown on violent crime, and I stand with him. It’s time to stop letting career criminals cycle through the system and start restoring real law and order in America. This isn’t just another campaign. It’s about making sure tragedies like Iryna’s never happen again. Please, don’t wait. Thank you, Marty O’Donnell Candidate for U.S. House, Nevada’s 3rd District P.S. We can’t bring Iryna back. But we can fight to make sure no other family suffers because of reckless decisions that put criminals back on the street. | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’ve run out of time, resources, and options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dc6cdade1f744ddba895410a80711a21&_e=o7xWm3NiYBes0oefUvSjqdkoSkEdVev0yaaqbmFS4Pnm7Llogf8YD8_UCbIvPDzySxJawyD8SvdIypKmqAKN3MS7i92uaIpplDrx2l4kCvdvP8Cp5Hnf_6G6ZvuzUuoLMILYlBoeon_4dE5bodb8bGIpzuad2b4xJTAz5wDRrPfhTbxo1a7s6eBwkMJGTPaLuzIVfIDElg80zVY-TqMS5Je4fhKF34UpExWXazFKeAVFdNS5LOEXazgncBo8zFGWoSOmOC1JmY0G59xUAWb-xwGMyhcqFMRoDnSwtHW8VHHcaXtG6T-lJnl4a_4hXTeCtalyRTxOQvuqGgQ-r9lg2Z0jrPQnTXV5jsd3uHTCKme6ON2mFM9NsF1rK9h8D4cOhl_rlf7hERpV98KgMW28ryWjcHtU8Ue_X5sJdf1XUWW-eYPc7CUzmlKtU7uHnCzZzb6grkDUA9ImUxflaIVlo4OaqFnUNCZ1J_J4t1SgJXd0gYmqSIYaOvSSX8SroGte7flTJmxNwHL587pKI8IHcVEfQ042Df2o487UnjL_GZm55leyhxT5paqXduMee21grX4q9CRpK3YTx2i_f9Cr0WXPmDtmQ2HGz39zRDgb32q9ZS6Wz9UGgwAmEErn9HmU4NoHay3owR_T5kNPhMT1Zwrp05rUcaraaeME0WOOyKY%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dc6cdade1f744ddba895410a80711a21&_e=o7xWm3NiYBes0oefUvSjqdkoSkEdVev0yaaqbmFS4Pnm7Llogf8YD8_UCbIvPDzySxJawyD8SvdIypKmqAKN3MS7i92uaIpplDrx2l4kCvdvP8Cp5Hnf_6G6ZvuzUuoLMILYlBoeon_4dE5bodb8bGIpzuad2b4xJTAz5wDRrPfhTbxo1a7s6eBwkMJGTPaLuzIVfIDElg80zVY-TqMS5Je4fhKF34UpExWXazFKeAWfBb9tNZsMtYhW2gyvmbb28iSoDVPzOJKW2S1yZV5fdbffTvCC8BWeARwXuYtNkasrr0gvSSqVd9Dxu1JhOfQ1CY0iTTBpuxQidoT1oik4oHbv42LUR9rciN_iA_LXaNyieUxOBjl8PK0TQj1PlWoh3AQY4xHLQQEbW4dBIemk64aowPy0HC05pXbisM3juTiaUvsMUhti-l7JfZcvUr_hXnQvvpTqHo_auw1lNw1bOhRZhwpKZk3clbDcim3UzBqkqvN6OO1voc0VIbltz6AQ1bemhKq77rJN-NFYvEL4i1Xh2oNBZlohmxmf5yv4eNj2bmse1vJ4-VvBbtJAFnDibAp3aaW3VMZT93D5FfwQnBx52rcz22aarMoaT0j34Egauroh_2A2VNRalGr8Tp1C3auu-Zn5d3XNXlxodRqdT5D_8LN29hylhEZmbBsbe2w%3D)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---
**_...And we’re nearly there!_**
---
[**So please, help me reach this life-saving (_truly!_) goal today by immediately adding your name to “THE PEOPLE’S PARDON” as citizens unite to call for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES against me. **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=dc6cdade1f744ddba895410a80711a21&_e=o7xWm3NiYBes0oefUvSjqdkoSkEdVev0yaaqbmFS4Pnm7Llogf8YD8_UCbIvPDzySxJawyD8SvdIypKmqAKN3MS7i92uaIpplDrx2l4kCvdvP8Cp5Hnf_6G6ZvuzUuoLMILYlBoeon_4dE5bodb8bGIpzuad2b4xJTAz5wDRrPfhTbxo1a7s6eBwkMJGTPaLuzIVfIDElg80zVY-TqMS5Je4fhKF34UpExWXazFKeAWzIYVUVaFSEjcHY2RpuvHMZt3Y5CKrKFupMYdFmrQ-LJCk7ODBknyPiv-Xu5YPlBRFpvCBmdrUJrwW4ThoKRJ-7gQdN-UeYxJqf5FzTe_RgmBEBdFtmoxqMxt3apk0AVuV-AbIy2FsryTfyLx8YEPswTgonfQSz2-sBvPKKvjD1m6UiHArYqWISExYsm3nsV95wa9-4Ok7C1smR_YSHDUr54MDShhKyGTbvrrOkTvyPfDutukCw57Z9ImiZOYyC6odt92mOCweKDHbcJ3nHJiDvFbu8uIcs8UieWFRWMZaL2dgyk2R4U9d8HPppTckfOmSJ3VnnQME9gwL4Dl1yNNT2ZiVZMzRi5GgldF4BqmfUHnkq3n0qpOi0HLYidmtKS8NTKaRF8UHE0Jc-6oMkaVyk9D1ENdV7qNHLneT6HO8hATZFoumhngvvjmNhjKC6dQ%3D)

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Peter, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: The results are in 👉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
I asked supporters like you to fill out our Summer Priorities Survey and share what matters most to you.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114983770/568798486/32658279?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2025-09-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmU3ZmM2MS03NzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAYdjIQmgw9nwFGgVb-GeD3kNz9iQP22myYau3jRl4k=)
---
| Recently, I asked supporters like you to fill out our Summer Priorities Survey and share what matters most to you.

After reviewing your responses, here are the top issues you said you care about:

**🗳️ **Protecting voting rights and reforming our campaign finance system

**🪪 **Safeguarding Social Security and Medicare

**🌎 **Addressing climate change and protecting our environment

I want you to know that these are my priorities too, and I’m advancing them every day in Congress.

I’ve stood up to attacks on voting rights by voting NO on the SAVE Act that would have suppressed access for women, service members, and rural Michiganders.

I oppose efforts to undermine Social Security and Medicare by working instead to protect benefits and bring down drug prices.

And I’m fighting for clean water and a sustainable future by leading efforts to curb PFAS pollution, defend the Great Lakes, and invest in clean energy and environmental infrastructure.

Republican extremists are doing everything they can to roll back our progress. They’re attacking voting rights, threatening cuts to Social Security and Medicare, and siding with corporate polluters.

After reviewing your responses, here are the top issues you said you care about: 🗳️ Protecting voting rights and reforming our campaign finance system 🪪 Safeguarding Social Security and Medicare 🌎 Addressing climate change and protecting our environment I want you to know that these are my priorities too, and I’m advancing them every day in Congress. I’ve stood up to attacks on voting rights by voting NO on the SAVE Act that would have suppressed access for women, service members, and rural Michiganders. I oppose efforts to undermine Social Security and Medicare by working instead to protect benefits and bring down drug prices. And I’m fighting for clean water and a sustainable future by leading efforts to curb PFAS pollution, defend the Great Lakes, and invest in clean energy and environmental infrastructure. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Shoulders back, chin up, forward.
body:
|
#
Friend, I want to take a minute and share a little bit about myself and why I decided to run for Congress. **[I hope you’ll take a minute to read this message, then consider making a donation to my campaign to improve the lives of working families everywhere.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114984229/568800350/1362877131?refcode=em-9.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjRjODQ1Yi03ODhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4vSYhaojf6p3e3j4BzgnjjPSnPn6EjX8MGQyDcYBAE=)** | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114984230/568800351/1362877131?refcode=em-9.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjRjODQ1Yi03ODhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4vSYhaojf6p3e3j4BzgnjjPSnPn6EjX8MGQyDcYBAE=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114984234/568800354/1362877131?refcode=em-9.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjRjODQ1Yi03ODhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G4vSYhaojf6p3e3j4BzgnjjPSnPn6EjX8MGQyDcYBAE=)
_Can you guess which of the twins is me? _
I grew up in a family where college wasn’t a guarantee – neither of my parents had gone. I worked hard to get there, not just for myself but for what it would mean for my family. When I chose a different school from both of my sisters, I knew I was stepping into the unknown. I was part of the first generation in my family to go to college, and because of that, every challenge felt bigger. But I carried with me the words my parents raised us on: **Shoulders back, chin up, forward.**
That mindset gave me the strength to face challenges I didn’t always feel ready for. And it’s the same mindset I’ve brought into every chapter of my life – leading Head Start programs, serving at the Department of Education, and now, representing Mid-Michigan in Congress.
I know what it feels like when hard work doesn’t always add up to financial security, but families deserve the chance not just to scrape by, but to build a good life. That’s why I’m fighting for tax relief for working and middle-class families, affordable childcare, and strong public schools for every child.
Now look, the challenges ahead won’t be easy. But just like I learned all those years ago, we don’t get through them by standing still – we get through them by standing tall and moving forward.
**And here’s the most important part: I don’t feel alone in this work.** Knowing that I have your support makes all the difference, because it’s going to take all of us pulling together to deliver the kind of lasting change our communities deserve.
[**So please friend, will you stand with me and chip in $3 to my campaign? clean_body: | Friend, I want to take a minute and share a little bit about myself and why I decided to run for Congress. = | = = Can you guess which of the twins is me? I grew up in a family where college wasn’t a guarantee – neither of my parents had gone. I worked hard to get there, not just for myself but for what it would mean for my family. When I chose a different school from both of my sisters, I knew I was stepping into the unknown. I was part of the first generation in my family to go to college, and because of that, every challenge felt bigger. But I carried with me the words my parents raised us on: Shoulders back, chin up, forward. That mindset gave me the strength to face challenges I didn’t always feel ready for. And it’s the same mindset I’ve brought into every chapter of my life – leading Head Start programs, serving at the Department of Education, and now, representing Mid-Michigan in Congress. I know what it feels like when hard work doesn’t always add up to financial security, but families deserve the chance not just to scrape by, but to build a good life. That’s why I’m fighting for tax relief for working and middle-class families, affordable childcare, and strong public schools for every child. Now look, the challenges ahead won’t be easy. But just like I learned all those years ago, we don’t get through them by standing still – we get through them by standing tall and moving forward. And here’s the most important part: I don’t feel alone in this work. Knowing that I have your support makes all the difference, because it’s going to take all of us pulling together to deliver the kind of lasting change our communities deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 9/10/2025
body:
Day of Defense on Sept. 20 equips families to fight exploitation
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey folks!
🏳️⚧️ Day 7 of the **Durango 9R Dirty Dozen** : HB 25-1312, the most egregious bill ever proposed, forces schools to honor a student’s chosen name, regardless of their legal name, effectively removing parents from the conversation. 9-R board director and HD59 Rep Kate Stewart voted for it, undermining family authority.
Watch & share ➡️ **[Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [X](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Advocates are preparing for the Sept. 20 Day of Defense to [help families combat child exploitation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Denver voters will decide whether to overturn the city’s [flavored tobacco ban](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). DPS is pushing back against a federal order [targeting all-gender bathrooms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and City Council is split on spending $70 million in taxpayer funds for a [women’s soccer stadium](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). The state Supreme Court [limited local noise permits](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Mesa County is [suing Polis over the sanctuary law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling it unconstitutional and dangerous.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** The USPS proposed shifting the burden to voters to [prove mail-in ballot receipt](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), sparking concerns over disqualified ballots. Meanwhile, the Supreme Court gave Trump a win with a 6-3 ruling [reinstating ICE deportation operations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Los Angeles, curbing what justices said was lower court overreach.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Critics say 350 Colorado, billed as a grassroots network, is really a 350.org [lobbying arm funded by out-of-state activists](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) whose agenda has cost energy jobs and raised prices. Meanwhile, wildlife activists want CPW to [ban lead bullets and tackle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), but hunters warn unelected boards are using backdoor tactics to restrict their way of life, with costly alternatives hard to find.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, September 10, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Day of Defense on Sept. 20 equips families to fight exploitation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Colorado ranks tenth in the nation for human trafficking, despite being only 21st in population. That reality is what Abby Corrigan, CEO of the Colorado Faith Alliance, says drives her organization’s work. She believes the fight begins with a clear truth.
“Pornography is the root issue of sex trafficking. America is the number one buyer of sex in the world... they are after our children and it all leads to trafficking in some form or another,” Corrigan said.
Research supports Corrigan’s concern. One in three kids see hardcore porn by age 12 — most of them by accident — and much of today’s mainstream content is violent or degrading. That kind of early exposure is linked to skewed beliefs about sex and higher odds of coercion and exploitation later, which traffickers and online extortionists can exploit.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[350 Colorado Markets Local “Grassroots”, But Operates As National Lobby Arm](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [GREEN LEAP FORWARD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* 350 Colorado presents itself as the state’s largest grassroots climate network, but critics say it functions as a professional lobbying arm of the national group 350.org.
* Its leadership and funding come largely from out-of-state activists, progressive organizations, and Silicon Valley billionaires, while its agenda—fracking bans, electrification mandates, and more—is dictated by national priorities.
* The group has backed policies that eliminated oil, gas, and coal jobs, fought nuclear energy legislation, and helped drive up energy costs for Colorado families and businesses.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Wildlife activists urge CPW to ban lead tackle and bullets, hunters push back](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Activist groups, including former federal officials, are pressuring Colorado Parks and Wildlife to phase out lead ammunition and fishing tackle on state lands, citing risks to wildlife.
* CPW has resisted a blanket ban, instead promoting outreach and incentives for non-lead alternatives, pointing hunters to its lead-free ammunition resources.
* Hunters and gun rights advocates argue the push is a backdoor attempt to restrict hunting, warning copper ammo is more expensive and harder to find, while critics say unelected boards shouldn’t impose such policies.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Are there too many Grumpy Old Men Voters in Colorado?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**BY MIKE O'DONNELL | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 8** _Every ten years the U.S. Census Bureau organizes a count of all the residents of the United States. This count includes citizens as well as non-citizens, and even those experiencing homelessness._
__****
**[The Sword of the Spirit: On the Offensive–Advancing with God’s Sword](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 7** _As a boy, I loved playing with swords. Sometimes I’d pick up a stick and pretend to be Robin Hood, while other times I engaged in lightsaber duels reminiscent of Star Wars. Our battles were always grand—filled with heroic moves, slow-motion falls, and victory speeches nobody requested._
**[Transgenderism, Firearms, and the Conservative Dilemma](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | SEPTEMBER 5** _Rumors are circulating across social media that a future Trump administration might consider restricting firearm ownership for individuals who identify as transgender. These claims, unverified as of now, have sparked sharp reactions on both sides of the aisle._ **[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat

**✨ DID YOU KNOW?** **Glitter was created by accident** in 1934 when Henry Ruschmann, a machinist from Bernardsville, New Jersey, built a machine to cut plastic film at high speeds. When it malfunctioned, it produced tiny sparkling fragments he nicknamed “schnibbles.” Ruschmann later founded Meadowbrook Glitter, a company that still manufactures glitter today.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "We all want progress, but if you're on the wrong road, progress means doing an about turn and walking back to the right road; in that case, the man who turns back soonest is the most progressive." – C.S. Lewis

|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114984430/568801104/1527952032?refcode=em-9.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0NmQ0N2MtNzg4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHhbci48qDIWeJp0J0eaunqvAEIsTMngqaFUlYyTOEQ=) I'm an Army veteran, so I took it personally when news broke that Donald Trump is trying to rename the Department of Defense to the “Department of War.” Because we all know what he really means: \- He wants a military that serves his agenda, not the American people.
\- He wants loyalty tests instead of respected, experienced leaders.
\- He wants to turn troops against their fellow Americans here at home. **That’s not defense.
That’s not freedom.
That’s not the America I served.** _I’ll be a resounding NO on Trump’s name change._ Our military exists to defend this country -- not to be weaponized for partisan power, and certainly not to fuel Trump’s phony tough-guy posturing of America as a “war first” nation. But I can’t hold the line alone. The only safeguard against Trump’s abuse of power is a Congress strong enough -- and independent enough -- to say no. **[Please donate $3 now to help me fight back. Help ensure we have a Congress that will stand firm against Trump’s plot to twist our military into a political weapon »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114984433/568801107/1527952032?refcode=em-9.10.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0NmQ0N2MtNzg4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UHhbci48qDIWeJp0J0eaunqvAEIsTMngqaFUlYyTOEQ=)**

clean_body: | = = I'm an Army veteran, so I took it personally when news broke that Donald Trump is trying to rename the Department of Defense to the “Department of War.” Because we all know what he really means: \- He wants a military that serves his agenda, not the American people. \- He wants loyalty tests instead of respected, experienced leaders. \- He wants to turn troops against their fellow Americans here at home. That’s not defense. That’s not freedom. That’s not the America I served. I’ll be a resounding NO on Trump’s name change. Our military exists to defend this country -- not to be weaponized for partisan power, and certainly not to fuel Trump’s phony tough-guy posturing of America as a “war first” nation. But I can’t hold the line alone. The only safeguard against Trump’s abuse of power is a Congress strong enough -- and independent enough -- to say no. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I swore an oath to defend the Constitution, and I intend to keep it. body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team,

Donald Trump recently announced that he will be moving Space Command HQ from Colorado Springs, Colorado, to Huntsville, Alabama.

What's happening here is clear: Trump is moving Space Command to punish Colorado because we didn’t vote for him in the 2024 presidential election.

Instead of leading with the country’s best interests and security in mind, he's leading with his ego and political retribution

Trump’s politicization of our military makes America less safe. Moving Space Command out of Colorado will cost taxpayers hundreds of millions of dollars and set us back in the space race against our adversaries — all to stroke Trump's ego.

That's not what real leadership looks like. Jason Crow is working to bring a new generation of servant leaders to Congress — leaders who will actually fight to make Colorado and our nation stronger, not weaker.

name: Dexter HQ
subject: SCOTUS just sanctioned racial profiling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
Peter,
The conservative-stacked Supreme Court just handed Donald Trump another victory by overturning a federal judge’s ban on ICE agents conducting indiscriminate immigration-related stops in Los Angeles.
What does that mean? Armed and masked ICE agents can now racially profile people with “reasonable suspicion” in California. In short, they can stop someone based on certain factors, like if they work a specific job, look a certain way, or speak a certain language.
It’s an attack on our basic rights—and another sign that the Republican majority in Congress and on the Supreme Court won’t lift a finger to protect us from Trump’s unlawful overreach.
Trump is sending the National Guard into our cities for no justifiable reason—going so far as to essentially declare war on Chicago in a social media post. He’s cherry-picking anecdotes and using dog whistles to justify his ICE raids to grab media attention, frighten communities, and make himself appear strong. And it’s no coincidence that Los Angeles, Washington, D.C., and Chicago are some of our most diverse cities.
These are strongman tactics by the weakest president we’ve ever seen.
Now, he’s threatening to send forces into New York—and other major cities like Portland could be next.
Only authoritarians threaten to turn a country’s armed forces against their own citizens.
We can take back the House and re-establish guardrails for our democracy, but we can’t do it without you. Will you help us power our campaign and stand up for our democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250910_occupation_act]

name: Laura Friedman
subject: This isn’t how democracies work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114985016/568803003/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ4MjhmNTEtNzk4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TIP3uPsKwdTlCgOG2JJmBGyJsI0I1dFGJeV3FJiMnoQ=) Friend, In this week’s horrific ruling, the Supreme Court made it legal to target people for questioning and arrest based on how they look, speak, or where they work — even without probable cause. By ruling that ICE can resume “roving”, stop-and-frisk raids, overriding our local judge’s decree, they’ve made clear that whole classes of Americans have less rights than others — that some of us can be detained without probable cause, because of the color of our skin or our accent. **This isn’t public safety. This isn’t how democracies work.** **It’s blatant racial profiling, now greenlit by the highest court in the country.** There should be no law that puts US citizens in a position of having to carry proof of citizenship or face arrest and detainment. I can’t believe we need to say this, but all citizens should be treated equally by law enforcement, without consideration of the color of their skin or their accent. **And there should be no right for unidentified, masked agents to carry out these threats.** As Los Angeles’ representative, I am not going to be a passive actor while the administration and its allies try to weaken our democracy. That’s why I’m helping lead the charge on the **No Masks for ICE Act** to bring transparency back to immigration enforcement. [**Sign on today to end masked ICE agents, and demand more accountability from those tasked with keeping us safe.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114985018/568803005/-2018676197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ4MjhmNTEtNzk4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TIP3uPsKwdTlCgOG2JJmBGyJsI0I1dFGJeV3FJiMnoQ=&emci=0819f849-798e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ad828f51-798e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8447100) | ****[Sign On: Demand Accountability from ICE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114985021/568803007/-2018676197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWQ4MjhmNTEtNzk4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TIP3uPsKwdTlCgOG2JJmBGyJsI0I1dFGJeV3FJiMnoQ=&emci=0819f849-798e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ad828f51-798e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8447100)****

Thank you for standing alongside me for our communities.
Laura

clean_body: | = Friend, In this week’s horrific ruling, the Supreme Court made it legal to target people for questioning and arrest based on how they look, speak, or where they work — even without probable cause. By ruling that ICE can resume “roving”, stop-and-frisk raids, overriding our local judge’s decree, they’ve made clear that whole classes of Americans have less rights than others — that some of us can be detained without probable cause, because of the color of our skin or our accent. This isn’t public safety. This isn’t how democracies work. It’s blatant racial profiling, now greenlit by the highest court in the country. There should be no law that puts US citizens in a position of having to carry proof of citizenship or face arrest and detainment. I can’t believe we need to say this, but all citizens should be treated equally by law enforcement, without consideration of the color of their skin or their accent. And there should be no right for unidentified, masked agents to carry out these threats. As Los Angeles’ representative, I am not going to be a passive actor while the administration and its allies try to weaken our democracy. That’s why I’m helping lead the charge on the No Masks for ICE Act to bring transparency back to immigration enforcement. | **** Thank you for standing alongside me for our communities. Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! during the height of the pandemic.

itself.

You know who’s vaccinated?

* Trump

body:
I’m calling for his resignation

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=813%2E49239%2Ex13DI4)

null, it’s Haley Stevens, and I need you to read this:

**I’m calling on Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to resign immediately as Secretary of Health and Human Services.**
He has absolutely no business anywhere near our public health system.

**[If you agree RFK Jr. is unfit to serve, will you add your name to my petition calling for his resignation?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5817?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=813%2E49239%2Ex13DI4)**
| | [RFK Jr. Must Resign >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5817?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=813%2E49239%2Ex13DI4)
---
Since taking office, RFK Jr. has:

❌ Slashed billions from lifesaving research on cancer, addiction, HIV, and more.
!!️ Fired CDC Director Susan Monarez, throwing the agency into chaos.
🚨 Canceled vaccine campaigns and downplayed dangerous measles outbreaks.
🚫 Pushed junk science and bogus supplements instead of proven medicine.
🛑 Fired thousands of public health scientists and experts.

This isn’t just incompetence. It’s an attack on our health, our safety, and our future.

RFK Jr. has spent years pushing fringe theories and dangerous lies. Then Donald Trump appointed him Secretary of HHS, and they’ve dismantled decades of critical progress in a matter of months.
The HHS needs science-based leadership, not chaos. We need truth, not conspiracies. We need someone fighting for public health, not tearing it down.

I’m not going to stay silent while RFK Jr. risks lives and enables MAGA extremism in one of the most important agencies in our government.
**[Will you stand with me? Add your name now to demand RFK Jr. resign:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5817?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=813%2E49239%2Ex13DI4)**
| | [RFK Jr. Must Resign >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5817?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=813%2E49239%2Ex13DI4)
---
Thank you for standing up for science, safety, and sanity.

Haley Stevens
|

The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. name: Deb Haaland
subject: Republican voter registration numbers are rising fast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
The good news is we still have time to turn things around.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4341%2E400544%2EAPdftz)
**This is a big problem.**
Recent analysis shows that Republican voter registration numbers are _rising_ in New Mexico. It’s a **huge warning sign** that the governor’s office could flip red next year — especially if MAGA billionaires flood the zone with attack ads and outside money.
The good news is **we still have time to turn things around.** I’ve seen the power of grassroots organizing firsthand, and that’s what’s going to help us win this race and keep the governor’s office blue.
Our strength doesn’t come from corporate boardrooms or billionaire wallets —**it comes from hard working people like you** pitching in what you can to help us reach voters in every corner of the state.
But if we fall behind now, it may be too late to catch up when it matters most.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in $5 today to help us grow our grassroots campaign and keep New Mexico blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250910_1_registration?amount=5&refcode=em20250910-4341&refcode2=4341_400544_APdftz&akid=4341%2E400544%2EAPdftz)**

Your support helps us hire organizers and reach voters so that every New Mexican knows what’s at stake: affordable healthcare, our public lands, and strong schools for every child in the state.
New Mexico has made big strides in recent years, but Donald Trump is targeting our state and wants to take us backward. We can’t let his MAGA allies flip the governor’s office and help him succeed.
Let’s prove that our people-powered movement is stronger than their billionaire machine. Deb Haaland

name: Americans for Responsible Innovation
subject: Tomorrow: AI's Emerging Workforce Impact
body:
Hear from digital economy experts in this virtual panel

| | | | | |
---
|
---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4162bff90e&e=a07d75591f)
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **Virtual Panel: AI's Emerging Workforce Impact** _On Thursday, hear from digital economy experts Erik Brynjolfsson and Bharat Chandar of Stanford’s Digital Economy Lab_
On Thursday, September 11, join a [virtual panel](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4991877c33&e=a07d75591f) with digital economy experts Erik Brynjolfsson and Bharat Chandar to discuss the impact of artificial intelligence on the jobs landscape. Following a jobs report that indicates a [national slow-down](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=198dbc2f66&e=a07d75591f) in hiring, the panel will discuss Brynjolfsson and Chandar’s [recent research](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=edcee4eae0&e=a07d75591f), which finds clear evidence of AI’s impact on jobs for entry-level workers.
**Register for the Virtual Panel:**[**AI’s Emerging Workforce Impact**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=e3c03be06c&e=a07d75591f)

---
[|
---](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=5e062e5ae4&e=a07d75591f)
| | **AI’s Emerging Workforce Impact** Thursday, September 11, 202512:00PM ET[**RSVP here**](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=4f67d67e39&e=a07d75591f)**.**
This August, Brynjolfsson and Chandar released new [research](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=296c5982bc&e=a07d75591f) titled _Canaries in the Coal Mine? Six Facts about the Recent Employment Effects of Artificial Intelligence_. The report examines changes in the labor market for occupations exposed to AI using high-frequency administrative data from the largest payroll software provider in the United States. The paper finds that since the widespread adoption of AI, early-career workers (ages 22-25) in the most exposed occupations have experienced a 13 percent relative decline in employment even after controlling for firm-level shocks.

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=d8f6ee1714&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=96e223abca&e=a07d75591f)
---
[](https://responsibleinnovation.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c0dd7c48fa7fb81cbc8185a&id=f9e5c897f7&e=a07d75591f)

name: Local Democracy Project
subject: Real power starts locally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Local Democracy Project
body:
| | |
America just spent $16 billion on a presidential race where money and maps beat voters. Meanwhile,_real power sits closer to home:_ school board elections decide whether science class teaches about dinosaurs or Noah’s Ark; city council voters determine who sets billion-dollar police budgets. And these local elections are often decided by only a few votes! This is where democracy still works and where the Local Democracy Project goes to work year-round. **Here’s the proof:**
* Many cities cut library fines, raised wages in their communities, and moved to 100% renewable electricity.
* Philadelphia reduced its jail population by 30%.
* Over 50 cities adopted ranked-choice voting.
* When Washington stalled, 247 cities pushed forward on climate anyway.

**While the Senate gives 578,000 Wyoming residents the same power as 39.5 million Californians, local elections still answer to people, not oligarchs. We train candidates, boost turnout, and help neighbors win the races that shape daily life - schools, safety, housing, climate.** [**If you’re tired of political theater, invest where your vote and your dollar change outcomes. clean_body: | | | America just spent $16 billion on a presidential race where money and maps beat voters. Meanwhile,real power sits closer to home: school board elections decide whether science class teaches about dinosaurs or Noah’s Ark; city council voters determine who sets billion-dollar police budgets. And these local elections are often decided by only a few votes! This is where democracy still works and where the Local Democracy Project goes to work year-round. Here’s the proof: Many cities cut library fines, raised wages in their communities, and moved to 100% renewable electricity. Philadelphia reduced its jail population by 30%. Over 50 cities adopted ranked-choice voting. When Washington stalled, 247 cities pushed forward on climate anyway. While the Senate gives 578,000 Wyoming residents the same power as 39.5 million Californians, local elections still answer to people, not oligarchs. We train candidates, boost turnout, and help neighbors win the races that shape daily life - schools, safety, housing, climate. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Democracy isn’t dead. It’s local. Let’s build it from the ground up. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. Contributions or gifts to Local Democracy Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea8a0efd-5fb0-4707-b3f1-3cfaa296b525/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: Trump is demanding Arizona voters' personal data
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114986217/568806990/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250910_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgwYmVkMmYtN2Y4ZS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CRnOS2GnL6oOXYnVIERqEHm4S0W0l6zrPskAZQMAa0Y=)
---
**Arizona's electoral independence is under attack.** The Trump administration is demanding our state hand over Arizona voters' complete personal information — including dates of birth, addresses, and Social Security numbers — to the Department of Justice. **This isn't about election security. This is about federal control over Arizona's elections.** According to the Brennan Center for Justice, Arizona is one of at least 21 states that Trump’s DOJ has targeted for voter roll information. Our Democratic Secretary of State, Adrian Fontes, has refused to comply, citing Arizona law that makes it a felony for public officials to release this sensitive voter data. **But this is bigger than one request. This is about whether Arizona controls its own elections.** Trump has already announced plans to eliminate mail-in voting used by _over 85% of Arizona voters,_ and he’s demanding voter ID requirements in all states. Now, he also wants access to every Arizona voter's personal information. This is a systematic assault not just on our state’s electoral independence, but also on our personal privacy and our rights. clean_body: | = Arizona's electoral independence is under attack. The Trump administration is demanding our state hand over Arizona voters' complete personal information — including dates of birth, addresses, and Social Security numbers — to the Department of Justice. This isn't about election security. This is about federal control over Arizona's elections. According to the Brennan Center for Justice, Arizona is one of at least 21 states that Trump’s DOJ has targeted for voter roll information. Our Democratic Secretary of State, Adrian Fontes, has refused to comply, citing Arizona law that makes it a felony for public officials to release this sensitive voter data. But this is bigger than one request. This is about whether Arizona controls its own elections. Trump has already announced plans to eliminate mail-in voting used by over 85% of Arizona voters, and he’s demanding voter ID requirements in all states. Now, he also wants access to every Arizona voter's personal information. This is a systematic assault not just on our state’s electoral independence, but also on our personal privacy and our rights. = | = Trump’s GOP is counting on us to accept federal control over state elections as the new normal. That’s not going to happen on our watch. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress to reject Trump’s trillion-dollar war budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: Donald Trump already sent armed troops into Washington, D.C. as a political power grab. And he’s threatening to deploy forces into cities like Chicago and Baltimore. So much for Republicans believing in federalism.
NOW: Congress is preparing to vote on the National Defense Authorization Act (NDAA). Passing this bill hands Trump a blank check to militarize our streets.
Before I explain, will you add your name right now to demand Congress vote NO on Trump’s trillion-dollar war budget? [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ndaa-defense-spending-petition?contactdata=9LRLrrK4gCwbMy1aMeyAcUrZnMilcLLWwY2knc25/Q6pUmJp2Pg9DoHcdpxBVxRoc9dt90JnmNQNXY9ByK1iSbXtw154HLTtX9fF1zeDkmY2/YWwcp4+Rel1lRzXTEOJh9DIQoDqWGslNP66XItb69WfUfhbd2A5v0HIyWrp/9Nr0bgnwYz6w4Nxl1iQq6IG]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ndaa-defense-spending-petition?contactdata=9LRLrrK4gCwbMy1aMeyAcUrZnMilcLLWwY2knc25/Q6pUmJp2Pg9DoHcdpxBVxRoc9dt90JnmNQNXY9ByK1iSbXtw154HLTtX9fF1zeDkmY2/YWwcp4+Rel1lRzXTEOJh9DIQoDqWGslNP66XItb69WfUfhbd2A5v0HIyWrp/9Nr0bgnwYz6w4Nxl1iQq6IG]
The NDAA authorizes nearly $1 trillion in defense spending — even as the Department of Defense has failed seven consecutive audits and contractors continue to price-gouge taxpayers. This money doesn’t make us safer. Instead, it fuels waste, fraud, and the kind of authoritarian overreach that allows Trump to turn the military against our own people.
I fully support a strong national defense that meets today’s challenges — but true security doesn’t come from sending troops into American neighborhoods. It comes from investing in healthcare, affordable housing, education, and jobs.
Voting for the NDAA gives Trump the tools to escalate his attacks on our communities. We need to stand our ground and not capitulate.
Will you join me? Take action—tell Congress to vote NO on the NDAA.
ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ndaa-defense-spending-petition?contactdata=9LRLrrK4gCwbMy1aMeyAcUrZnMilcLLWwY2knc25/Q6pUmJp2Pg9DoHcdpxBVxRoc9dt90JnmNQNXY9ByK1iSbXtw154HLTtX9fF1zeDkmY2/YWwcp4+Rel1lRzXTEOJh9DIQoDqWGslNP66XItb69WfUfhbd2A5v0HIyWrp/9Nr0bgnwYz6w4Nxl1iQq6IG]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250910-ndaa&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20250910-ndaa]

name: Chris Brooks, LCV
subject: (Open Today) Trump just seized funds from wind projects. We have to respond.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI5MTE0MzkS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjMwMDEzNzU3MQS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
URGENT: Trump is canceling clean energy projects and seizing their funding. Please, renew your LCV membership for just $5 to help power our response >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f0KqD- Peter — the Trump administration just pulled $679 million in funding
for offshore wind port projects, and ordered work halted at others — all while electricity rates are soaring across the country. The timing here is critical:right now, Congress is up against a September 30 deadline to make a deal to
avoid a government shutdown. Extreme MAGA lawmakers are taking this as an
opening to demand even more cuts to solar and wind investments — and we have to
respond. LCV is ramping up a major pressure campaign to protect clean energy in the
lead-up to a deal, and a group of donors has just agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all
contributions this month. Can we count on your help? Please, renew your LCV membership right now for just $5 while your support goes THREE TIMES as far >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/k_ Our climate is under attack and electricity rates are skyrocketing, and cuts to
clean energy will make things even worse. Now, with a government shutdown
deadline looming, members of Congress, even Democrats, are under enormous pressure to agree to harmful provisions that would otherwise be unthinkable. If the environmental movement doesn’t act quickly, MAGA lawmakers could get away
with: Slashing virtually all clean energy investments in wind and solar,Defunding all climate work at the EPA, and Attacking public lands to benefit corporate polluters. Peter, we can’t let that happen. LCV needs to raise $50,000 by the end of this month to show Congress that we will not let them prioritize polluters over people and the planet. Please, renew your membership today while your gift will be TRIPLED to help us pressure key lawmakers ahead of the September 30 deadline. $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv. With gratitude, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005

name: AOC
subject: Personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Did you know that over half of all Members of Congress are millionaires? Meanwhile, the median household income is only $70,784. 👈🏽 **This is wild.**
Many of our lawmakers have no lived experience of working paycheck to paycheck or trying to pay rent working a low-wage job.
To me, policy is personal. When I worked as a bartender, I relied on tips to pay the bills. I know the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because I have lived them. And I intimately understand how important measures like raising the minimum wage, universal health care, universal child care, and free college can be for families living in financial uncertainty.
That’s why I’m in Congress: **to represent working families like mine.**
I am honored to be here, and I can’t do this work without you — the grassroots supporters who have had my back every step of the way. I can’t self-fund my campaign by writing a big check, and I don’t do any donor call-time or exclusive fundraising events.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you are able, can you chip in $5 today to our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250910.ZhKLWE&refcode=em20250910-9729-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)
**[**](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250910.ZhKLWE&refcode=em20250910-9729-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250910.ZhKLWE&refcode=em20250910-9729-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250910?refcode=em20250910-9729-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&refcode2=9729_2526796_j_kIJC&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250910-9729-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=23&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=27&akid=9729%2E2526796%2Ej_kIJC)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

| Peter,

I’ll keep this short: I know times are tough, and not everyone can give $25 or even $5 when they’re asked.

[_**That’s why today, I’m asking if you can contribute just $1.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114987323/568810643/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-09-10_1&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWUyZDZkMC04MzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IhseFz887vvSDS1AndTIL-S5e3MPOT_sv4W9CRbcqA=)
---
| [GIVE $1 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114987325/568810646/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-09-10_1&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWUyZDZkMC04MzhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0IhseFz887vvSDS1AndTIL-S5e3MPOT_sv4W9CRbcqA=)

name: Team Moore
subject: Can Wes count on you?
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)
Peter, in the last day since launching our reelection campaign, we’ve seen a _surge_ of grassroots support from folks across the country.
But now that Wes has officially announced he’s running for reelection, we have to be prepared for anything that might come our way.
Wes and his team have delivered for Maryland — **but from public safety improvements to funding public education, Trump is trying to roll it all back.**
Wes has never backed down from a fight, but he needs your support, Peter.
**[What do you say? Can Wes count on you to chip in $5 — or anything you can — to our reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250910-3?refcode=em-20250910-3&refcode2=604_1086043_YjGCvF&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250910-3?amount=5&refcode=em-20250910-3&refcode2=604_1086043_YjGCvF&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)**
Thanks for helping us build this movement.
Together,
Team Moore

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250910-3&t=2&refcode2=604_1086043_YjGCvF&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=604%2E1086043%2EYjGCvF)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
Over a decade after legislation was introduced in Congress to contain
an epidemic of federal workers watching pornography on government
computers, the nation’s Homeland Security Secretary has fired
numerous employees “for consuming pornographic content during work
hours while on government issued devices,” according
to statement issued a few days ago by the Department of Homeland
Security (DHS).

Over a decade after legislation was introduced in Congress to
contain an epidemic of federal workers watching pornography on
government computers, the nation’s Homeland Security Secretary has
fired numerous employees “for consuming pornographic content during
work hours while on government issued devices,” according
to statement issued a few days ago by the Department of Homeland
Security (DHS). “Today, I am announcing that multiple disgraced FEMA
[Federal Emergency Management Agency] employees were fired for using
their government devices to consume sexually explicit content while on
the job,” said DHS Secretary Kristi Noem in the recent announcement.
“These individuals had access to critical information and
intelligence and were entrusted to safeguard Americans from
emergencies—and instead they were consuming pornography.” The DHS
Secretary added that “in at least one case the pornography consumed
was racially charged and involved bestiality.”

[] [article-image] [] Over a decade after legislation was introduced in Congress to contain an epidemic of federal workers watching pornography on government computers, the nation’s Homeland Security Secretary has fired numerous employees “for consuming pornographic content during work hours while on government issued devices,” according to statement issued a few days ago by the Department of Homeland Security (DHS). “Today, I am announcing that multiple disgraced FEMA [Federal Emergency Management Agency] employees were fired for using their government devices to consume sexually explicit content while on the job,” said DHS Secretary Kristi Noem in the recent announcement. “These individuals had access to critical information and intelligence and were entrusted to safeguard Americans from emergencies—and instead they were consuming pornography.” The DHS Secretary added that “in at least one case the pornography consumed was racially charged and involved bestiality.” Read More [] name: 25th Amendment Alert (via VPP)
subject: Trump OUSTED From Office!?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
We need to know where YOU stand >>>>
| **BREAKING NEWS: DEMOCRATIC REPRESENTATIVE CALLS FOR USING THE 25TH AMENDMENT TO REMOVE DONALD TRUMP FROM OFFICE »**

[**We need to know if Democrats in your state agree: Should Congress invoke the 25th amendment to REMOVE Donald Trump from office? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20250910_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q) | [YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND CONGRESS INVOKE THE 25TH AMENDMENT TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20250910_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q)
---
Trump said he would be a ‘dictator on Day 1’ and that’s _exactly_ what he’s done:

**He GUTTED Medicaid for MILLIONS of Americans!
He BANNED DEI events like Pride and Black History Month!
He sent the MARINES to Los Angeles and the National Guard to DC!
And he wants to serve an unprecedented _THIRD TERM_ as President!**

He is DANGEROUS, folks — _but we can only do so much without your help._

[**That’s why we need to know: Will you add your name to our time-sensitive petition calling on Congress to invoke the 25th Amendment and REMOVE Trump from the White House? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20250910_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q)
[YES, ADD MY NAME: DEMAND CONGRESS INVOKE THE 25TH AMENDMENT TO REMOVE TRUMP FROM THE WHITE HOUSE! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/25th-amendment/?source=VPP_20250910_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q)
---
Thank you for your activism,
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21179%2E878179%2ENnVe-Q)
---

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: Push them back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Whether it's these 27 different state bills, folks, or the SAVE Act in Congress, it's abundantly clear that opponents of voting rights are only ramping up their attacks on our fundamental rights . We have to put pressure on them to stop at both the state and federal level.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stand with us and fight to defend our right to vote wherever it's under attack >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091025_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
BCJ: State Bills Would Require Passport or Birth Certificate to Register to Vote [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091025_2&amount=25]
Team,
We've told you that voter I.D. laws are unfairly biased against people of color, young people, and unmarried women. However, across the country, states are introducing bills to make these laws even MORE restrictive at an alarming rate.
The nonpartisan Brennan Center for Justice has the details: “ Lawmakers in at least 27 states have introduced...bills in 2025 that would require some or all voters to show citizenship documents to vote .” Not just when you register, but every single time you show up to cast a ballot.
While citizenship is required to vote, rigorous research shows time and again that instances of votes cast by non-citizens are extremely rare. At least 21 million citizens, however, do not have immediate access to the I.D. documents these laws would demand, including 3.1 million voters who lack documents entirely.
The suppressive SAVE Act is stalled in Congress. So opponents of voting rights have turned to the states. These bills aren’t motivated by a desire for free and fair elections – they’re just another voter suppression tactic.
We need your help to defend the right to vote in these 27 states and beyond. Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us fight back against voter suppression and intimidation? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091025_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=091025_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091025_2&amount=35]
The problem is not only that these bills would block millions of Americans from voting, but also that these requirements to vote are a massive burden for election officials and many voters alike.
These intimidating requirements also come alongside other suppressive policies stocked into these bills: Mandatory voter purges, reduced early voting, closing polling places, restrictions on mail-in ballots, and so much more.
We need to speak with one loud, clear voice and tell every state legislature: We won't stand for any of these suppressive policies. Not now, not ever.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to restrict voting until we make them stop. Fuel our efforts to resist $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=091025_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091025_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091025_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=IobdhF12HJtL9qOVjoe7GXG9MECHV2sf7bezXw3NNpUz11bqKKCetzTHizUsbkHdBKTBqrVKl7WjI4CO0B4YnRMUD8QcvxGsfUwI5cleTSU5DZMUqaq64aDAXSyViOBxjRSh%2BUeiLXHy%2FH3spX%2BFK6FlXGSdybMlkI5T9chluucJgPHRwanZ%2BTQ0SCucNFSR81hzIgmNJx94EW8Ut%2BwKsnZ6cEeNnMytsFzPLWIizmCCDleLIvlNTWW42gHyCZsa0HNvANDdqTwqgshviyYGZcG81FH8WGnyS9TrbIHD6Oz6nsYsMSW3tDssorOFOadAhRV%2FnlX9BI48ZFriwrOcsLS9ghl9cYeBrpc8SOOE4PAMW2rzMN2XcGSFaZxgRqvf2eCJpmYg0dIB8YzUdIpA55wEHTB%2FfUvOcATpbQTKlq0%3D .

Conservative icon **[Charlie Kirk was fatally shot](https://substack.com/redirect/352f96a2-871f-41c1-b060-ab794c4f8c30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Wednesday during a TPUSA speaking event at Utah Valley University.
Fox News **[confirmed](https://substack.com/redirect/352f96a2-871f-41c1-b060-ab794c4f8c30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that Kirk has passed away as of 4:45PM EST.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0458946f-f9ef-499c-80a9-9aa139cef472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0458946f-f9ef-499c-80a9-9aa139cef472?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Reports as of publication say that law enforcement do not have a suspect in custody and a manhunt is underway.
**President Donald Trump responded to tragedy on Truth Social, writing:**
> _"The Great, and even Legendary, Charlie Kirk, is dead. No one understood or had the Heart of the Youth in the United States of America better than Charlie. He was loved and admired by ALL, especially me, and now, he is no longer with us. Melania and my Sympathies go out to his beautiful wife Erika, and family. Charlie, we love you!"_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c28afd8-584c-46bd-95c7-ea5f77c75300?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Horrific footage of the shooting was posted across social media instantly, shooting a large crowd of young supporters fleeing in a panic.
Utah Valley University said police are going "building to building" escorting students and staff off campus and those on campus were instructed to secure in place and wait for officers to escort them.
* * *
# Scott Jennings offers a eulogy on CNN for Charlie Kirk after passing
_**"He inspired all these kids to be involved in their country."**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/919acc2b-34f7-46a6-b374-48836d180b11?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
## Republicans and Democrats join in condemning political violence
Both Democrats and Republicans, including Sen. Mike Lee, House Speaker Mike Johnson, Rep. Eugene Vindman, and Senate leaders John Thune and Chuck Schumer, condemned political violence and expressed prayers for Kirk's recovery.
"This is a good time to pray," Sen. Mike Lee, R-Utah, said on X.
"Please join us in praying for our good friend, Charlie Kirk," Speaker of the House Mike Johnson, R-La., wrote.
"Political violence has no place in America. This shooting is horrifying, and I'm praying for Charlie Kirk and his family," Democrat Sen. Chuck Schumer wrote.
"Political violence is NEVER acceptable. My thoughts and prayers are with Charlie Kirk and his family," House, Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries said in a statement.
### Rep. Nancy Pelosi condemns "gun violence" in her response:
"The horrific shooting today at Utah Valley University is reprehensible. Political violence has absolutely no place in our nation. All Americans should pray for Charlie Kirk's recovery and hold the entire UVU community in our hearts as they endure the trauma of this gun violence," Pelosi wrote in a statement.
**Context of Recent Political Violence:** The shooting follows recent high-profile assassination attempts, including two on President Donald Trump in 2024 and a deadly attack on Minnesota state lawmakers in June, highlighting a polarized political climate.
* * *

Led by a managing partner who has been **[at the center of every significant court case affecting online gaming,](https://substack.com/redirect/6154161e-217a-42d9-8c6d-7f3b0d9210df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Ifrah Law operates at the cutting edge of technology, innovation, and regulation.
Its lawyers represent industry players throughout the entire business cycle, from the formation of a corporation or licensing relationship, through marketing, partnering, growth, and disputes, to profitable exits.
We're proud to share that all partners at Ifrah Law have been ranked by Chambers and Partners, the gold standard for evaluating legal excellence worldwide.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Donald Trump just attacked me from the Oval Office
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250910em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250910em]
Donald Trump just attacked me from the Oval Office.
But I will not be rattled.
I will not be intimidated by somebody who's fired thousands of Virginians, driven up costs, and closed our rural health clinics. In fact, let the President come to Virginia and answer for the chaos he has unleashed.
There is nothing — absolutely nothing — that will divert my attention from the needs of Virginia families.
So, I hope I can earn your support today. Your contribution of $20 or more will be split with Tobias Read to help us stand up to Trump's attacks. This is the biggest election of 2025, and we need to raise more resources to reach voters with the truth. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250910em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250910em]
Thank you so much,
Abigail Spanberger
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-spanberger?refcode=250910em]
