name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Charlie Kirk, may he rest in peace.
body:
Remembering a brave patriot and friend
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/0100019935ad6d8a-b0b06260-b2c5-48a3-b34f-1eff91fe9264-000000/34baI8LaMdXq1OPs3Rtt1AF4OELFQyCwgILClin2uig=422)Patriot–Today, evil stole the life of a good and innocent man, and my friend, Charlie Kirk. I am heartbroken and sick.Charlie was an incredible husband, father, and patriot. He put so many years into fighting for our country. He took a pro-Christian, pro-freedom, pro-America message into every corner of the country, including college campuses. He loved our country so much that he was willing to engage with those who disagreed with him through peaceful conversation and debate.I will forever remember my friend as the brave, God-fearing patriot that he was, and I mourn him deeply. I ache for his wife, now a widow, and his young children who now are forced to grow up without their father.Please join me in praying for Erika, his wife, for his two beautiful children, and the rest of his family. Pray for our nation as well. Pray that people reject the wickedness that would drive them to murder a young father just for speaking his mind.May God grant Charlie Kirk eternal rest in His loving arms. Please God, may Erika, Charlie’s children, his family, friends, and all those who love and support his work feel your presence and may your presence give them peace as they mourn.In deep sorrow,Jenny Beth Martin[CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/0100019935ad6d8a-b0b06260-b2c5-48a3-b34f-1eff91fe9264-000000/gUwEk0dHR3WqCwvWSjbRqt-dyLQ1HC_VTTAkbuDvZBg=422) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/0100019935ad6d8a-b0b06260-b2c5-48a3-b34f-1eff91fe9264-000000/Jy0nAWMpb_ZHPlRHT63OeegcQiaxssFQodtN5-MTQLA=422)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/0100019935ad6d8a-b0b06260-b2c5-48a3-b34f-1eff91fe9264-000000/GmNBzXkwEuyEeTYadEK3RgCqddLO18g6ezd-BgsDMZw=422) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/0100019935ad6d8a-b0b06260-b2c5-48a3-b34f-1eff91fe9264-000000/pfvgpu1UtolA2fesuvctNwI9DEKrQ33krb5OBZpysws=422).

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: Angela’s launch was just the beginning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hey Peter,

Six days ago, Justice Democrats officially endorsed Angela Gonzales-Torres
for Congress.

Angela is exactly the kind of candidate Justice Democrats was founded to
support: a working-class organizer from a mixed-status family and a
born-and-raised Angeleno who deeply knows her community’s struggles
because she’s lived them herself.

This is our mission — to elect bold leaders who come from the working
class and will never sell out to corporate PACs or special interests.
Angela’s story is the story of CA-34, right in the heart of Los Angeles:
one of the poorest communities in California, and one of the hardest hit
by Trump’s cruel attacks on immigrants.

In Congress, she’ll be a fierce voice for Medicare for All, a Green New
Deal, higher wages, canceling student loan debt, and ending bottomless
taxpayer funding for genocide and endless war abroad — addressing so many
of the biggest crises facing our country.

The only way we’ll win big, transformative policy is by electing Angela
and more people like her.

But here’s the truth: early support makes or breaks campaigns like
Angela’s. Her incumbent opponent, Jimmy Gomez, already has the backing of
corporate special interests and super PACs that can spend millions to
defeat our movement – including AIPAC and Crypto.

But we have something more powerful than corporate Super PACs: the mandate
of the people to clean up shop in the Democratic Party and usher in a new
generation of leadership that will actually fight for us. Early donations
give Angela the resources she’ll need to win and send a powerful message
to special interests that our working-class movement is here to stay.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250910-2?refcode=em20250910-37011&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37011_1203867_YIAVg_&akid=37011%2E1203867%2EYIAVg_ ]So Peter, with our first
week almost behind us, can you chip in $5 or more to
support our fight today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250910-2?refcode=em20250910-37011&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37011_1203867_YIAVg_&akid=37011%2E1203867%2EYIAVg_ ]Contribute $5

This campaign is about giving a community at the heart of Los Angeles a
representative who reflects and fights for the people who actually live
there. With your support, Angela can win, and we can build a Democratic
Party that truly works for the working class — together.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250910-37011-footer&t=1002&refcode2=37011_1203867_YIAVg_&akid=37011%2E1203867%2EYIAVg_

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=37011%2E1203867%2EYIAVg_

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Charlie Kirk
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friend,
I am horrified to hear that Charlie Kirk was shot and killed today at an event in Utah. My deepest sympathies are with his wife, two young children, and friends.
Political violence has no place in our society. I say this as someone who knows the horrors of a targeted shooting firsthand.
Democracies will always have disagreements, but we must never allow America to be a country that confronts those disagreements with senseless gun violence. Our nation will not survive.
This summer, America has seen multiple politically-motivated assassinations — first of a Democratic legislator, now of a Republican activist — because dangerous people turned to guns to express their disagreements.
**This cannot be the new normal. Any and all forms of political violence are attacks on democracy itself.**
Attacks against political or ideological opponents are cowardly and un-American, and must be universally condemned. Our leaders — Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike — have a moral and patriotic duty to stop gun violence from claiming more lives. We are calling for action now.
We must all work together to ensure that tragedies like this never happen again.
Please keep Charlie and his family in your prayers.
Thank you,
Gabby Giffords

Please, take a second to read this...
As a victim of political violence, Gabby Giffords has led the fight to save more lives from gun violence for more than a decade, but she can’t do it alone.
If everyone reading this donated just $17, we'd have the resources to pass commonsense gun safety legislation across the country. But not everyone gives — making it even more important for people who care and understand the stakes of our struggle to pitch in what they can.
**If $17 seems worth it to you to change our gun laws in order to make our communities safer from gun violence, we're asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today.**
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/61660?c0=giffords-em-sep25.Kx2kIW&refcode=em250910-2-b&t=1&akid=10865%2E3935704%2EZO6jXB)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=10865%2E3935704%2EZO6jXB) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Friends, Would you support Democrats shutting down the government to stop MAGA extremists? On MSNBC, Seth didn’t hesitate. He said it loud and clear: **“Absolutely”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114990420/568821014/1866411932?refcode=250910_Seth_MFC_ShutdownClip&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzRhMTViNy05NDhlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tsSAjA6nonYHb_I0ckCgak-TwyX1q_B6WmY-OhXhms0=) Here’s the truth: the chaos caucus in Congress has already ground Washington to a halt. They’ve hijacked government funding to push an extremist agenda. And the only way to stop them is to stand firm – even if it means shutting things down. Seth knows the stakes couldn’t be higher and he understands now’s the time for Democrats to dig in and fight.
* MAGA Republicans want to slash Social Security and Medicare
* They want to roll back reproductive rights nationwide
* They’re trying to draw new Congressional maps and rig the midterms

Hey folks,
I went live with Tiffany Carlock just minutes after the news broke that Charlie Kirk had been shot and killed at an event in Utah. We dropped everything else and tried to make sense of what just happened--and what it means for all of us living in a country that is increasingly experiencing political violence.
* **(00:01:15)** -- Breaking news confirmed: Charlie Kirk shot and killed at a campus event
* **(00:02:40)** -- A devastating moment that signals a pattern of growing political violence
* **(00:08:57)** -- Grappling with guns, mental health, and what "safety" even means in America anymore
* **(00:16:25)** -- Why this keeps happening, and why we feel powerless to stop it
* **(00:30:01)** -- The call to stay human, hold onto empathy, and refuse to meet hate with hate

This episode is heavy, so please be sure to take care of yourself.
With urgency,
--Mike

clean_body: Watch now (60 mins) | Mike Nellis LIVE -- Weekdays 5PM ET | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? | | Mike Nellis LIVE -- Weekdays 5PM ET | | and | Sep 10 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Hey folks, I went live with Tiffany Carlock just minutes after the news broke that Charlie Kirk had been shot and killed at an event in Utah. We dropped everything else and tried to make sense of what just happened--and what it means for all of us living in a country that is increasingly experiencing political violence. (00:01:15) -- Breaking news confirmed: Charlie Kirk shot and killed at a campus event (00:02:40) -- A devastating moment that signals a pattern of growing political violence (00:08:57) -- Grappling with guns, mental health, and what "safety" even means in America anymore (00:16:25) -- Why this keeps happening, and why we feel powerless to stop it (00:30:01)** -- The call to stay human, hold onto empathy, and refuse to meet hate with hate This episode is heavy, so please be sure to take care of yourself. With urgency, --Mike | A guest post by| Advocate | MD Resident | Born & Raised in Brooklyn | 2024 DNC Delegate Mike Nellis is a Democratic strategist and entrepreneur who has raised over $1 billion for Democratic campaigns and causes. He 's the founder of Authentic.org, an award-winning fundraising and advertising agency, and a former Senior Advisor to Vice President Kamala Harris. This Substack is where he writes with endless urgency about the issues of the day--and how we can save the Democratic Party and our democracy. You 're currently a free subscriber to Endless Urgency with Mike Nellis. For the full experience or to support my work so I can keep it free for as many people as possible, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Mike Nellis 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Team Mia
subject: Rain will not dampen the "heat" served on September 27th - please join us!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2026, FPPC#1477774
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/bonta%20logo%202.jpg]
Dear Peter,

In the Bay Area, we always welcome the rain. And, we know that yesterday's and today’s showers cannot dampen our excitement for the 2025 Bonta Chili Cook-Off on September 27th!

We are thrilled and grateful for everyone who has already signed up as team members, sponsors, attendees, and donors. And there’s still room for YOU! Click HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff] to sign up now and help us fill 15th Street with community, fun, and of course, delicious chili.

A huge thank you to our Firefighters for making this event possible. We don’t want to let them down, so dust off your best chili recipe, gather your team, and see how your chili stacks up against last year’s entries from the Alameda Labor Council • Boxer Gerson LLP • Firefighters Locals • and others. We can’t wait to taste yours! Bring your family and enjoy all the fun activities.

Mia is up for re-election in 2026. She proudly represents Assembly District 18 and is working hard to ensure that harmful federal policies do not roll back the progress we’ve made in California. Please consider supporting her today.

Become an Event Sponsor, Attendee, or Donor > click HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff] to get started.

If you have questions or would like to enter your team, please reach out to Laurie at laurie@earpevents.com [laurie@earpevents.com] or 510-839-3100.

With much gratitude,

Team Bonta
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/25sepchilicookoff]
Contributions to this committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. The California Political Reform Act (Prop. 34) places limits on contributions (including loans) to candidates for state office and imposes certain prohibitions. This request does not seek a contribution in excess of applicable limits or from prohibited sources. An individual, union, political action committee, association, committee, partnership, business or corporation may contribute a maximum of $5,900 to the committee per election. A registered Small Contributor Committee may contribute a maximum of $11,800 to the committee per election.
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2026, FPPC#1477774.
4200 Park Blvd., #128, Oakland, CA. 94602 | 510-839-3100 | laurie@earpevents.com
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YS7WRSJS4UGbNPwJK1c7zA2?unsubscribedata=K5cBRdnqEhLHVUl19Wb3XHY24N7p1XGM6509PXxBlltHK29X8qe531OBsXsnX4JvfSJfKZVVFHdd48cVm2IaqMwgk4p24d5Jt3C7jc5DZ7pT9AyjUf45vdfcjNY3MldCj2cYTp91UHIcG19hrd%2FJuzmzH3AIdd848wnAgFqlfyk%2B9W53mdSTKZx9QfCAvD3TiOeugL9LAnsoiiQme0mBWMUoibMOxR47qYhq%2F1ZDYUuicEDzWvAODI152FFQgnlatVe8Pc4q1e0zeO5B0f4Hz8O4ghG4rwxTIGWFOUBmc6B9UF1jrL%2BaB2AqcFrJ7XwcDt3HKazsXRxi5Aox7QO9i7Ow%2FWU1zMxlm8SStdgJfjBo0GPyj6mLeF1rcI2rngOm0dzpIU20CL6y9WSDgyqryh2lmJoHiRkaLkPBWYYQZiBgVOSCvqaWS3IDRs7ICIoK .

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: A Turning Point: Honoring Charlie Kirk

| We are reeling from the heartbreaking news that Charlie Kirk has been assassinated. It is surreal, stunning, and sickening. I have no words ... but silence is not an option.
---
I first met Charlie in 2012, when Turning Point was just beginning. He was a whirlwind of passion and statistics, determined to reach America’s youth. In 2013, when his fledgling organization struggled with the IRS over nonprofit status, True the Vote stood with him as a fiscal sponsor. It was a bold and uncommon step in our movement, but I knew then that Charlie was charting a new course.
|
---
Charlie is on the far right in this photo, helping us canvass across Mississippi in 2014.
And what a course it was. Slowly at first, and then all at once, Charlie’s voice broke through. He never talked down to young people; he walked with them, gave them courage to think critically, and clarity to stand boldly. Over the years, we worked together on many projects, and through it all, his passion never dimmed. His reach only grew because his heart was fixed on truth.
And now, he is gone.
An assassin’s bullet has taken Charlie’s life, but it cannot take his legacy. It cannot silence the movement he built.
Charlie was very gifted — he spoke truth to power, he was a true patriot, but above all else, he was a Christian committed to the way of Jesus. As Scripture reminds us, “We are confident, I say, and willing rather to be absent from the body, and to be present with the Lord” - 2 Corinthians 5:8. Today, Charlie is with the Lord. And though the time of reunion is not yet, believers know we will see him again.
Here on earth, his death is a solemn reminder of the battle before us. Liberty and faith are under siege — in our nation and around the world. The gravity of this moment is undeniable, but we must not let his death be in vain.
Let this day be a turning point. Let it strengthen our resolve to speak more boldly, to stand more firmly, to love more deeply, and to keep the faith.
And to those psychopaths who plotted this evil act — if your plan was to weaken this movement, you will fail. Like Charlie, we know how this story ends. We revere life, but we do not fear death. Our salvation is assured, and our mission continues.
Now is the time for mourning, but when your mind turns to sorrow, I urge you to replace that ache with a spirit of rededication — to liberty, to truth, to the work that remains. Liberty is not granted by government; it is written on our hearts by our Creator. Never forget that. And never forget that Charlie’s life and sacrifice now call each of us to carry the torch forward with courage and faith.
May God comfort and strengthen the Kirk family in this hour of unfathomable loss. And may God bless America, the cause for which Charlie gave his life.
Ever onward, with much love -
|

name: Team Gillibrand
subject: For our students, our teachers and our future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
While billionaires get billions in new tax breaks, schools are being stripped of desperately needed resources. **In fact, the Trump administration has already withheld $7 billion in federal funding for public schools – money that should be supporting teachers, students and classrooms across the country.** This isn’t just cruel. It’s shortsighted, dangerous and proof of what happens when Trump and the GOP put wealthy donors ahead of working families. That’s why Senator Kirsten Gillibrand is calling on supporters nationwide to take our Public Education Survey and demand: Protect our schools. Protect our students. Protect our future. **[**_We’ve set a goal of 25,000 responses in the next 48 hours. Will you take our survey right now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114992065/568826659/-1218000011?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.09.10_Defend-Public-Schools_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjJkZTRhMi05ZThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5fuvPu-A9_EOuREQUkTryLrFK8o1-InTzpjMIQSiv0=&emci=e81acd45-828d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3b2de4a2-9e8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)** | | **[TAKE THE SURVEY>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/114992066/568826660/-1218000011?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2025.09.10_Defend-Public-Schools_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjJkZTRhMi05ZThlLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s5fuvPu-A9_EOuREQUkTryLrFK8o1-InTzpjMIQSiv0=&emci=e81acd45-828d-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=3b2de4a2-9e8e-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Charlie Kirk: America Lost A LEGEND but Heaven Gained A Saint
body:
Today, America Lost A LEGEND but Heaven Gained A SAINT with the passing of Charlie Kirk. I pray and hope that his tragic death would be a Turning Poi
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12816.1.4d040618f6c8b3ec6a4563c40d48f9f2) |
---
Today, America Lost A **LEGEND** but Heaven Gained A **SAINT** with the passing of **Charlie Kirk**. I pray and hope that his tragic death would be a _Turning Point_ in the United States for good because our Nation is in desperate need. I am glad to have known Charlie and to have been impacted by him. Let's pray for his wife, Erika, and their two children as well the entire **Turning Point USA** family. Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---
---
## Churches Are UNDER ATTACK
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12817.1.baeaa580652ae1a4feb7e29304b75b6a)
---
Right now there is a **MAJOR escalation** of attacks upon Churches in the United States of America. Since 2018 there has been an **increase of over 700%** according to the **Family Research Council**. In 2018 there were 50 reported attacks on churches (**less than 1 per week**). In 2024 there were 415 reported attacks on churches (**more than 1 per day**). I want to **offer two thoughts**. **First to the Pastors** reading this.
Take measures at your church to prevent these attacks. At [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12818.1.cb6f7b98c25e1a0530008d6de688964f), I am beyond grateful for our security team that watches over the House every service to make sure our people are _SAFE_. But we also partner with local law enforcement every service as well. The police car stationed at the front of our church, I believe, will prevent 99% of bad actors from even attempting something they should not. **We must be as wise as serpents and as harmless as doves.** **Second to Believers** reading this.
Don't you dare stop attending church! God has not given us a spirit of fear but instead one of power, love and a sound mind (**2 Tim 1:7** ). We are told in **Hebrews 10** that as the Day of the Lord gets near that many believers will stop attending church but we are command not to stop gathering together because we need one another. **Do not let the enemy intimidate you from going to the House of the Lord**. Although the stats are _disheartening_ , history proves that whenever the Church is attacked, she always _flourishes_. These attacks will backfire on the enemy and the Church of the Lord Jesus Christ in America will prevail and be even more effective because of them. **Pray for the Body of Christ and the local churches throughout America.** Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer
---

If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12821.1.fccc8bdb7ca568a5cbe4fbec3fcf5bbf)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12822.1.e1ccbe2bc3ce17e9976c997c569032fc)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12823.1.e542977e0b26a0945fb581884991a78d). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12824.1.431e94bf7a14b0c5b7b55c06e88368db) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12825.1.66b71db94c9467bf5ded402ad6d2ed0d) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24577644.12826.1.1fa39009ede16986a51cf4697262bb41) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.
